clean_body: News + editorial to start your week | Broad + Liberty Weekly Reads | | | | | | | Good morning and welcome to Broad + Liberty 's Weekly Reads. Stay up to date on all of this and more when you get the best of Broad + Liberty delivered straight to your inbox. | | 1. By Guy Ciarrocchi The NAEP 2024 national is out. I wish I didn’t have to write this column. I wish that there was good news to report on public schools in Pennsylvania. But wishes aren’t reality. Tragically, the scores are that bad. Here are the lowlights. Only 41 percent of fourth graders can do fourth grade math. Only 33 percent can read at a grade level. And, going from bad to worse, at eighth grade, only 31 percent can perform at grade level for math or reading. Grades fall the longer they’re in their district. The majority of Pennsylvania public school students are not grade-proficient in either math or reading. This isn’t a “blip” in the chart: grades have more or less been stuck here for about 20 years — though the Covid lockdowns seem to have harmed our kids. Why It Matters. In most cases, the parents or guardians raising the children in those tragically failing schools know that the schools are academic train wrecks, but they cannot send their students anywhere else. Why? After paying their bills and their school taxes, they simply cannot afford even a nearby parochial elementary school — averaging “only” about $5,100 per student. Worse, in the case of Philadelphia, charter schools are not an option because the Philadelphia School District has capped enrollment at the existing schools and has not not approved a new charter school since 2018. The sad state of affairs is that the district schools are failing these kids. The parents know that the schools are failing their children. The school boards and bureaucrats in Harrisburg — and at the US Department of Education — know the schools are failing these kids. And there are no alternatives for tens of thousands of students. Yet they keep sending them more and more of our money. What has the education “swamp” offered as a solution? They demanded more money from local taxpayers, state taxpayers, and federal taxpayers. They grew the bureaucracy at rates faster than at almost any time in history — administration budgets grew even faster than teachers’ salaries. | | 2. By Stephen F. Gambescia The pushback against Robert F. Kennedy Jr.’s nomination to lead and direct the U.S. Health and Human Services agency fails the heuristic test but makes sense when influencers prioritize political circumstances over the fundamental steps we should follow in making healthcare and public health policies: 1) making intellectually honest inquiries into the nature and extent of a health problem, and 2) supporting reasonable and defensible public policy alternatives. Generally, based on his thoughts, words, deeds, and intentions, Robert F. Kennedy, Jr., appears to be a good candidate to lead the DHHS. He is a nominee who resembles several giants of consumer activism who came before him and should have gained support from those who ostensibly work to improve the human condition. Why It Matters. The challenge for Kennedy is that his motivation, passion, and call to action are summed up by “Make America Healthy Again,” which resonates too closely with MAGA, causing those who oppose anything related to President Donald Trump to recoil. Considering a brief review of the actions taken by well-known consumer advocates in the past who shared the same goal of improving the health of Americans, it is puzzling that Kennedy has been relegated to persona non grata for asking big questions to ensure public officials are doing enough “to enhance the health and well-being of all Americans.” The consumer and health promotion mavericks of the past, advocating for a healthier America, had their detractors. These detractors would characterize the mavericks using a range of pejoratives, from them emboldening a “nanny state” to being ideologically biased, to making unfounded or even wacky claims. What each maverick had in common is asking big questions all to improve the health of the people. And those questions were of actions taken by powerful people in powerful organizations that had a lot to lose in such an inquiry. | | 3\. Lightning Round | | 4\. Podcast | This episode dives into everything from Gen Z voters and PA's biggest rivalries, to Philly's epic Super Bowl win, and the unexpected moment that made Joe Picozzi feel like a real senator. Don’t miss this candid and entertaining conversation with PA State Senator Joe Picozzi and Commonwealth Foundation Senior Fellow Guy Ciarrocchi. | | 5\. What we're reading The mainstream media is bending over backward to make the Trump administration look reasonable. On CBS’s Face the Nation last week, anchor Margaret Brennan indignantly told Secretary of State Marco Rubio that the Holocaust was caused by an excess of free speech. Rubio patiently disabused her of this wildly ahistorical notion. As , it was just the latest example of how “America’s legacy media desperately grasps at straws to maintain its languishing credibility.” You might have thought that the second Trump administration would induce less unhinged derangement than the first. After all, we’ve all done this before just four years ago. But no, the mainstream press is going about with its hair on fire, just like it was 2017 again. And looking all the more foolish for it. | | Broad + Liberty is funded exclusively by readers like you. Your generous support ensures that Broad + Liberty can bring you stories and opinions that Pennsylvania’s mainstream media would rather leave unheard. Please consider making a contribution today. If you would like your gift to be used to help us cover a specific story or subject, please let us know in the contribution form or at mailto:editirs@broadandliberty.com. As always, gifts made to Broad + Liberty are 100% tax deductible! Thank you, dear reader, for your steadfast support of our independent, broad-minded brand of local journalism. We could not do this without you. With gratitude, — The Editors at Broad + Liberty | | "Support Broad + Liberty" | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2025 Broad + Liberty, All rights reserved. name: Deb Haaland
subject: I’m running
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight for Progress PAC and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
I’m launching my campaign for Governor of the great state of New Mexico.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/102617168/529739922/1004292363?refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2025-02-23_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQwYTU3Mzg2LWVlZjEtZWYxMS05MGNiLTAwMjI0ODJhOTRmNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=vzuKclchzDfan0adEOkLvmVfhjMmaPD0Vy7GEDdw8yY=)
---
Fight for Progress said I could reach out with some exciting news, Peter:

I’m launching my campaign for Governor of the great state of New Mexico — my home — to bring our state together and build a bright future for all who live here.

I’m humbly asking: [_**Will you join us as a day-one donor by donating just $3 or more to my campaign and Fight for Progress now?**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/102617169/529739923/1004292363?refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2025-02-23_1&amount=3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQwYTU3Mzg2LWVlZjEtZWYxMS05MGNiLTAwMjI0ODJhOTRmNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=vzuKclchzDfan0adEOkLvmVfhjMmaPD0Vy7GEDdw8yY=)

The amount you give doesn’t matter. What matters is building a campaign with the support of real people. That’s who I am and who I came from. That’s who I am running to serve.

My roots in New Mexico run 35 generations deep. The Pueblo people were the first farmers in the high deserts of New Mexico, an agriculture tradition that still continues today.

I am here because of my grandfather, who worked for decades as a diesel mechanic on the railroad. Somehow he also kept a field — picking worms off the corn as it grew, like the generations before him.

I am here because of my grandmother, a survivor and a caretaker who woke up every day before the sun. She was the one who gave me my true love of cooking New Mexican cuisine. (She wouldn’t let us in the kitchen while she cooked, but I’d perch myself outside and watch her through the window for hours.)

I am here because of my parents and their sacrifice. My mother, a Pueblo woman, served in the Navy. My father, a Marine, received a Silver Star for his service in Vietnam. He now lies in honor at Arlington.

I am here because of my beloved child, who I raised on my own. I started a small business to pay the bills, but it still wasn’t always enough. We relied on food stamps to get on our feet. I sometimes had to decide between paying rent and buying groceries to feed our family. I will never forget how that felt or the kindness of those who helped us – strangers who became community. When I look at my Somah, I see perseverance, strength and hope.

These are my stories.

These are stories of New Mexico.

These days, our differences are blown so far out of proportion. We lose sight of a simple fact: we all live in the same state, together. All of us in New Mexico come from love, survival, and sacrifice. We all want to live good lives — and we want even more for our children.

The current president and his billionaire friends look at the lands and the people of this country and think: what can I exploit?

I am running to ask: if we come together in New Mexico, what good can we do for each other and for the next generation?

We have our work cut out for us. The cost of living is crushing our families. Our economy is growing, but we need to make sure everyone shares in our progress. Our families need more. Our farmers and ranchers need more. New Mexico’s children need so much more. And we must be good stewards of the Earth, and preserve the rivers, mesas, farmlands, and forests whose beauty sustains our communities.

I am running to do all this and more. I am running to serve all New Mexicans and make sure we’re leaving a better future for our children.

[_**Will you join us with a day one donation, split between my campaign and Fight for Progress?**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/102617170/529739924/1004292363?refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2025-02-23_1&amount=3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQwYTU3Mzg2LWVlZjEtZWYxMS05MGNiLTAwMjI0ODJhOTRmNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=vzuKclchzDfan0adEOkLvmVfhjMmaPD0Vy7GEDdw8yY=) I would be honored to have your support.

Many thanks to Fight for Progress for helping spread the word. I hope you’ll join us, Peter!

Be fierce,

Deb

This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com

name: DLCC Newsletter
subject: In honor of Black History Month, we’re celebrating Black leadership and representation in state legislatures across the country
body:
Here is the DLCC's Black History Month edition of the DLCC's newsletter for February 23rd, 2025. | | |
---
|
---
| [ ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.yjJN_MEbNx94PLaWzZ6hW9WL4ySifRyEQyG7D6ZDcaKmFQcO_SqeUFRkYFn0WrvHHisWiwN-mSj2nwLaaiVAndhLwjC3x9MI2KUAa0DnJVhnpYEDC1zCy_aVhTCXGaPn42VlvT5bZBTlao9lJ5I35rIS33oWsU7pfdFeEywFZxKRmL95AKupwFlXukiz7ZSVPTlsrJF_csmWv04pcqQOybdSbrwgS7r11kiREMiGWV7iFCRnkCcLWRkY-8NB2mvPBydLyb6QZ-YzLkSxRmNPUijpRNn3PoRB1LUeoe_8hguj8SEWdn108dP5oMBphOVfgDE_W_QnK9h8QoA2vi-VkLxXNNuzLBJIH5Se12mF1TJ6PWT0ymHPHdAhlyLQYNo20uVbcqGLKFGjqqkK6i_jndHCihS6Xd1GXM6MiPmt1ENeDo6KACsxDZ0H8WCDCt4-J93v_ZMVELI_L_iYoBioKypAvz0qqkEax02vlq2rCLQmTzTuK2d12MX0ODc_sJ-QeCNywXX_LHM-_qRo5pSU7gaqJy0yo1oLN010n0qJx5B8ROVA9On9ueMCun675sv8/4e9/8YJ6rfYdQ8Snp51jqY019g/h0/h001.TRqLEw4ffj6qbIcBfhDcK5JrPvWWsQ6-OWVCbv42tZg)
---
👉 **_Delaware:_ Melissa Minor-Brown makes history as Delaware's first Black Speaker of the House **
In Delaware, Melissa Minor-Brown’s election as Speaker marks a groundbreaking moment as she’s now become the first Black Speaker of the DE House of Representatives. [**Her historic election adds to the growing number of Black legislative leaders making positive change across the country →** ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMVrNcDMS_0jD2bUrnHF1ISLRMBcxU6DIMpNsc07oyFZ-CX9opx384bSShBVhGRf15csrP4nW2QiXhNIhVVNman9vZOR7OaxsWWDrBF0m4SjgV5CfJFOp8MIJdT7yIPoGhRmJxp20M9ZnXf535eBpVvGtDt23PixUmCo9iNNS4s6NG4UBgn9fk49Xd3AlO-LLJwlGdGFYzIEAizEQOf-G9IQY3fccrJiBToDC0d1hN98Cifizlc5bjA7_8ADHd6jlobnj2dQeMlBQaS0Ow9rOOk-HkBvmVgEpft96KF8qA5EkdWpoaCMRXcxo5cEiJXlnXpD25cueJgn-oyP55JdWOt1lckzQGoxjNZL-Rv0eEpBPHWRXHVryBsSuVK-CI-M7CeqzP0Yr7A3Lg-rcLG8iErxBAJJwZdL58_NlhAXJ2OEVKGIYEu5F1wcEBiRgdwlYgzAICH8SsKGMXKZN2G8-thfDSRGvR9tC2kuJUQXE6YGf92uO_W71bSfhncLHS2UkjgA1tDHsndmbafHHiyHlCWmO4nc-5nIRckkRY7McS6LgAaCDKc67ujNT-w4y1tLewG-jmUmuvpojfHzas1owLymCki-N7AMyWkL1Fx-xvO5qeEJ4xACFTl1_jQKJu_KJjQ5f32QqS6laZqpLefUpfSSXd6XI_XNfZrYAalW1DLYPD5L5R2gM-EmxWLQ-D_VmlE61sZhArTozQcM4mraTCpR4SizbBe0bbLZ8inL9ynF-/4e9/8YJ6rfYdQ8Snp51jqY019g/h1/h001.H5Pezp0hLea--5kqpxs4nw6RZtw4iw6Wbktb-dnhGCo)

👉 **_Nationwide Impact:_ Black representation in state legislatures reaches historic all-time high**
Over 700 Black legislators are now serving in statehouses _across the country_ , with nine serving as leaders of their chambers. More so, _hundreds_ of Black women are representing their communities in state legislatures – with the vast majority as Democrats. [**These leaders are bringing much-needed diverse perspectives and championing legislation that matters to all Americans, while breaking down historic barriers →**](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.nTQp_FEIcSHl649vCJCicpKFft1bSTbJk-zFMuUV0XAhwTHJaR_8JYEUxBWX1tPN4allT8nYAr7vNGehAHnivoTPPGrIwNSBktBNITuRKKlwPcRjaIB8LeT02fyBaWEPmdRatFUok1vu4HPM3aMntdPJUpQYrtksz8WTFsqFJT1L-kckvFw4VEtLhR_spmSG5ImowytGXpANWX4jzYRyuzqi85qAJoyePxTYxft4CvIF5lro0-kHI-qtyrZxJR-gCl7aiauH5946fDAqYJBIFBEl6hjO5VOpmlAqc029OIUFGoD41NkxIt0nll02dJL6Ml4bOLbjv7r9-OA4s8j2_EvKFTGCydANctnz3Qxgv0dLoLdCijyF2FZir4Ml2g41IGd1-Cf4QFhQ-goV2-CSx0P1k9xzPyxfBiNFjRvBT2bnBJoJipkcYZ5dPE6UFBfSrv94tqWR_c6Dg1sVEOIXoNVS9KuFgQ36eVQMPy_0Iuh9okDJ8ZOhbWKQs4SGBdYOhFy3L3usM5WZoYobmWQ_4NkcAwXRb5EwOQ8P8GUni1LqX1qybBcQj8Gd1-RpkuDfSW7pLhTIcF0XmJGgqIL1-Q/4e9/8YJ6rfYdQ8Snp51jqY019g/h2/h001.x_D-HaXplaWQuz_p8NqRO4t37904qBXMLB3QclGFXDk)
👉 **_Wisconsin:_ State Assembly shows unity in finally honoring Black History Month **
This month, the Wisconsin State Assembly voted _unanimously_ to honor Black History Month, demonstrating bipartisan recognition of Black Americans’ contributions to our nation. [**This is a celebration of Black excellence →**](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMRtwxpc7ITVDOlSI_g-22sHqNCoRuWx-8Ow79WAFDrM1OK0KYJZE8TScks5vsB0bOOjMs-Z04V5EBVbzYNLltOtFJIwHenKefcmYHQWuUpA6vovvtXxeRXfRa66fDeBrS6j2veFKCzkA2MorsBMOEW7aDKC4q6vQYbkMID5ycz95rHVtR9Z_ANs9ZgXlZMddCqqlRlcO_NcQcXzHQrStxUsIdANbbKeUUeogTJHMqSLKCVT6_8o1HGo9ncTFgSW4177BkwceCxsdHxHjcDfM8i2QPBPV4tzjx1w7UKlfW7XEGmOdl2p7T9IK1u_QGjx7LPa794qrFg81NUW2PL_o_HEzL4Y5J_EO7ylV8C842sxLobeTeFKpeotgpxkBs-ZMZAUfb3v_cZchu7dbPYRoCnVfwiobNGBLEf_uNhdZv2S_88s9kCC8NZbMcYZ5iGXTZI3p61LbjSAU2DOiXMiYXY7SgGhCjkRu4iInC5wn7zLr0C7E7yPPFNVFKkoB_M3eOQ_2pVn_qmst14cMkjXdKgGYMyQy63CEmPFb1l9PEWsjGC8zuTvtdH4bZMwTvskCwoflhZRKaz0UQwDtHThTAU82n8DOQw3Z0gJGgT_0IxhVI-Nz_ThHq9vzFPxradPE25FfYgiJmHCdlORm_NaMkaQt4hlG84xurCO4ROjeHuzMFIC7dZZuNzr-O8w13miz5zg-Z9bTRXWDHSjSJGz3gO8/4e9/8YJ6rfYdQ8Snp51jqY019g/h3/h001.XXmPGChMmH_UY9Kv48qknYrW-g9nrsqn5AqvtgNvdDs)
👉 **_Washington:_ State Legislature has historic Black representation **
In Washington, nearly 10% of the state’s lawmakers are Black, the highest number of Black lawmakers who have ever served simultaneously in the legislature. [**This record marks an important shift in the state, just a decade ago, only one of the state’s 147 legislators was Black →**](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMaoKKtGADiGzdt9uyyTwd8cCLoGyFH6Jzd0on_W8KCcYYR5sRWxT_aSh2lBfrx8X8jUT-l0SflwPzHQTHm0Oc8582dcC8X204zJFftpiwocdt52Qw2Ee3WsfbGl_lxpZLqo_I8lTYi9GW7jZi2T6qBY599O4Y6OE7pNzqKUGfJ3x5iXFIpCU91ues4zaF99L9wcjBGfEEMlgrTNMT_5rKXgeL6uXc7_TzJt78jNRB8JDF180103K-xX6EAJqP6Kd4ebtAkgInpC6oJCs-froE8Hu0fPa75p4XMjp4-Fe1jTTrLpMg6BFeSGVNkfEx6e2aL8MZN2lri9tC6MTVniPChZMqpt_Iuf9ocI0q0OuGnODtE3pJHvTEdEyvNvM2ObTyvjm2TNxMvT6bjQhb7awogTQx3tB9_2b_jceXVJhoagxERUUgQt0CbxAsks3synHRcax2495S3TfkFPjsx6Ysh4nTf4bO_BLxItXyKZLJh9p4sX2lK1uQNp5s3cpUcHWHxEz90JgmkBsg6Kpdfr0KNsUTvZ4l37pcHBYqNdkM8e9wAF9QbChxWXtd6PUTg-YOf4exWe-1GUVKVj191yLe1_1mFjhvQI_hkj9Rw0h4HNyhUi9XeBIDnk5t2sCWfeyffC4oaCezl37paYN15dmS7vjMoWN28L_I92QJFe-4NGa/4e9/8YJ6rfYdQ8Snp51jqY019g/h4/h001.9N0FkNGbDNUwxMNOKxKHY-Tss6q0B6S0K5O4Y0upHq4)
⚠️ **_Trump’s Anti-DEI Agenda:_ MAGA Republicans are threatening to dismantle diversity initiatives **
Within his first month in office, Donald Trump and MAGA Republicans have launched aggressive campaigns against diversity, equity, and inclusion – threatening to roll back _decades_ of progress for Black Americans. Their vicious attacks on DEI initiatives in education, business, and government show _exactly_ what’s at stake in 2025. [**We must continue electing state Democrats and defend the progress we’ve made →**](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMbHQPX4zlW5LTF7Twtz6WVK9oMjarXNbhHvUPNrsij63ImuGaPfgh_QnuIl3skz8VjNsJB3Hid-pSOstyfPIRFCgzwboDyLbeFPxPTfJYr7Ka9J7kogG2_KZi9lH14plePi8Qn2San3m2hzsZ7govyIDuzhnJhYnnXSY6EJZGLKiC3b8wndv6M5SwZDojw2KEARxXuCzhfSk_bGYj-8SAPPEHPYNnlEqH-3gJePCYxbG6FPEZHoOQWeit27SJnXdawwGjB_YTiKsX8hqmFuUCUyhdOjvu6_Et7LOqygohwUeNBQmYeTim_ysuGU2jfqoasPUMs_gOumZt18kqm7Q8776FYMYj_7Mta-5ZGbf4-a8vzj25jISpWgpG9zqXV5lcofQXUZYV1I_11CyaogYQH4_8QUaIujMmRf0hToy4B1_Wd2PjOqt5lYAlATQvMshb-xNUN8NGoMA198U61lenx4AZ9MrOtaom81AGBhVrSfD9UNUFxOKXuAKJpSx-xLcdB47Y33cH8bjG334hJaLNUSB4reJ5KT3KglmBxN40Y1U67pRZMY_LtzDTsIa6SaRzQTkQ_9fWwm-3M7Z9lEcEq8-EtW5TO8K0oc28xemq7lP2CbNu95crZBHQzmyL_LkUw/4e9/8YJ6rfYdQ8Snp51jqY019g/h5/h001.ftfEFo0cNRVFZ_AlwfgHRPcaDleMaPLuY7aUB_q4i5U)

clean_body: Here is the DLCC's Black History Month edition of the DLCC's newsletter for February 23rd, 2025. | | | | | 👉 Delaware: Melissa Minor-Brown makes history as Delaware's first Black Speaker of the House In Delaware, Melissa Minor-Brown’s election as Speaker marks a groundbreaking moment as she’s now become the first Black Speaker of the DE House of Representatives. 👉 Nationwide Impact: Black representation in state legislatures reaches historic all-time high Over 700 Black legislators are now serving in statehouses across the country , with nine serving as leaders of their chambers. More so, hundreds of Black women are representing their communities in state legislatures – with the vast majority as Democrats. 👉 Wisconsin: State Assembly shows unity in finally honoring Black History Month This month, the Wisconsin State Assembly voted unanimously to honor Black History Month, demonstrating bipartisan recognition of Black Americans’ contributions to our nation. 👉 Washington: State Legislature has historic Black representation In Washington, nearly 10% of the state’s lawmakers are Black, the highest number of Black lawmakers who have ever served simultaneously in the legislature. ⚠️ Trump’s Anti-DEI Agenda: MAGA Republicans are threatening to dismantle diversity initiatives Within his first month in office, Donald Trump and MAGA Republicans have launched aggressive campaigns against diversity, equity, and inclusion – threatening to roll back decades of progress for Black Americans. Their vicious attacks on DEI initiatives in education, business, and government show exactly what’s at stake in 2025. ****** | | ---|---|--- | Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005 Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. body:
I'm not sure where to begin, but I know I have to be honest with you.
Last chance to renew your membership:
|

| | | Friend,

name: Andy Kim
subject: Americans will feel the impact of actions like trade wars with our allies through higher prices at home
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andy Kim for New Jersey
body:
Trump is creating self-inflicted damage abroad and at home.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102624693/529763389/41798106?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNjljMzU2My1mNGYxLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4PyktVNKn28GiwwNj4AxZfi-tfpTWHADa6UWoUW9ddg=&emci=6ba5c15f-77f0-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=e69c3563-f4f1-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=26261389)
---

| | I spent the last weekend in Munich with a bipartisan Congressional delegation advocating for renewed American engagement and leadership on the World stage. **The message from our allies and partners around the world is loud and clear: They don't know if they can trust America's leadership under President Trump.** America is weaker when our own partners can't trust us to stand up for our values and interests. We are strongest when we engage and lead alongside our allies. I was in the room in Munich for VP Vance's speech. No talk about Russia, Ukraine, or China. He just criticized our allies and focused on "the threat from within." His speech is going to embolden our adversaries who will see this as a green light to act while America is distracted and divided. **From ending foreign aid to shunning our partners, the Trump-Vance administration has taken us backward, and Americans will feel the impact of actions like trade wars with our allies through higher prices at home.** Trump is creating self-inflicted damage right now. We face real national security threats, and right now, our adversaries and competitors are loving what they see — America at war with itself. President Trump must reverse his course immediately before it does America lasting harm. More soon, _Andy_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Andy Kim instantly:

🔴 **FIRST:** Elon Musk was appointed as the head of the fake “Department of Government Efficiency” — vowing to cut trillions from essential government programs.

🔴 **AND NOW:** He’s funneling hundreds of thousands into electing a far-right candidate in the critical Wisconsin Supreme Court race!

**_He’s as corrupt as they come. And his power is completely unchecked._**

Peter,
As the new administration runs roughshod over our rights, we’re keeping a close eye on threats to our democracy and our freedoms from Washington — but we know that’s not the only place where major governmental decisions are made.
State legislatures can secure the right to an abortion or rip it away. State legislatures can protect trans rights or roll them back. State legislatures can make it easier or harder to vote. And state legislatures can strengthen our public schools or make it harder for students to get the education they need.
At the state level, elected leaders can decide whether to follow the lead of the extreme far right in Washington — so it’s crucial that state-level leaders fairly represent the will of the people. And fair representation starts with fair maps.
[**Your donation to All On The Line ensures we can organize grassroots activists to stop gerrymandering, including at the state level, and make sure voters have the freedom to select their representatives (and not the other way around). State-level gerrymandering can set off a dangerous domino effect — _and here’s exactly how it works:_
→ When gerrymandered maps are in place, the outcomes of elections don’t represent the will of the voters.
→ When the will of the voters is misrepresented, state legislatures can become lopsided and out-of-touch.
→ When those out-of-touch legislators go unchecked, they can pass extreme bills that go against our shared, broadly popular values on issues like reproductive freedom, access to health care, LGBTQ+ rights, public education, voting rights, climate change, and more.
**It’s clear that we can’t expect much positive change from Washington right now — but state governments can show a better path forward. And we need to continue working to stop gerrymandering once and for all so we can fight for the values we care about most. **
[**We’re counting on supporters like you to help keep our work going in the weeks and months ahead as we mobilize grassroots supporters. Friend,

_**Hillary Clinton has come out swinging against DOGE. Are we surprised? **_

While Americans struggle to pay for everyday necessities like groceries and prescriptions, Trump has been focused on helping Elon Musk target crucial federal programs like Medicaid and Social Security, pardoning the Jan. 6 insurrectionists who attacked police officers, and performing selfish political stunts like renaming the Gulf of Mexico.
**And yet, Trump's approval rating is nearing an all-time HIGH!**
**We urgently need to confirm where this grassroots team stands, and we personally selected you as one of the 30 Democrats to represent 37087 in our live poll. The deadline to submit your response is midnight tonight, so please, tell us now:**

name: Survival Food Kit
subject: The Truth About The Coming Food Crisis
body:
This might be your only warning...
| | | Unsubscribe [here](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/20431/6374453/8227c823ae6c05bc7559e091ec6638eb2326e33b/a11522399bb0a5e4c06e567ed526eed4c329a911). We'll miss you - so will great opportunities.
To view this email as a webpage, click [here](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/20431/6374453/07c4f76fc501380345ea6aebc9884a7acef35d26/a11522399bb0a5e4c06e567ed526eed4c329a911?message_id=ImFiOGIxMDkwLWQ0NGYtMDEzZC00MDVmLTI2NGQ4M2IxY2NiNUBuYXRpb25hbGd1bm93bmVyLm9yZyI=).
---
| | [](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/20431/6374453/595506133b73b4902a28da748f8b6b821fda242b/a11522399bb0a5e4c06e567ed526eed4c329a911)
---
---
|
---
**The Truth About The Coming Food Crisis**
---
---
**This might be your only warning.** According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite this imminent crisis, mainstream media remains silent... And our own government ignores dire warnings of industry experts like fourth-generation American farmers who warn: **_“Food shortages are coming.”_** Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life – depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

**Well, no need to worry anymore.** Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of these best-selling [**Survival Food Kits**](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/20431/6374453/62fad028759279e7564f6acfe00dbde8838aa3ed/a11522399bb0a5e4c06e567ed526eed4c329a911). When you secure your own food stockpile, you will have the peace of mind and security knowing that when a crisis hits... You will be able to calmly reassure your family that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/20431/6374453/62fad028759279e7564f6acfe00dbde8838aa3ed/a11522399bb0a5e4c06e567ed526eed4c329a911) When a crisis hits, the masses begin to panic, and grocery stores are wiped out. It quickly becomes every man for himself. Don't make the mistake of waiting until it is too late. [**Stock up now**](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/20431/6374453/62fad028759279e7564f6acfe00dbde8838aa3ed/a11522399bb0a5e4c06e567ed526eed4c329a911) on these survival food kits while you can. **More Raving Customer Reviews!** **Rory H.**
"I was surprised to find that the densely packed packages were easy to prepare and were tasty as well. I definitely recommend having survival food on hand for the times when 'life' happens while we are planning other things." **Billy H.**
"Received my food kit, and I was able to make the potato soup on my cookstove. Just needed boiling water. Gave it a good stir and let it simmer. When I opened up the pot, it smelled so good. You can see the chunks of potatoes and carrots in each bite you take. It's a good soup." **Kevin S.**
"The 72 hour kit is a perfect starter kit for any scenario. Put one in your car, work bag, in your house or RV. If you want to start preparing safe food, this is where to start." **Carol B.**
"I have been iced in this weekend. I thought I would try my potato soup. To my utter delight, IT WAS DELICIOUS. Thank you for such a wonderful product and the peace of mind it brings." **Ken K.**
"I am not a full-blown survivalist. I am not an idiot, either. I have been through enough in my life and have seen friends who have been through an emergency situation. Save up if you have to, but get at least a month's supply. It tastes good. Although if it's a dire of an emergency, you will be happy to eat anything. IF you have something to eat for your family. We made some of this product, and had family and friends over for them to taste. They all agreed they didn't think anything would be this good, and they will be ordering. Just do something. You can't miss out on this deal." **Justin A.**
"My wife and I tried the food and we were both surprised about how good it tasted and how satisfied it made us feel afterwards. It feels good knowing that I can provide for my family if a crisis arose and I intend to get more in the future. Also the shipping and customer service has been top notch. This is probably the cheapest survival food I have found, and the company is great." **Gary M.**
"I actually had lost my job and was homeless for a while. I dug into my food supply, and I cannot fully describe how delicious and easy to prepare everything is. I felt like I was eating like a king. I am going to stock up again as soon as I settle into my new job. Everyone should participate with this company. You will not be disappointed." **John H.**
"We're in Florida and have made many preparations for the aftermath of a possible hurricane. While we are thankful that Florida has not been hit in several years, it gives us great peace of mind to know we have our 4Patriots kit stashed away, knowing it's not a case of "if" but "when"." [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/20431/6374453/62fad028759279e7564f6acfe00dbde8838aa3ed/a11522399bb0a5e4c06e567ed526eed4c329a911)

name: Ro Khanna
subject: We lost this election because we lost voters like Chancie and Quentin
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ro for Congress
body:
It’s time to rebuild American industry.| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102628487/529771364/-1645665386?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMyMDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTQzMmZlZTQtZjdmMS1lZjExLTkwY2ItMDAyMjQ4MmE5NGY0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=hnS6g6uB_ZBz3dRS0ZPu37oRDjOgS1EfdgE7vfrZUnA=&emci=9d075e37-d0ee-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=1432fee4-f7f1-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=9848080)
---
Peter, Quentin and Chancie worked at the Master Lock plant in Milwaukee, Wisconsin for over a decade. They, like thousands of other factory workers, held good-paying jobs that provided a stable life–a house, a car, and food on the table. Now that’s all gone. For over 40 years, failed economic policies have driven manufacturing overseas and devastated communities. As we continue to let manufacturing jobs leave this country in droves, we let hardworking Americans suffer. **We need a bold, new economic vision.** That means making a moonshot investment in manufacturing and bringing good-paying union jobs back to communities left behind by globalization and offshoring. [**Will you rush a $3 contribution to my campaign to help me push forward a new economic patriotism for our country?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102628489/529771366/-137516743?refcode=20250223-master-lock&amount=3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMyMDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTQzMmZlZTQtZjdmMS1lZjExLTkwY2ItMDAyMjQ4MmE5NGY0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=hnS6g6uB_ZBz3dRS0ZPu37oRDjOgS1EfdgE7vfrZUnA=)

---
| | Quentin and Chaince did not vote in this election because they felt abandoned by politicians. And they’re right to feel that way. We have hollowed out the industrial base in our country, decimating the middle class and people’s ability to achieve the American Dream. I’m dedicated to making the United States a manufacturing superpower once more by penalizing companies that offshore their production and putting our federal dollars toward supporting American-made and manufactured products. We need Chancie, Quentin, and all Americans to have faith in us and to know we have their backs. **[It’s time to rebuild American industry. If you’re with me, please consider donating $3 or more today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102628493/529771370/-137516743?refcode=20250223-master-lock&amount=3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMyMDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTQzMmZlZTQtZjdmMS1lZjExLTkwY2ItMDAyMjQ4MmE5NGY0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=hnS6g6uB_ZBz3dRS0ZPu37oRDjOgS1EfdgE7vfrZUnA=)**

clean_body: It’s time to rebuild American industry.| | | Peter, Quentin and Chancie worked at the Master Lock plant in Milwaukee, Wisconsin for over a decade. They, like thousands of other factory workers, held good-paying jobs that provided a stable life–a house, a car, and food on the table. Now that’s all gone. For over 40 years, failed economic policies have driven manufacturing overseas and devastated communities. As we continue to let manufacturing jobs leave this country in droves, we let hardworking Americans suffer. We need a bold, new economic vision. That means making a moonshot investment in manufacturing and bringing good-paying union jobs back to communities left behind by globalization and offshoring. = | | Quentin and Chaince did not vote in this election because they felt abandoned by politicians. And they’re right to feel that way. We have hollowed out the industrial base in our country, decimating the middle class and people’s ability to achieve the American Dream. I’m dedicated to making the United States a manufacturing superpower once more by penalizing companies that offshore their production and putting our federal dollars toward supporting American-made and manufactured products. We need Chancie, Quentin, and all Americans to have faith in us and to know we have their backs. = = = = = = = = Thank you for your support, your activism, and everything you do. Onward, Ro = | | | | | | mailto:info@rokhanna.com| ---|---|---|---|--- Ro for Congress P.O Box 3513 Santa Clara, CA 95051 United States Paid for by Ro for Congress | | If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

Oklahoma Senator Markwayne Mullin **[DESTROYED Jake Tapper for whining about Kash Patel's confirmation](https://substack.com/redirect/1aa77bd0-21fe-4d57-bdfd-3fe24d61e7ba?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** to become the Director of the FBI.
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/1aa77bd0-21fe-4d57-bdfd-3fe24d61e7ba?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/1aa77bd0-21fe-4d57-bdfd-3fe24d61e7ba?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
"You have no issue with an FBI Director who has an 'enemies list' made up of basically critics of the President?!" Tapper complained.
Mullin fired back, "I wouldn't call that an enemies list, that's what the media likes to call it. What he was doing was exposing what he felt like was the truth and I don't think he was far off base!"
"He exposed what Director Wray was doing, weaponizing the FBI. This is the same FBI that was going after Catholic churches saying they could be a domestic terrorist organization! They are the same people who targeted parents for going to school board meetings during COVID!" Mullin added.
Tapper interrupted, "Why would someone who looks eager to politicize the FBI be an answer to what you're talking about?! He has a list of people he called 'Government Gangsters' and a 'cabal of unelected tyrants?!'"
Mullin ended Tapper's whiny rant, "Kash has made it very clear, he wants to get them out of the political game that they've been playing for 8 years really. They did it under Hillary, and they did it underneath Biden!"
Watch MAGA Mullin DESTROY Tapper here.

# Delta CEO SHUTS DOWN woke CBS host when she tries blaming Trump for plane crashes
Delta Air Lines CEO Ed Bastian **[SHUT DOWN woke CBS host Gayle King](https://substack.com/redirect/87554b99-a059-48dc-804b-afd3ffa85757?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** for trying to blame President Trump for recent plane crashes.
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/87554b99-a059-48dc-804b-afd3ffa85757?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/87554b99-a059-48dc-804b-afd3ffa85757?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
"You know the Trump Administration recently fired many employees of the FAA administration. Do those cuts worry you and do you think that impacts the safety of air travel? I know you just said it's the safest way to travel but after looking at all these mishaps, a lot of people are very nervous. Do these cuts affect you?" King said.
"The cuts do not affect us, Gayle. I've been in close communication with the Secretary of Transportation. I understand that the cuts at this time are something that are raising questions, but the reality is, there's over 50,000 people that work at the FAA and the cuts, I understand, were 300 people and they were in non-critical safety functions. The Trump Administration has committed to investing deeply in terms of improving the overall technologies that are used in the air traffic control systems and modernizing the skies. | Peter, It’s been a sad and chaotic week in Washington – and it’s only getting worse by the day. What’s clear is this: The current state of our nation isn’t just hurting Virginia families and families across the country, it’s undermining the values that make our democracy strong. We are only a few weeks into this new administration, and already, the damage is piling up. Trump threatened to start a trade war with two of Virginia’s largest trading partners, Canada and Mexico. He’s allowed unelected billionaire Elon Musk access to classified information and given him full control to attempt to shut down USAID. And, he’s targeted federal employees who call Virginia home – nonpartisan public servants who have devoted their careers to protecting our communities and keeping Virginia safe. And throughout all the chaos, Virginia’s Republican leadership — our Governor, Lieutenant Governor, and Attorney General — has stood by Donald Trump no matter the cost. We need a Governor who will always stand up for Virginia and stand up for what’s right. I need your help to flip this Governor’s seat in November and build out a strong campaign. [Will you split a contribution between my campaign and Blue Amp Action help us send a strong message that Virginia is not going to accept chaos this November?](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc6fee406-13e5-42b9-9a9e-260125dbae49/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T59efdc71-3a78-43fd-9739-1047016674d0/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

### The power struggle between the unelected & incompetent South African billionaire vs unqualified & incompetent Trump appointees is becoming public
| | [Qasim Rashid, Esq.](https://substack.com/@qasimrashid)
---
| Feb 23
---

On Saturday, Trump and Musk escalated their reckless interference in federal operations by emailing all federal employees with an arbitrary Monday midnight deadline. The demand? That every worker report five things they accomplished this week and copy their manager. [See image of email below].
My sources inside the federal government tell me that they are asked to email [HR@opm.gov](https://substack.com/redirect/09a3fc13-6d6e-46c9-b412-5b68c96010ce?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). So, whatever you do, please _do NOT_ email HR@opm.gov with sarcastic nonsense to troll their incompetence. That would likely slow down this fascist regime and make them waste time sifting through fake emails. We cannot possibly risk making the Department of Government Efficiency ("DOGE") _less_ efficient. [sarcasm]
But once you're done _not_ sending a fake email to HR@opm.gov, also remember, this is not just bureaucratic foolishness; it's a coordinated power grab that devastates the rights and safety of the American people, and we cannot stand by and let it happen unchallenged. **Let 's Address This.**
**Quick Ask!** I am doing everything in my power to stave off fascism in the United States, and I need your support. **Subscribe and join more than 118,000 fellow activists.**
[ Upgrade to paid](https://substack..7cdLMYCrEp7pEwRSTI3RnOlcs3LDNW8w26RfI1kHwyk?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=157718051)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/7299c757-c2d9-4ac4-a298-762e9c3ec1c1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Bill Clark/CQ Roll Call via AP Images
## The Growing MAGA Civil War
This current fiasco began when the South African billionaire tweeted this bizarre tweet (yes in this house we still call it Twitter and tweets), threatening to fire anyone who doesn't respond to some forthcoming email.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/630daa5d-5787-4fb5-b662-e6b9f290f043?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Here's the email following Musk's tweet--who I remind you is not a government employee, was not elected to anything, and has no actual authority except what he purchased when he bought Trump the Presidency.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/691b9730-2537-4803-bdbd-d3155d24a69c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
There is so much deeply problematic with this email--most of all that it makes zero actual sense whatsoever.
* What is considered an accomplishment?
* Who are they reporting this to?
* What is the measure of whether a task is completed or not?
* How does this make government more efficient?
* On what authority is someone who is _not_ the direct supervisor of a given employee even asking these questions?
* On what grounds is failure to respond an automatic resignation?

The list of questions is endless. And the backlash is immediate. Federal institutions are already resisting and the battle over who actually runs the federal government is beginning. My contacts in the DOJ and FBI reported to me that their managers are outright canceling Musk's directive--making it clear that they do not answer to Musk. One DOJ employee shared with me in confidence:
> My manager immediately responded to us about Musk's email with a directive to not respond to him. Also, that was the second email from Musk. The first email from Musk originally went to the spam folder of every DOJ employee.
So, to be sure, the man in charge of "government efficiency" had to send _two_ pointless emails because he couldn't figure out how to send it correctly the first time. How comforting that a man who doesn't know how email works has unfettered access to every bit of sensitive data on government file.
Then there's Kash Patel, Trump's handpicked FBI Director, who sent an agency-wide rebuke to Musk, saying, _"The FBI is in charge of all our review processes ...When and if further information is required, we will coordinate the responses."_
Translation: We are not playing Musk's game.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/0b48aea7-2120-4e62-ab7a-af2fe833e1d7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
The question now is this: Who will Trump listen to? His own unqualified but actually appointed representatives in the Federal government, or his own unqualified and unelected owner, Elon Musk? Who he decides to support in this MAGA civil war will navigate the direction of the federal government, and therefore our entire nation, for a generation or more.
But as we watch this civil war play out, two things are for sure. The American people will suffer the most, and Republicans are once again proving their incompetence.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..7cdLMYCrEp7pEwRSTI3RnOlcs3LDNW8w26RfI1kHwyk?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=157718051)
## Republicans Prove Their Own Incompetence
There's a saying: _Republicans claim government doesn 't work, then they get elected and prove it._
Consider the mess they've already created just through MUSK's "DOGE" Team:
* DOGE demanded Federal employees _snitch_ on their co-workers who are "engaging in DEI," or face consequences themselves if they don't snitch.
* DOGE hired a white supremacist who condemns 'race mixing' and wants segregation reinforced. He was outed and quit, and then Musk rehired him despite knowing he's a white supremacist.
* DOGE hired a wholly unqualified candidate who had been fired from a previous job for leaking confidential information, and then proceeded to give this person access to our confidential social security information.
* DOGE fired nuclear experts, then scrambled to rehire them after realizing nuclear experts are a tad bit important to ensuring we don't mishandle nuclear weapons.
* DOGE fired IRS experts, panicked because they forgot it is tax season, and thus tried to rehire them--only to realize they had canceled their IRS addresses and had no way to contact them because they didn't have their personal addresses.
* DOGE gutted numerous federal agencies and pushed out career experts--a list much too long for one article--and ensured a brain drain that will further cripple government functions.
* And now DOGE is forcing people to report their work to some anonymous entity, or else, creating major opposition from Trump's own handpicked appointees.

All of this means the American people suffer the most. It is no accident that 9 of the top 10 states that rely most on Federal welfare, have the highest poverty rates, have the highest per capita gun deaths, have the highest rates of infant and maternal mortality, and have the lowest life expectancies, are all GOP run states. The Trump MAGA movement now seeks to impose those failed policies on the Federal level.
But moreover and to be clear, it would be a mistake to assume this is incompetence _alone_. While incompetence certainly plays a big part, the broader goal is to manufacture dysfunction in the federal government, then use that dysfunction as an excuse to gut agencies and further dismantle public services. This is the same playbook they always use:
1. Create chaos by dividing people in and out of government
2. Blame "big government" for the very problems they engineered
3. Destroy the very agencies designed to protect the American people (e.g. the CFPB, the CDC, the NIH, the SEC, and more)
4. Install oligarchs to privatize industries that should not be privatized, then centralize profit, power, and control beyond the next election

This is the autocrat's playbook, and Trump is following it verbatim.
Speaking of, does Trump have to respond to Musk's "efficiency" email too? Because according to https://trumpgolftrack.com, Trump has already spent more than 27% of his Presidency golfing. When will the so-called "Department of Government _Efficiency " _recognize that likely the most inefficient person in the Federal government right now is Trump himself? But then again, hypocrisy is Donald Trump's middle name.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/b92e9263-9c25-41a2-a07b-3eebcda121fa?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Source: https://trumpgolftrack.com/
[Give a gift subscription](https://substack..7cdLMYCrEp7pEwRSTI3RnOlcs3LDNW8w26RfI1kHwyk?&gift=true)
## Conclusion
I will keep pointing out this fact because we can never forget that Musk is not an elected official and has no expertise in governance--except when it comes to extracting tens of billions in taxpayer money for his private ventures. He should not be making demands of public employees. And yet, too many elected officials continue to bow to him rather than serve the American people.
We need to demand that our representatives stop capitulating to an unelected, unqualified, incompetent oligarch, and instead focus on protecting democracy, upholding expertise, and ensuring that government functions for the people. Please continue to [call your federally elected officials](https://substack.com/redirect/78a0f16f-a99e-417b-ab34-be3a34488ab7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and demand they stop this madness. And please do not make the mistake of only calling your Democrat electeds--be sure to call your Republican members of Congress as well. Let them hear your voice and feel your anger at their capitulation to a corrupt oligarch, rather than their service to the American people.
As a human rights lawyer, I will continue to document and call out these injustices, and I need your support to do so. Stay engaged, stay informed, subscribe, share this content, and let's fight back--together.
**Before you go!** I am doing everything in my power to stave off fascism under this new administration. I cannot do it alone. **Subscribe below and join the movement.**

clean_body: The power struggle between the unelected & incompetent South African billionaire vs unqualified & incompetent Trump appointees is becoming public | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more ? Thank you for being an awesome subscriber! When possible, I hope you'll consider upgrading to a $6/mo or $50/year subscription! The power struggle between the unelected & incompetent South African billionaire vs unqualified & incompetent Trump appointees is becoming public | | | Feb 23 | | | | | | | | | | | | On Saturday, Trump and Musk escalated their reckless interference in federal operations by emailing all federal employees with an arbitrary Monday midnight deadline. The demand? That every worker report five things they accomplished this week and copy their manager. [See image of email below]. My sources inside the federal government tell me that they are asked to email . So, whatever you do, please do NOT email HR@opm.gov with sarcastic nonsense to troll their incompetence. That would likely slow down this fascist regime and make them waste time sifting through fake emails. We cannot possibly risk making the Department of Government Efficiency ("DOGE") less efficient. [sarcasm] But once you're done not sending a fake email to HR@opm.gov, also remember, this is not just bureaucratic foolishness; it's a coordinated power grab that devastates the rights and safety of the American people, and we cannot stand by and let it happen unchallenged. Let 's Address This. Quick Ask! I am doing everything in my power to stave off fascism in the United States, and I need your support. Subscribe and join more than 118,000 fellow activists. | | ---|---|--- Bill Clark/CQ Roll Call via AP Images The Growing MAGA Civil War This current fiasco began when the South African billionaire tweeted this bizarre tweet (yes in this house we still call it Twitter and tweets), threatening to fire anyone who doesn't respond to some forthcoming email. | | ---|---|--- Here's the email following Musk's tweet--who I remind you is not a government employee, was not elected to anything, and has no actual authority except what he purchased when he bought Trump the Presidency. | | ---|---|--- There is so much deeply problematic with this email--most of all that it makes zero actual sense whatsoever. What is considered an accomplishment? Who are they reporting this to? What is the measure of whether a task is completed or not? How does this make government more efficient? On what authority is someone who is not the direct supervisor of a given employee even asking these questions? On what grounds is failure to respond an automatic resignation? The list of questions is endless. And the backlash is immediate. Federal institutions are already resisting and the battle over who actually runs the federal government is beginning. My contacts in the DOJ and FBI reported to me that their managers are outright canceling Musk's directive--making it clear that they do not answer to Musk. One DOJ employee shared with me in confidence: My manager immediately responded to us about Musk's email with a directive to not respond to him. Also, that was the second email from Musk. The first email from Musk originally went to the spam folder of every DOJ employee. So, to be sure, the man in charge of "government efficiency" had to send two pointless emails because he couldn't figure out how to send it correctly the first time. How comforting that a man who doesn't know how email works has unfettered access to every bit of sensitive data on government file. Then there's Kash Patel, Trump's handpicked FBI Director, who sent an agency-wide rebuke to Musk, saying, "The FBI is in charge of all our review processes ...When and if further information is required, we will coordinate the responses." Translation: We are not playing Musk's game. | | ---|---|--- The question now is this: Who will Trump listen to? His own unqualified but actually appointed representatives in the Federal government, or his own unqualified and unelected owner, Elon Musk? Who he decides to support in this MAGA civil war will navigate the direction of the federal government, and therefore our entire nation, for a generation or more. But as we watch this civil war play out, two things are for sure. The American people will suffer the most, and Republicans are once again proving their incompetence. Republicans Prove Their Own Incompetence There's a saying: Republicans claim government doesn 't work, then they get elected and prove it. Consider the mess they've already created just through MUSK's "DOGE" Team: DOGE demanded Federal employees snitch on their co-workers who are "engaging in DEI," or face consequences themselves if they don't snitch. DOGE hired a white supremacist who condemns 'race mixing' and wants segregation reinforced. He was outed and quit, and then Musk rehired him despite knowing he's a white supremacist. DOGE hired a wholly unqualified candidate who had been fired from a previous job for leaking confidential information, and then proceeded to give this person access to our confidential social security information. DOGE fired nuclear experts, then scrambled to rehire them after realizing nuclear experts are a tad bit important to ensuring we don't mishandle nuclear weapons. DOGE fired IRS experts, panicked because they forgot it is tax season, and thus tried to rehire them--only to realize they had canceled their IRS addresses and had no way to contact them because they didn't have their personal addresses. DOGE gutted numerous federal agencies and pushed out career experts--a list much too long for one article--and ensured a brain drain that will further cripple government functions. And now DOGE is forcing people to report their work to some anonymous entity, or else, creating major opposition from Trump's own handpicked appointees. All of this means the American people suffer the most. It is no accident that 9 of the top 10 states that rely most on Federal welfare, have the highest poverty rates, have the highest per capita gun deaths, have the highest rates of infant and maternal mortality, and have the lowest life expectancies, are all GOP run states. The Trump MAGA movement now seeks to impose those failed policies on the Federal level. But moreover and to be clear, it would be a mistake to assume this is incompetence alone. While incompetence certainly plays a big part, the broader goal is to manufacture dysfunction in the federal government, then use that dysfunction as an excuse to gut agencies and further dismantle public services. This is the same playbook they always use: 1. Create chaos by dividing people in and out of government 2. Blame "big government" for the very problems they engineered 3. Destroy the very agencies designed to protect the American people (e.g. the CFPB, the CDC, the NIH, the SEC, and more) 4. Install oligarchs to privatize industries that should not be privatized, then centralize profit, power, and control beyond the next election This is the autocrat's playbook, and Trump is following it verbatim. Speaking of, does Trump have to respond to Musk's "efficiency" email too? Because according to , Trump has already spent more than 27% of his Presidency golfing. When will the so-called "Department of Government Efficiency " recognize that likely the most inefficient person in the Federal government right now is Trump himself? But then again, hypocrisy is Donald Trump's middle name. | | ---|---|--- Source: Conclusion I will keep pointing out this fact because we can never forget that Musk is not an elected official and has no expertise in governance--except when it comes to extracting tens of billions in taxpayer money for his private ventures. clean_body: Do you approve of Donald Trump’s Cabinet picks? Take a moment fill out our official Presidential Cabinet Approval Poll and let us know → George Latimer is a lifelong Westchester resident who has built a career in public service by delivering unparalleled progressive results for local residents. Now, he's taking that work to the next level by serving as your Congressman, representing New York's 16th District. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | Peter, Since Donald Trump was inaugurated, we’ve witnessed a flurry of unqualified, questionable individuals join the ranks of Trump’s Presidential Cabinet. He’s brought forward a slate of billionaires, media hosts, and blatantly inexperienced MAGA loyalists to implement his Project 2025 agenda — and we’re already experiencing the dangerous repercussions as they do just that. | Just last week, we watched as RFK Jr., a notorious vaccine denier and rampant spreader of misinformation, was confirmed by Senate Republicans to run the Department of Health and Human Services. To us, there’s no question about it: Donald Trump is determined to appoint staunch MAGA loyalists, rather than qualified, educated individuals, to run the federal government — and it’s unacceptable. — Latimer HQ * | | ---|--- = For over three decades, George Latimer has been a champion for progressive policies and leaders, helping lead the effort to make Westchester, a formerly solid Republican County, into a blue firewall that has withstood multiple red waves in recent years. George’s unparalleled track record in advancing Democratic goals includes successfully cutting regressive taxes, fighting for civil rights and racial equality, defending a woman’s right to choose, standing up to the NRA to keep guns off our streets, and voting for marriage equality. | = = Paid for by George Latimer for Congress George Latimer for Congress PO Box 789 White Plains, NY 10602 United States If you would like to unsubscribe, click here: You can also =.

Rep. Jeffries is working tirelessly to hold Trump, Elon Musk, and all of their MAGA buddies accountable, and we couldn’t be more grateful. ---
TO: Minority Leader Hakeem Jeffries
FROM: A proud Democrat
Subject: We’re so grateful for your leadership! **_Dear Rep. Jeffries – you make me proud to be a Democrat._**

Republicans’ already slim majority is SHRINKING as Trump picks more MAGA members to serve in his cabinet — meaning we can flip the House THIS YEAR!

As the GOP tries to take a blowtorch to Social Security, Medicare, reproductive rights, and more, I know we can stop them with you leading the way.

**Your strength gives me hope that Democrats can win critical special elections, put a MASSIVE check on Donald Trump’s power, and make you our next SPEAKER!**

[**So today I’m signing this card and chipping in $3 to the Voter Protection Project to show my appreciation for all your hard work and to help Democrats flip the seats we need to WIN »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/87010?t=9&akid=18993%2E878179%2Ebp59xC) [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/87010?t=10&akid=18993%2E878179%2Ebp59xC) | [**Donate $3 to sign now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/87010?t=11&akid=18993%2E878179%2Ebp59xC)

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=18993%2E878179%2Ebp59xC). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=18993%2E878179%2Ebp59xC).**

And the consequences have been catastrophic:

He has managed to wreak havoc on our government in less than a month.

name: Katie Hobbs
subject: Republicans have named me one of their top targets
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
#

Hey friend, it’s Mark Kelly. My friend Katie Hobbs is running for Governor in Arizona and needs our help. I hope you’ll read the message below from her, and [**rush a split donation between Katie's campaign and mine.**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-hobbs.0syrPb&refcode=em250223-1-90&t=1&akid=5975%2E6688874%2Eymw-Eu)

name: Extreme Cruelty
subject: Trump's “Migrant Deportation ASMR”
body:
| |
---
ASMR refers to calming sounds that trigger pleasant sensations. What Trump released was more akin to a snuff film. | [View in browser](https://yqlzye.clicks.mlsend.com/tl/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEwODE2MzUsXCJsXCI6MTQ3MTQ0Nzg5NzUwNDQ5NDUzLFwiclwiOjE0NzE0NTA4MjI3Mzc5MzU3OH0iLCJzIjoiNWFkODU2MTdlOTZjZGE0NiJ9)
| |

| [ ](https://yqlzye.clicks.mlsend.com/tl/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEwODE2MzUsXCJsXCI6MTQ3MTQ0Nzg5NzU0NjQzNzU4LFwiclwiOjE0NzE0NTA4MjI3Mzc5MzU3OH0iLCJzIjoiNzM5ZGUxZDVhMDI4NzE0NCJ9)
---
|
---
Team,

ASMR refers to calming sounds that trigger pleasant sensations.

Over the past few years the genre of ASMR videos has exploded with content creators taking their own creative spins on the subtle sounds that induce feelings of ASMR, releasing videos with titles like:**_

KING CRAB SEAFOOD BOIL | ASMR EATING

ASMR Finger Nail Tapping for the BEST Sleep long nails, no talking

Relaxing distant ASMR Race Car Sounds_**

This week, Donald Trump’s White House released a cruel spin on this lighthearted genre, with a video (more akin to a snuff film) titled, “ASMR: Illegal Alien Deportation Flight.”

|
---
| [ ](https://yqlzye.clicks.mlsend.com/tl/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEwODE2MzUsXCJsXCI6MTQ3MTQ0Nzg5NzU4ODM4MDY0LFwiclwiOjE0NzE0NTA4MjI3Mzc5MzU3OH0iLCJzIjoiNWFjM2U4ZDJhYjhlMTNiNSJ9)
---
|
---
In Trump’s ASMR, the silly taps of nails on a venti Starbucks lid are replaced with **_the clinking of prison shackles_**. Subtle whispers are replaced with **_the whir of the deportation plane engines_**. And the sounds of careful paper tearing are instead **_the muffled footsteps of a deportee_** whose entire life has been uprooted.

It was an incredibly disturbing watch, but also a reminder of who we are up against and the duty that now falls upon us to _silence the sound of these prison chains with action_ , to do everything in our power to stop the cruel machinery behind this suffering.

Given that there are 217 Republicans and 216 Democrats in the House of Representatives, I am doing my part to gum up the works by running in the Florida Special Election as the _Democratic nominee_ \- if I win, **I deadlock the House and paralyze the MAGA agenda**.
|
---
[This race is our last chance until the 2026 midterms to stop the passage of this unimaginable cruelty through Congress. We have less than 40 days until Election Day - will you stand with us and make a donation of whatever you can spare to help us put an end to this?](https://yqlzye.clicks.mlsend.com/tl/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEwODE2MzUsXCJsXCI6MTQ3MTQ0Nzg5NzYxOTgzNzkzLFwiclwiOjE0NzE0NTA4MjI3Mzc5MzU3OH0iLCJzIjoiOWMzYTkyZGZhMGE3ZTQ2MiJ9)

What Trump released was more akin to a snuff film. | | | | | Team, ASMR refers to calming sounds that trigger pleasant sensations. Over the past few years the genre of ASMR videos has exploded with content creators taking their own creative spins on the subtle sounds that induce feelings of ASMR, releasing videos with titles like: KING CRAB SEAFOOD BOIL | ASMR EATING ASMR Finger Nail Tapping for the BEST Sleep long nails, no talking Relaxing distant ASMR Race Car Sounds This week, Donald Trump’s White House released a cruel spin on this lighthearted genre, with a video (more akin to a snuff film) titled, “ASMR: Illegal Alien Deportation Flight.” | | | In Trump’s ASMR, the silly taps of nails on a venti Starbucks lid are replaced with the clinking of prison shackles. Subtle whispers are replaced with the whir of the deportation plane engines. And the sounds of careful paper tearing are instead the muffled footsteps of a deportee whose entire life has been uprooted. It was an incredibly disturbing watch, but also a reminder of who we are up against and the duty that now falls upon us to silence the sound of these prison chains with action , to do everything in our power to stop the cruel machinery behind this suffering. Given that there are 217 Republicans and 216 Democrats in the House of Representatives, I am doing my part to gum up the works by running in the Florida Special Election as the Democratic nominee \- if I win, I deadlock the House and paralyze the MAGA agenda. | | | | | | Together we can send a resounding message that this inhumanity is not acceptable. Josh Weil Democratic Nominee FL-06 | | | | | | | | | Mail Checks to : Josh Weil for Congress PO Box 350345 Palm Coast, FL 32135 | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- Josh Weil for Congress PO Box 350345 Palm Coast, FL 32135 | |
