name: Rebecca Weber
subject: It’s not rocket-science
body:
| |
---
| | It isn’t rocket-science. It’s basic math.
---
| |
---
[](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=f74cfc32f62e4996add1e1817de80f97&_e=BVgC1I1CYyghO0-0aLRBXunVghae2uFMA4AzzcH7CXbSVx0pEB4cZfZez8IcMutX8FdBqRAgobcbh0Hw0LFkk49aG3WyhL1qs1KZ7XoBqa3iZ_O2FES7UfbIUaMPzfbR3sglLmlZYxBI6ZBnKtpxzs44oFeeCWXP-6-gkoZ4oZ1M5nym0MlNDMvRBfsPyZFaFoowrcu85MTi_t81Pp_XrRNfk-vOlzTmUgOy5u9aJOUUUeZuTZAnM2M_fgyyrBWbAlY_L99s5Pjgs1OmPZ6aIPAsOVZfMwppHJVUAwdgpCHRcIpyJptWexIhfTNptcANTrFprt5XnGntaP0OsGE8HfQgF-tRdNW4hE4GBdbfDHs%3D)
---
| | **“****A disproportionate number of illegal immigrants go to blue states, they amplify the effect of a blue state vote. My understanding is that Democrats would lose approximately 20 seats in the house if illegals were not counted in census. And that’s also 20 less electoral votes for president.**** ** **So, illegals absolutely do impact who controls the House and the presidency.”****~** Elon Musk
---
| | Fellow Conservative,Elon Musk is right. It isn’t rocket-science. It’s basic math. It’s also a ticking time-bomb set by Joe Biden and Kamala Harris – in the form of 11.5 million illegals entering our country on their watch – one which will explode shortly after President Trump leaves office in 2029.While you and I have no doubt President Trump will deliver on his promise to secure the border, this threat will not go away. The truth is, without immediate action, these illegal aliens will be counted in the U.S. Census, which determines both the apportionment of seats in the House of Representatives _and_ the number of electoral votes given to each state. Whether they came because, four years ago, Kamala Harris and Joe Biden prompted them to “surge to the border” for asylum or because of blue-states offering sanctuary status, “free” health care, “free” cell phones, “free” housing, and “free” college...it doesn’t matter. The result is the same.Your vote is _already_ being **watered down** in Congress. Your vote is _already_ being **watered down** in the Electoral College.And every day reports are popping up of non-citizens, illegal aliens, and convicted felons being registered to vote in cities and entire swing-states across the country, which means your vote may be fully **canceled out in future elections**. **_American elections should be decided by American citizens._****[If you agree then please sign your “BAN NON-CITIZEN VOTING” Petition to Amend the U.S. Constitution so the chaos we’re seeing now _never_ happens again in America.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=f74cfc32f62e4996add1e1817de80f97&_e=BVgC1I1CYyghO0-0aLRBXunVghae2uFMA4AzzcH7CXbSVx0pEB4cZfZez8IcMutX8FdBqRAgobcbh0Hw0LFkk49aG3WyhL1qs1KZ7XoBqa3iZ_O2FES7UfbIUaMPzfbR3sglLmlZYxBI6ZBnKtpxzs44oFeeCWXP-6-gkoZ4oZ1M5nym0MlNDMvRBfsPyZFaFoowrcu85MTi_t81Pp_XrbOjlL4ip4kHdrh39KjS8gdbPt_C4OEuvhOpkPfCiyILsKexmxTduQr31kx3eiBhWaHjtYIoQFnBNAybDCgiLoYe9oVqpas4hYsJEtf54cLkIHk0s6FeMP7JyXVXhYHciagtUglfCCGaJFlafInzPrY%3D)**Because, here’s the scary part:The last census took place in 2020. That was _before_ the 11.5 million illegal aliens who invaded our country under Joe Biden and Kamala Harris. To put it in context, there are only 8 states in America with a population over 11 million. So, it’s as if the radical Left just imported the 9th largest state in America. That’s more than North Carolina (10.8 million), Michigan (10 million), New Jersey (9.2 million), or Virginia (8.7 million).You get the picture. That’s why urgent action is needed to pass a Constitutional Amendment to ban illegal aliens from voting and from being counted for purposes of congressional and electoral vote apportionment. The next census in less than 6 years away. If those 11.5 million illegal aliens are counted in the census or are allowed to vote in the intervening years, you and I simply won’t have a country. **[It’s vitally important that your representatives in Washington and in your state legislature hear this demand directly from you.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=f74cfc32f62e4996add1e1817de80f97&_e=BVgC1I1CYyghO0-0aLRBXunVghae2uFMA4AzzcH7CXbSVx0pEB4cZfZez8IcMutX8FdBqRAgobcbh0Hw0LFkk49aG3WyhL1qs1KZ7XoBqa3iZ_O2FES7UfbIUaMPzfbR3sglLmlZYxBI6ZBnKtpxzs44oFeeCWXP-6-gkoZ4oZ1M5nym0MlNDMvRBfsPyZFaFoowrcu85MTi_t81Pp_XrU5CHXXQjLmEldpkyN7UZMNW8UL0ymoDW4ynLUhOEyPtVVw2qvnHz2WFX5N2hAqlIF-kb14LtknYs0NZsNHnSgJcjzUrqPS8P8G2B9wPigMOfYGhlXZ3JHSLNM2hN0fG0P33eOsxjZWW118CGrDwdaY%3D)** Because, quite honestly, they think they can pull a fast one on you. They think you and I will be so relieved to see the border secure again and criminal illegal aliens deported, that you and I will be oblivious to this threat lying dormant under our very eyes.No way.My name is Rebecca Weber. I’m the chairwoman of AMAC Action. **AMAC Action is the most influential advocacy group in the country when it comes to standing for the values of conservative Seniors.****We’ve got 72 chapters and 300 volunteer delegates, who are the “feet on the street” advocates who contact Members of Congress and state legislators in their district offices.** **Moreover, our chapters and delegates help organize Town Hall meetings with elected officials and candidates to enable those locally of our 2,000,000 AMAC members to meet, hear, and question them.****And you should also know that we now have more than 337,000 AMAC members who respond to our “calls-to-action” and weigh in with members of the** **U.S. House and Senate, as well as their state legislators on the issues.** Quite simply, when we speak, Washington listens. [](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=f74cfc32f62e4996add1e1817de80f97&_e=BVgC1I1CYyghO0-0aLRBXunVghae2uFMA4AzzcH7CXbDx_fk-XV0FiE8R7o0mLrnkXfT1stZbQTQLJ57lUK_QNiyIErav60zhqM3wSl-EUrrXj3PRQTkZ2D1uj8fE-BCedqfYNWzSl8b9mNYRFo_Kt9j70UtEreCk6dqr0LY2oT_woW8LzwTHS6n9hHuquUBZJBjspgRwNxOahGosXp8UxmdJ1WTrsbULcgWZQvKT88%3D)**[And AMAC Action needs your help today in this do-or-die battle to pass a Constitutional Amendment to protect your vote from being canceled out by an illegal alien or a convicted felon.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=f74cfc32f62e4996add1e1817de80f97&_e=BVgC1I1CYyghO0-0aLRBXunVghae2uFMA4AzzcH7CXbSVx0pEB4cZfZez8IcMutX8FdBqRAgobcbh0Hw0LFkk49aG3WyhL1qs1KZ7XoBqa3iZ_O2FES7UfbIUaMPzfbR3sglLmlZYxBI6ZBnKtpxzs44oFeeCWXP-6-gkoZ4oZ1M5nym0MlNDMvRBfsPyZFaFoowrcu85MTi_t81Pp_Xrb2TB5dbBks74Re9Pm2mJTexndn5Uz8fJKUPKw0NDZFBcE0L6bcfWuUqzPW0EDabE6wIXvnRhYPhhbF8TzF6pcFxzBbDkDKo-a5sz_UIgu4JEQDW7VPwsOJxHfBiLNQ7QP1lGoT_fjQrtQ_P0vCBbuk%3D)** But I can’t do it without you. **No matter what issue you care about the most, if you and I don’t have a secure,_honest_ elections... none of it matters.**Inflation. Illegal immigration. Violent Crime. Drug use. Homelessness. The 2nd Amendment. Out of control spending. Social Security and Medicare insolvency. Right to Life. Indoctrination in our schools. Endless foreign wars. You name it. **[So please follow this link to sign your “BAN NON-CITIZEN VOTING” Petition to Amend the U.S. Constitution](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=f74cfc32f62e4996add1e1817de80f97&_e=BVgC1I1CYyghO0-0aLRBXunVghae2uFMA4AzzcH7CXbSVx0pEB4cZfZez8IcMutX8FdBqRAgobcbh0Hw0LFkk49aG3WyhL1qs1KZ7XoBqa3iZ_O2FES7UfbIUaMPzfbR3sglLmlZYxBI6ZBnKtpxzs44oFeeCWXP-6-gkoZ4oZ1M5nym0MlNDMvRBfsPyZFaFoowrcu85MTi_t81Pp_XrYxXGD40K4qkJJCNUzlFgAFuQQyNJP2xv_YZoCe0CoEMil1w2OC0gW6VpOL9k2zoF-Lut9uvyYzIVMhJRtrr3GFE3YU-N5QM2Zv9p-WBQIG2p6PkIxp-jXhISo0kf1ALQNyOBE1KLJgw5v7ivyXUO7s%3D)** so that AMAC Action can put your representatives in Washington and in the state legislature on notice with a simple demand: Namely, that you will not tolerate this erosion of your vote.Now, here’s the bad news:Most state constitutions grant voting rights to “every” citizen, open-ended language that liberal activists argue permits localities to authorize non-citizen and even illegal alien voting. States should amend their constitutions to instead permit “only” citizens to vote. But there’s good news, too:Seven states have _expressly_ banned non-citizen voting already: Alabama, Arizona, Colorado, Florida, Louisiana, North Dakota, and Ohio.**What’s more, voters approve of constitutional amendments to ban non-citizen voting by overwhelming margins. Nearly 77% of Ohio voters approved a measure in 2022, while nearly 63% of Colorado voters approved one in 2020.** This is a solution whose time has come. You and I can do this. **[That’s why, when you’ve signed your “BAN NON-CITIZEN VOTING” Petition to Amend the U.S. Constitution](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=f74cfc32f62e4996add1e1817de80f97&_e=BVgC1I1CYyghO0-0aLRBXunVghae2uFMA4AzzcH7CXbSVx0pEB4cZfZez8IcMutX8FdBqRAgobcbh0Hw0LFkk49aG3WyhL1qs1KZ7XoBqa3iZ_O2FES7UfbIUaMPzfbR3sglLmlZYxBI6ZBnKtpxzs44oFeeCWXP-6-gkoZ4oZ1M5nym0MlNDMvRBfsPyZFaFoowrcu85MTi_t81Pp_XrYVbBrYeuRgMhZTRorkDZG_fv6kmlpkUbXIgV-uNOQGsHYE2g2pVjx62mP0VVtW5EVFHf-mvjlnhmDT6k2nvV91TwKKdHALwx9TkhNAUbccTdACv7C3A-d-x1Y0L6ynHxPev11tbcT3-DLg81dVxlJ4%3D), I'm also asking you to make a one-time contribution of $35 to give AMAC Action the resources to send out, collect, process, and tabulate millions of petitions.** The reality is, we don’t get a dime of taxpayer funding. Our funding comes from grassroots conservatives like you who care deeply about the future of America. This is important. _It means we can’t be bought._ On the other hand, the leftwing election fraud machine is funded by leftwing billionaires like Mark Zuckerberg and George Soros who are actively funneling _billions_ to dark money “non-profit” groups to “**reshape** ” our elections and our electorate.With that said, if you’re able to make a larger contribution – say $50, $75, $125, $250, $500, or even $1,000 – it would really be a life saver. Please hurry. In order to secure your vote in all future elections – and with 11.5 million illegals chomping to be included in the next census – **[your “BAN NON-CITIZEN VOTING” Petition to Amend the U.S. Constitution is vitally important.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=f74cfc32f62e4996add1e1817de80f97&_e=BVgC1I1CYyghO0-0aLRBXunVghae2uFMA4AzzcH7CXbSVx0pEB4cZfZez8IcMutX8FdBqRAgobcbh0Hw0LFkk49aG3WyhL1qs1KZ7XoBqa3iZ_O2FES7UfbIUaMPzfbR3sglLmlZYxBI6ZBnKtpxzs44oFeeCWXP-6-gkoZ4oZ1M5nym0MlNDMvRBfsPyZFaFoowrcu85MTi_t81Pp_XrXnWd4nV4Q1EfyoaITxVxbP75fljhXXNp2py_Lr1U2QS7siHLLlqpTyEncyifIGoEuTgQJu4DRcv8rL95Z4ubs6sXDJmpwSIChLPSv2J7C8joXOpHBeXveNwojTn2pIxXVYXSwCVRwGJIr1ITmJpmw0%3D)** Yes, this is about saving your vote from being canceled. It’s also about saving America.And it all starts with the straightforward premise that non-citizens and illegal aliens – no matter how many Kamala Harris and Joe Biden imported on their watch – should be banned from voting _and_ banned from being counted for apportioning congressional seats and electoral votes. Thank you in advance for joining the fight to secure your vote
---
[ **SIGN THE PETITION**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=f74cfc32f62e4996add1e1817de80f97&_e=BVgC1I1CYyghO0-0aLRBXunVghae2uFMA4AzzcH7CXbSVx0pEB4cZfZez8IcMutX8FdBqRAgobcbh0Hw0LFkk49aG3WyhL1qs1KZ7XoBqa3iZ_O2FES7UfbIUaMPzfbR3sglLmlZYxBI6ZBnKtpxzs44oFeeCWXP-6-gkoZ4oZ1M5nym0MlNDMvRBfsPyZFaFoowrcu85MTi_t81Pp_XrWKA7KSxAf2u5U4dbdRVNsXOTaZp9MrkMzObr4Eg8QI_7aXU1Ban1t9gb7WQbycaqtAP9Sul710YtUMWCDl2ul-zakm-FC-tQZZ_ESjFy1bCoBG-KfXCJLEY3rm9fX4oiMtb_SEzjV8DAtoyqSINf6s%3D)

clean_body: | | | | It isn’t rocket-science. It’s basic math. | | | | “A disproportionate number of illegal immigrants go to blue states, they amplify the effect of a blue state vote. My understanding is that Democrats would lose approximately 20 seats in the house if illegals were not counted in census. And that’s also 20 less electoral votes for president. So, illegals absolutely do impact who controls the House and the presidency.”~ Elon Musk | | Fellow Conservative,Elon Musk is right. It isn’t rocket-science. It’s basic math. It’s also a ticking time-bomb set by Joe Biden and Kamala Harris – in the form of 11.5 million illegals entering our country on their watch – one which will explode shortly after President Trump leaves office in 2029.While you and I have no doubt President Trump will deliver on his promise to secure the border, this threat will not go away. The truth is, without immediate action, these illegal aliens will be counted in the U.S. Census, which determines both the apportionment of seats in the House of Representatives and the number of electoral votes given to each state. Whether they came because, four years ago, Kamala Harris and Joe Biden prompted them to “surge to the border” for asylum or because of blue-states offering sanctuary status, “free” health care, “free” cell phones, “free” housing, and “free” college...it doesn’t matter. The result is the same.Your vote is already being watered down in Congress. Your vote is already being watered down in the Electoral College.And every day reports are popping up of non-citizens, illegal aliens, and convicted felons being registered to vote in cities and entire swing-states across the country, which means your vote may be fully canceled out in future elections. American elections should be decided by American citizens., here’s the scary part:The last census took place in 2020. That was before the 11.5 million illegal aliens who invaded our country under Joe Biden and Kamala Harris. To put it in context, there are only 8 states in America with a population over 11 million. So, it’s as if the radical Left just imported the 9th largest state in America. That’s more than North Carolina (10.8 million), Michigan (10 million), New Jersey (9.2 million), or Virginia (8.7 million).You get the picture. That’s why urgent action is needed to pass a Constitutional Amendment to ban illegal aliens from voting and from being counted for purposes of congressional and electoral vote apportionment. The next census in less than 6 years away. If those 11.5 million illegal aliens are counted in the census or are allowed to vote in the intervening years, you and I simply won’t have a country. Because, quite honestly, they think they can pull a fast one on you. They think you and I will be so relieved to see the border secure again and criminal illegal aliens deported, that you and I will be oblivious to this threat lying dormant under our very eyes.No way.My name is Rebecca Weber. I’m the chairwoman of AMAC Action. AMAC Action is the most influential advocacy group in the country when it comes to standing for the values of conservative Seniors.We’ve got 72 chapters and 300 volunteer delegates, who are the “feet on the street” advocates who contact Members of Congress and state legislators in their district offices. Moreover, our chapters and delegates help organize Town Hall meetings with elected officials and candidates to enable those locally of our 2,000,000 AMAC members to meet, hear, and question them.And you should also know that we now have more than 337,000 AMAC members who respond to our “calls-to-action” and weigh in with members of the U.S. House and Senate, as well as their state legislators on the issues. Quite simply, when we speak, Washington listens. But I can’t do it without you. No matter what issue you care about the most, if you and I don’t have a secure,honest elections... none of it matters.Inflation. Illegal immigration. Violent Crime. Drug use. Homelessness. The 2nd Amendment. Out of control spending. Social Security and Medicare insolvency. Right to Life. Indoctrination in our schools. Endless foreign wars. You name it. so that AMAC Action can put your representatives in Washington and in the state legislature on notice with a simple demand: Namely, that you will not tolerate this erosion of your vote.Now, here’s the bad news:Most state constitutions grant voting rights to “every” citizen, open-ended language that liberal activists argue permits localities to authorize non-citizen and even illegal alien voting. States should amend their constitutions to instead permit “only” citizens to vote. But there’s good news, too:Seven states have expressly banned non-citizen voting already: Alabama, Arizona, Colorado, Florida, Louisiana, North Dakota, and Ohio.What’s more, voters approve of constitutional amendments to ban non-citizen voting by overwhelming margins. Nearly 77% of Ohio voters approved a measure in 2022, while nearly 63% of Colorado voters approved one in 2020. This is a solution whose time has come. You and I can do this. , I'm also asking you to make a one-time contribution of $35 to give AMAC Action the resources to send out, collect, process, and tabulate millions of petitions. The reality is, we don’t get a dime of taxpayer funding. Our funding comes from grassroots conservatives like you who care deeply about the future of America. This is important. It means we can’t be bought. On the other hand, the leftwing election fraud machine is funded by leftwing billionaires like Mark Zuckerberg and George Soros who are actively funneling billions to dark money “non-profit” groups to “reshape ” our elections and our electorate.With that said, if you’re able to make a larger contribution – say $50, $75, $125, $250, $500, or even $1,000 – it would really be a life saver. Please hurry. In order to secure your vote in all future elections – and with 11.5 million illegals chomping to be included in the next census – Yes, this is about saving your vote from being canceled. It’s also about saving America.And it all starts with the straightforward premise that non-citizens and illegal aliens – no matter how many Kamala Harris and Joe Biden imported on their watch – should be banned from voting and banned from being counted for apportioning congressional seats and electoral votes. Thank you in advance for joining the fight to secure your vote | | For Freedom, Rebecca Weber,ChairwomanAMAC Action | | | P.S. American elections should be decided by American citizens. name: David Hogg
subject: A 20-point shift
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
We need to show young people that we give a damn.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20250223-1&t=1&akid=1771%2E587540%2EgDceuS)
Peter,
We saw a 20-point shift to the right among young people in the last election.
If Democrats want to win back younger voters, **we have to show them that we give a damn about them, that we support them, and that we invest in them.**
We need to build a Democratic Party that is authentic, relatable, earns young people's trust, and **_wins again_** – and stops apologizing for being who we are.
I believe that we can win back every group that we lost in 2024, from our young voters to the working class. But it’s going to take a lot of resources and hard work.
Leaders We Deserve is on the frontlines of the fight, working to elect bold, young progressives to Congress and state legislatures across the country. And together, we’re changing the face of the Democratic Party for the better, one race at a time.
**[Peter, we rely on grassroots support from people like you to power this important work. Will you contribute $5 or anything you can right now?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20250223-1?refcode=em20250223-1771&amount=5&refcode2=1771_587540_gDceuS&akid=1771%2E587540%2EgDceuS)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20250223-1?amount=5&refcode=em20250223-1771&refcode2=1771_587540_gDceuS&akid=1771%2E587540%2EgDceuS)**
Thank you for everything you’re doing!
David Hogg

clean_body: We need to show young people that we give a damn. Peter, We saw a 20-point shift to the right among young people in the last election. If Democrats want to win back younger voters, we have to show them that we give a damn about them, that we support them, and that we invest in them. We need to build a Democratic Party that is authentic, relatable, earns young people's trust, and wins again – and stops apologizing for being who we are. I believe that we can win back every group that we lost in 2024, from our young voters to the working class. But it’s going to take a lot of resources and hard work. Leaders We Deserve is on the frontlines of the fight, working to elect bold, young progressives to Congress and state legislatures across the country. And together, we’re changing the face of the Democratic Party for the better, one race at a time. Thank you for everything you’re doing! David Hogg

body:

Hey Reader,

A group of renegade tactical engineers finally did it...

After months of grinding, they came out with this prototype that blew everyone's minds.

It uses this patented military tech that makes it 20X more badass than anything as regular Joes can buy.

body:

This comes with a legally mandated fundraising blackout, which is why you’ve heard more from my campaign team than me these past few weeks.

**But while I was at work... _something shifted in our race for Virginia Attorney General._**

_**[I’ve put together a memo to update you on these new developments. name: America First Legal
subject: Legal Action on Birthright Citizenship
body:
Please see a special message from our sponsor:

Unsubscribe
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xul=2qq8ny363wdaxf3eu1ztoj1l9xtj9be1v76uiqomtuevot39bv71pgqrx5dlrcwk81dvseubaa290koliarx3g6swhhgxhgzg2vn9rg5m&__stmp=ss5bbk&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh

Please see a special message from our sponsor:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ss5bbk&__onlt=t

Dear Fellow American,

I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution.

That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection.

By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders.

You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=17x64w94u6de5348e7yhaut7lgtjbrz3y9xbqa0t8epa350t225jvt10ouua3g4olthizhzlyj4nqf3ab6je8vcy2axdkndu5r2z98puycu7rzl54x4aywwwxr68u2ty064e3l3hmdxot21dqlbvfwn68r9f9t&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ss5bbk&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ss5bbk&__onlt=t

Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government?

YES
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ss5bbk&__onlt=t

NO
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ss5bbk&__onlt=t

For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government.

But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.

This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty.

Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states.

These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:

Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"

Reaching over six million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis, Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;

Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;

Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and

Restoring excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College.

And this is especially important in this critical time for America's future.

So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time.

You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=17x64w94u6de5348e7yhaut7lgtjbrz3y9hot4896z5xmwbzrbom5nhn2s8hd0mis02rdx4x1l08t548520s2h2bevqj27q4r5dw27msjcqkmufz57t4a2humy85xb4xyrfbpiwagnjy6qg81lwxv9ehnc7tbp&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ss5bbk&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ss5bbk&__onlt=t

And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work.

Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn

President, Hillsdale College

Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

name: Ilhan Omar
subject: RE: Republicans are calling for my deportation
body:
[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/18910?refcode=em20250223-1240-foote&t=1001&akid=1240%2E342411%2ESySF4M ]Squad Victory Fund

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250223-movement.Utq3wi&refcode=em20250223-1240&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=1240%2E342411%2ESySF4M ]House Republican fundraises with petition to deport Ilhan Omar

Peter — it’s
Ilhan Omar. I’m appalled.

One of my Republican colleagues in the House, Rep. Brandon Gill, sent out
a fundraising email calling for my deportation, and asking his supporters
to sign a petition to make it happen.

Take a look for yourself at what he sent:

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250223-movement.Utq3wi&refcode=em20250223-1240&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1003&akid=1240%2E342411%2ESySF4M ][IMG]

Reprehensible, racist, and un-American. The email went on to say that I
was “facilitating a full-scale invasion of our country," and that I am
committing “treason.”

Threatening to deport legal US citizens because you disagree with them is
fascism. Full stop. But I expect nothing less from the GOP under Trump and
Elon Musk.

Peter,
it’s clear that the far-right has been emboldened and out of control since
Trump took office.

Just look at what they are doing to our federal government.

Elon Musk is illegally slashing crucial agencies and programs while
protecting funding for his companies, like SpaceX. They’re scaling back
the core functions of our government so they can line the pockets of their
billionaire friends. It’s like the wildest dreams of the ultra-rich
finally coming true.

Our best response to the far-right in this moment is to organize all of
our people, all our resources, all of the tools we have at our disposal,
to stand against Trump’s administration.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250223-movement.Utq3wi&refcode=em20250223-1240&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1004&akid=1240%2E342411%2ESySF4M ]If that sounds like a plan to you, please, make a contribution to the
Squad Victory Fund so we can continue to fight back. We are organizing to
block Trump’s agenda in every way we can, but we need your help to get it
done.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250223-movement.Utq3wi&refcode=em20250223-1240&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1023&akid=1240%2E342411%2ESySF4M ]Contribute ››

The far-right may be emboldened right now, but the American people are
already seeing through their extremist agenda. It’s our job to keep
exposing them each and every day.

In solidarity,

Ilhan Omar

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.squadvictoryfund.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1240%2E342411%2ESySF4M

Paid for by The Squad Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, and Rooted in Community Leadership PAC.

In addition to what’s legally required, The Squad Victory Fund does not accept contributions from: (1) corporations, associations, or their PACs; (2) individuals registered as federal lobbyists or under FARA; (3) from the PACs, lobbyists, or SEC-named executives of fossil fuel companies; or (4) from the Fraternal Order of Police.

Contributions or gifts to The Squad Victory Fund are not tax deductible.

Contributions to The Squad Victory Fund will be allocated as follows: 8.33% to each of Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, Rooted in Community Leadership PAC, Politivist PAC, and For the Children PAC.

Any contributor may designate their contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if any contributor makes a contribution that, when allocated, would exceed the amount that the contributor may lawfully give to any participant.

After contributing to The Squad Victory Fund, you will automatically be signed up to receive email updates from Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, and Rashida Tlaib for Congress. You may of course opt-out by unsubscribing at any time.

To contribute via check, please address to The Squad Victory Fund c/o MBA Consulting Group, PO Box 15845, Washington D.C., 20003

Email us: info@squadvictoryfund.com

name: President Trump
subject: Peter, hello!

body:
Will you chip in?

| | | Peter – there are THREE upcoming Special Elections that will decide the fate of our House Majority:

_– NY-21 Special Election for Elise Stefanik’s seat_
_– FL-06 Special Election for Mike Waltz’s seat_
_– FL-01 Special Election for Matt Gaetz’s seat_

And with our entire Majority on the line right now, the Democrats are firing on ALL cylinders to take it from us. They just tried to introduce a bill that would DELAY the NY-21 Special Election by months – and who knows what else is on their Radical agenda.

Remember, we officially have the smallest Majority in a century, and the stakes have never been higher. **If they win, they could take back power in the House and stonewall President Trump’s entire America First Agenda.**

That’s why we desperately need your help right now to SAVE our House Majority.

We need every Patriot reading this to step up before the end of the day to maximize our chances of winning all three elections. **[**We are coming to you directly to ask if you could chip in a couple of bucks.**](https://trk.emails.troydowning._VgOX6-BA)**

name: Rashida Tlaib
subject: Re: Sign on to demand life-affirming policies that help dismantle systemic racism.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress
body:
We must invest in life, including in Black communities that have experienced centuries of disinvestment. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.X6XUC7u8ppFLNtMO_55SZlNseb7gEYIOhm_EWnhzEOZKmTtnV3k2h4V2x_O3H7rdW2az5rgktBwzxQ8Ml9Wgkmv85qW-UsBonL4KRa0bcNqdICU6T3NBDdNIZG7w7wEWc-6kVThmY0fQknoUXPWx2r2W1gKNAOvAzAL7UtjXnMwkARIX005m-FovjZqbwNgJ0tlMgDnRdBYd49GFnbRgsOyW3Ffwvj2-xcwYfc9HbS_aqwSgRSnG2MDTlbKfbgeqCa8gsadBzeWXgcrD5iKdCd08CnxjJw_J_rJGHZBk9EY0UqbzZDRYKlNYCoes0ViQF6yisvcSCYUfHQd7uV1vMXsxugQ6OwMJ2fTBapL3Fl6YMaQEOxPo83zzcPOH_f6AwqRNhii-JqDpOkgv_DiXpWVO4XkEzFP9Q2fwyXKJUW0/4e9/AwTYwwkiQM2Vj4gnDOHEKg/h0/h001.31TI_q7ShsXIaZ6ayU3hhjuDpvLN8VabnFD-93dNR14)
---
Friend, This Black History Month, Black Americans are still fighting for human rights and human dignity in the country they built. Amid escalating anti-Black attacks—against civil rights protections, affirmative action, race-based programs, and public services that millions of Americans rely on—**we must “turn to our collective vision for the world that we want,”** says Robin D.G. Kelley. Kelley, a historian and author of books about radical Black working-class struggles for a better world, has said that **“fighting for something, for a new way of life is different from just fighting to survive.”** 1 In addition to expanding the social safety net, he wants to transform society. **We cannot nibble around the edges** , as too many of my colleagues in Congress want to do. We live in a country that spends trillions on war while the cost to end homelessness is just $11 billion, and the cost to end lead poisoning is $60 billion. **We have the money to end poverty, feed everyone, house everyone, provide universal healthcare and clean water for all, and more** —but our government’s priorities are fundamentally broken. It’s on the people to build powerful movements to change that. [**Will you sign on to demand transformative, life-affirming policies that help dismantle systemic racism—including investments in Black communities to reverse centuries of disinvestment?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm381rcfdHkIQD_K7aziRYYN5cLh37B_GWTAV_onrz18f20Kr5IwIxaAaNH8rKdwFD35fYtqezgq_aGpSdJS0Ub7Da219j0Mw7JO1yJdgtbcZXf7C91aSmkZwyTpAZNkoGenkuqRT9GB7iEywIqpGtLRHfEprS81OsIjdbqNP9kLRmWd3avgsajifBZM69X_GEzxscEWqUOEl5jE6DrYGnri6AxtBpoX13K7Mgz42JyzIVQrfeFn7mHcb86X2xApKbTig6XKtDsxyRoK1ph_SaySNvAxuxdzqFl9-1ICCTVaRWrQBYRE7FNKoLU7Dte2Aao4IsAL6jZLgjR2bB-9WIdDKqbP2PFvf_WOxP_19WKD1vu9Qi4EyIbegResUecqDsl2WCftAkBl7lf6ZvhuKYO_M4QyvdY31Qkh2dtCUNJDib1OO-5iJYmNBn_SPrg-9Iz06u-RmP0W2zRpywNnUVyXawCX3MUgse18FhYdVizp7mthprgtdC-VHX855-u28GUo/4e9/AwTYwwkiQM2Vj4gnDOHEKg/h1/h001.XvQC3v9RYEFHz8GunikUZM1AkTDEwxXCfC7mbLhLOfg) | [SIGN ON](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm381rcfdHkIQD_K7aziRYYN5cLh37B_GWTAV_onrz18f20Kr5IwIxaAaNH8rKdwFD35fYtqezgq_aGpSdJS0Ub7Da219j0Mw7JO1yJdgtbcZXf7C91aSmkZwyTpAZNkoGenczHaBaWj4B0Tn7Tm7k8hY_qbPwPlX3mkT8VWqcntg_yzZTE_sqQFadPtn83RG3K9vSkCz6RZWUQJrOgv3xRLAyL_rmR6sXesHSDwYH2vk4dNqeJhNVYMVJ6_aUkhfgmuEtbJY5fqAqET7X1eaoFtO7nNWTfo9zfKYM7qWLXdwQ3tkjQXsh5wupA58-6pwTHBPlcLm9hIUIRpe9Z2JP3lWaBgmbn6c1Jj_5ZZWOCteQzX7x-PAH0UTPi9LWs_T639KvtXFCnEwAYQgPdkDrfaLesw7RM8OJoItDoHmm7fDFkrLq_l5b7zdG6KqGOIAMqBNM3qK9Fr5Ts_ZROKKL9cx-r5OIMn-3G-PsuNUhhJ5UN5e0rJGzV19bv1p33tGrGY/4e9/AwTYwwkiQM2Vj4gnDOHEKg/h2/h001.CBYhICnmJ7id_eftYb-mTxpu4CHfrajuF5xzrS9eX70)

We must not only close the still-growing gap in health and wealth between Black and white families. We must also demand a government that actually ensures everyone’s needs are met, that invests in life rather than war and death, that puts people over billionaire profits, and that enacts reparations for centuries of racist injustices.
**In Congress, I will keep pushing for bold policies to end systemic racism and help marginalized families thrive.** I will keep demanding investments in healthcare (including Black maternal health), childcare, paid leave, reproductive justice, education, and housing for all.
I will keep holding my colleagues accountable for upholding the Constitution and serving their constituents rather than their stock portfolios. And **I will continue introducing bills to provide direct cash assistance for people in need—including a universal income for families with children, money for paying utility and water bills, and support for homeless youth.**
But the federal government’s institutions have never moved without being pushed by the people. Right now, the people need to get even bolder with their demands for better.
[**Please sign on to demand our federal government invest in life and in our communities’ needs, especially Black communities who have faced systemic racism for hundreds of years.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm381rcfdHkIQD_K7aziRYYN5cLh37B_GWTAV_onrz18f20Kr5IwIxaAaNH8rKdwFD35fYtqezgq_aGpSdJS0Ub7Da219j0Mw7JO1yJdgtbcZXf7C91aSmkZwyTpAZNkoGelpusJ2RHV_layR1og3my-m4kcavei-sA6dwPnfnEMAv1zU8wkCsZkoLYLTYOyglrtbCm4O_05phKneJCTOGlgwkjKDEnjq0-KMbWvS3ZhnQ3L9wc_-Q5c8-pABstOTg3-KteDTwZ6Yer2L1vePOtREXRZLaVhqZXUELSe5tM5VOwjOILN3JnK7gX992dUHjSYl_HDwQGWQOb4FH-TLAaS37gKG8BiTXWYzwyuv5M9GoMy7M_5HTItmfrEZV2N_chuwjzIOqkTqM3hjMGg1_Xao4RdTUPY-yK-VY7tqigAg3QdXVEUthRxZiX-xkd-yCXZMAfO82RSPjy_UzUq0EQ9y4gRGZ4iMgEb-bvU7w9jdFR55oB1ekfzEG4p0ZEarw7c/4e9/AwTYwwkiQM2Vj4gnDOHEKg/h3/h001.dVSZwCv_Gz6f5eWJTkZ9GyAi9nYgGrrRo5foyA_Lhq4)
Together, we will keep demanding a government that ensures everyone’s equal rights and puts people first, not billionaires. We will keep demanding justice and equity for all. No matter who’s president, we will keep growing the movement for a country and a world where every family can thrive with dignity.
In solidarity,
Rashida

From: **Rashida Tlaib******
Date: Sat, Feb 22, 2025
Subject: Sign on to demand life-affirming policies that help dismantle systemic racism.
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com
Friend,
Trump and his cronies are trying to dismantle crucial programs and services that uplift Black people and benefit countless communities across the country. We need to be pushing for the exact opposite, for life-affirming policies and services that help dismantle systemic racism.
For example, I introduced the _Restoring Communities Left Behind Act_ to provide $5 billion to expand access to homeownership, increase housing options, and rebuild neighborhoods that have struggled from years of forced segregation and disproportionate disinvestment.
I founded the Congressional Mamas’ Caucus to advocate for mothers of color and for policies including Black maternal healthcare, affordable childcare, paid family leave, and reproductive justice.
I’ve also introduced policies to provide direct cash assistance to people in need, including to end child poverty, address youth homelessness, and pay for life-saving utility bills. I’ve supported policies demanding reparations for Black Americans and an end to the still-growing racial wealth gap.
[**This Black History Month, will you sign on to demand U.S. governments—especially our federal government—invest in Black communities? Instead of funneling more of our tax dollars to billionaires, we must close the still-growing racial wealth gap and address systemic anti-Black racism.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm381rcfdHkIQD_K7aziRYYN5cLh37B_GWTAV_onrz18f20Kr5IwIxaAaNH8rKdwFD35fYtqezgq_aGpSdJS0Ub7Da219j0Mw7JO1yJdgtbcZXf7C91aSmkZwyTpAZNkoGenDgv8wTZN_mByBaijt-HmF80DlHkl9TbmfPbrEi5PicUpVDUCZPhTKrXcDakfehztszTTKQl6akOfj8eyt3Bot5JDNY01gfKIua-Btqs9-riUonc4HgPQ4lxevpW8roaIzvHOMFPVY_HOX6PNd3_MCYbi_wULQRlPX8snksupDqQrk6Y5qj_W9gMZIWXeatNuA8jmwMlV-zK5jvM8l1v3pBi7rD_0CsqFuMt53UN4WAfpEcKcp43YRg9GvW-_Y9K2r3Mo2OH0dRI6eAoLyc-ug0DmfWlGSTkKfGI0Uh_ZtuLjsjRq0Zvnd79GdIF-7NH_CQnldNtXNpJHFNYrGw73OeLdTK49qbGolTdCmXKm0izOEaUM_rz_Sp6R2z2TI0NQ/4e9/AwTYwwkiQM2Vj4gnDOHEKg/h5/h001.JF4nOXtrP-K27nXjeC6grgdXovLHYXfF_ZXnlSp3gdA)

This presidential administration’s Department of Justice is ending its civil rights division’s enforcement of anti-discrimination policies. Meanwhile, the Department of Education’s civil rights’ office has ordered schools to end race-based programs or risk investigations and cuts to federal funding.
The White House and right-wing elected officials are escalating long-standing attacks on anti-racist protections for Americans. Multiple leaders of Project 2025 are white supremacist eugenicists who want segregation—they have spread lies that white people are more deserving and that white men are the true victims of racism.
**They’re using an old playbook to consolidate power and wealth: They’re trying to pit us against each other and block multiracial solidarity so there’s less resistance to their efforts to get even richer at our expense.** We must respond with the opposite. We must turn toward each other and build solidarity with our most oppressed neighbors.
**Our federal government has the money to feed everyone, house everyone, provide universal healthcare, ensure clean water for all, and more. We must demand a government that ensures these human rights and invests in our communities’ needs.**
As Reverend Dr. Martin Luther King, Jr. said, _"A nation that continues year after year to spend more money on military defense than on programs of social uplift is approaching spiritual death."_ Rather than spending trillions of taxpayer dollars on war, we must push for life.
[**Can you sign on today to demand life-affirming investments in our communities, especially in Black communities that have faced centuries of racist disinvestment?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm381rcfdHkIQD_K7aziRYYN5cLh37B_GWTAV_onrz18f20Kr5IwIxaAaNH8rKdwFD35fYtqezgq_aGpSdJS0Ub7Da219j0Mw7JO1yJdgtbcZXf7C91aSmkZwyTpAZNkoGel5OAqzx9X7rqNNRD-JBMHBYWKcuU4_zE4I3nJjJRX3u8jRgqCk9taeaUGZBLWO-Vy-Wn80-Qmdq3zpFAxQVwNgM6ZKBDBFpfHqAA_b2Kuq4hdhBaPw_GOukrZLe7JNmlWfN_vMhXmZSxl6ni_9HhiKTOQV-T-gSMKzXVRcO7XgLZlhkUfic8UwxSSoQX4lNw_4CiNJiCPkmU3lRuWcz6UXzfUoShyK69rInL0C84eC-xyUPSOf5i7xgwCIujgrrM3xLS7GK39eKBFtx0g1xnfuiiFKLCOGqDq9FEVB8pC3q_9gmIp3QHBXXIddsJpPkdgGjhP3yWtl1qDlsNsLvMZhnabSQkWbIo5O7aSuqPlEgiR5ltRKF14ms2Wa9n83A08/4e9/AwTYwwkiQM2Vj4gnDOHEKg/h7/h001.O94tGUDcbb5hNuFzNtLUr44oIuE81pdJiTdYlOQ3-e0)
Thank you. Together, we will keep demanding a country and a world where all people are free and all people can thrive with dignity.
In solidarity,
Rashida

Amid escalating anti-Black attacks—against civil rights protections, affirmative action, race-based programs, and public services that millions of Americans rely on—we must “turn to our collective vision for the world that we want,” says Robin D.G. Kelley. Kelley, a historian and author of books about radical Black working-class struggles for a better world, has said that “fighting for something, for a new way of life is different from just fighting to survive.” 1 In addition to expanding the social safety net, he wants to transform society. We cannot nibble around the edges , as too many of my colleagues in Congress want to do. We live in a country that spends trillions on war while the cost to end homelessness is just $11 billion, and the cost to end lead poisoning is $60 billion. It’s on the people to build powerful movements to change that. | We must not only close the still-growing gap in health and wealth between Black and white families. In Congress, I will keep pushing for bold policies to end systemic racism and help marginalized families thrive. I will keep demanding investments in healthcare (including Black maternal health), childcare, paid leave, reproductive justice, education, and housing for all. I will keep holding my colleagues accountable for upholding the Constitution and serving their constituents rather than their stock portfolios. And I will continue introducing bills to provide direct cash assistance for people in need—including a universal income for families with children, money for paying utility and water bills, and support for homeless youth. But the federal government’s institutions have never moved without being pushed by the people. Right now, the people need to get even bolder with their demands for better. Together, we will keep demanding a government that ensures everyone’s equal rights and puts people first, not billionaires. We will keep demanding justice and equity for all. No matter who’s president, we will keep growing the movement for a country and a world where every family can thrive with dignity. As Reverend Dr. Martin Luther King, Jr. said, "A nation that continues year after year to spend more money on military defense than on programs of social uplift is approaching spiritual death." Trump promised that he would bring prices down “starting on day one” but Trump has done the complete opposite:
* enacting tariffs that raises the price of everyday goods like groceries and gas on working families,
* rescinding President Biden’s executive order to lower prescription drug costs for Americans on Medicare and Medicaid,
* and now attempting to cut federal spending on assistance programs millions of Americans rely on.

Trump and his Republican allies must answer for the harm and chaos they’ve wrought — prioritizing profits for their rich friends at our expense. We are battle born for this, now help us get battle ready.
**[_Will you chip in right now to NV Dems ahead of our end-of-month fundraising deadline at the end of this week? February 23, 2025
A special election is being held on February 25th for a State Senate seat that has opened up due to the appointment of the present occupant, Republican Kevin Kelly, as a Superior Court Judge.
Thus, it is an open seat pitting Republican Shelton Assemblyman Jason Perillo against Democratic Stratford Councilman Tony Afriyie.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/e3707fe8-228c-473f-a250-f08956527682?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Republican State Senate Candidate Jason Perillo
Republicans have held this seat for decades and former occupants were former Congressional candidate Dan Debicella and the legendary "Doc" Gunther, who was the longest serving legislator in Connecticut history.
With such a record, Republicans may be complacent and believe this is an easy victory.
Nothing could be further from the truth.
Like Connecticut, the voting patterns of this district have been trending towards the Democrats. While Kelly won easily in 2010 with 67%, he only received 57% in the last contested election. Furthermore, Democrats are outraged because President Trump is fulfilling his campaign promises and could show up in droves to send a message. Republicans must do the same. Anything can happen in an open seat election.
Jason Perillo has served the Republican Party and Shelton for his entire life. His family has a tradition of service in Shelton, with his grandfather serving as mayor in the 1960s and his mother as a public-school teacher for 30 years.
Jason Perillo has been the Chief of the Volunteer Ambulance, alderman, and State Assemblyman since 2006. He is a solid conservative stating his [legislative goals](https://substack.com/redirect/3e3a3619-e37e-4aba-b92a-55cbe8ac4977?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) are to:
"Repeal all income taxes on social security and pensions as well as eliminate the 'public benefit charge' on our electric bills. The foundation of my agenda is creating a state that is affordable to families and retirees."
But he does have the ability to reach across the aisle, as when he worked with Democrats to rebuild the Derby-Shelton Bridge.
[Afriyie](https://substack.com/redirect/3e3a3619-e37e-4aba-b92a-55cbe8ac4977?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) on the other hand is a liberal Democrat, dedicated to "ensuring fair distribution of state education funds," "expanding affordable housing," and "promoting renewable energy initiatives."
In other words, raising taxes while doing nothing to decrease Connecticut's outrageous energy costs.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/e88bc5ae-7867-4e5e-95ea-3309ebbf21d3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Democratic State Senate Candidate Tony Afriyie
And he is presently a legislative aide for the quintessential Connecticut Democrat, Representative Rosa DeLauro. What else can I say?
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/b00a9798-b062-4692-8d4e-7dd723734177?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Congresswoman Rosa DeLauro
We must support courageous Republicans such as Jason Perillo. Presently, the Democrats control the Governor's Mansion, State Senate 25-10 and the Assembly 101-49. Being a Republican legislator is a frustrating endeavor as Democrats have destroyed our beautiful state to the point where Republican-leaning individuals and our children have fled the state rather than live under a government dedicated to raising taxes to fund generous pensions and mollify angry implacable liberals with too much time on their hands.
Early voting has already begun, and the polls are open on Tuesday, February 25 from 6:00 AM to 8:00 PM. If you are unsure whether you are eligible to vote in this election, please click this link to get the relevant information.
https://portal.ct.gov/sots/common-elements/v5-template---redesign/elections--voting--home-page
Contact Dr. Bentivegna at: jfbentivegna@gmail.com
Follow Dr. Bentivegna on Twitter (X) @joebentivegnamd

Fellow American,

President Trump has been in office for less than a month and illegal border crossings are already dropping dramatically.

According to Trump Border Czar Tom Homan, just 229 illegal aliens were apprehended at the southern border on Tuesday, down from a high of 11,000 per day during the Biden administration.

name: John Milligan (Executive Director)
subject: The race is on 🏎🏁
body:
SPECIAL ELECTIONS ARE COMING!
| | | | | [](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001pmi8weg-kM4WuBxqurYtvBfcwYkyKHZQxGM_VdnlFf6VFs5M9VzE7-QW_m_HAnEQ_NeCo8E5v4dBHcxP5OH8VLxhoUjRghhYKX6a8mMSMaTigFnINkuyGw97WLlez0oLL0QKBaLKx7Lmgm73POmUxA==&c=G-qolqDjO_ZGxwPixKpRTJJ82L9lOkRuB0LMMTAy4bFlMVzK0l7CzQ==&ch=6qFSAGw5FekLgDHwHwXt0dufeQaQRKcxejFGpGIuteyWojzSlEn_ew==)
---
| Hi Peter,
The race is on! Two special elections are coming and both seats are hot targets for Republicans to pick up. Mark your calendars - The special election for the 6th Essex State Representative seat in Beverly is officially set for May 13th and [Medley Long](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001pmi8weg-kM4WuBxqurYtvBfcwYkyKHZQxGM_VdnlFf6VFs5M9VzE7_t-pEGFnHIiP8Lth_yM_stEuvQ9JgD6nGJZLsx1utAw0huqxeG3H-Jt9FKwdOB4wApk2YaegUAclCr30pGhB5SmSFLzqUkKeg==&c=G-qolqDjO_ZGxwPixKpRTJJ82L9lOkRuB0LMMTAy4bFlMVzK0l7CzQ==&ch=6qFSAGw5FekLgDHwHwXt0dufeQaQRKcxejFGpGIuteyWojzSlEn_ew==) is ready to fight. A proven leader with a strong business background and deep roots in the district, Medley is stepping up to deliver commonsense solutions that put families and businesses first.
There will also be a special in the 3rd Bristol down in Taunton, but that date has yet to be announced.
You know the drill - winning these seats will be an all hands on deck effort. In fact, this weekend MassGOP Chair Amy Carnevale will be out door knocking for Medley in Beverly!
Perhaps now more than ever, it's Conservatives that are the bold, effective leaders we need on Beacon Hill.
Stay tuned for more door knocking and other announcements...
There is one thing you can do today, though, to best position MassGOP and our candidates for victory.

clean_body: SPECIAL ELECTIONS ARE COMING! | | | | | == | Hi Peter, The race is on! Two special elections are coming and both seats are hot targets for Republicans to pick up. Mark your calendars - The special election for the 6th Essex State Representative seat in Beverly is officially set for May 13th and == is ready to fight. A proven leader with a strong business background and deep roots in the district, Medley is stepping up to deliver commonsense solutions that put families and businesses first. There will also be a special in the 3rd Bristol down in Taunton, but that date has yet to be announced. You know the drill - winning these seats will be an all hands on deck effort. In fact, this weekend MassGOP Chair Amy Carnevale will be out door knocking for Medley in Beverly! Perhaps now more than ever, it's Conservatives that are the bold, effective leaders we need on Beacon Hill. Stay tuned for more door knocking and other announcements... There is one thing you can do today, though, to best position MassGOP and our candidates for victory. Whatever you can swing, == Special elections present a unique opportunity to stretch your dollar - $40 provides the resources to launch a social media campaign in district, hitting the right voters at the right time $75 funds thousands of GOTV text messages to early & election day voters $150 helps volunteers utilize highly targeted data to WIN! Another option is to make your gift monthly. name: Dear
subject: Peter,
body: ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ Dear Peter, We write today to inform you that after a thorough review of our records, your profile has been flagged for a discrepancy that requires immediate attention. Our database currently indicates that you support D.C. statehood. We believe (and hope) that this is an error, given your strong history of being a Republican patriot. So, as a valued member of our team, https://click.updates.marshablackburn.com/?qs=ea481d45eae8156b31dcad830864a73dc71b57bf46bdc85fd8e9a7fc6248835ff07aa03d990dcb6761ac2ef571bf619b352df21beb3bb279f4ea5ee84f4a07b2 we want to give you a chance to correct your record. The Democrats' push to make Washington, D.C. the 51st state is being kicked into high-gear now that Republicans are in control. This would grant them an additional governor, two Senate seats, and a House seat…paving the way for a permanent Democrat supermajority. The consequences would be catastrophic, Peter. Our pro-life values would be eroded, the Supreme Court packed, national security compromised, and free speech suppressed. Surely you don’t support this right?! https://click.updates.marshablackburn.com/?qs=ea481d45eae8156b31dcad830864a73dc71b57bf46bdc85fd8e9a7fc6248835ff07aa03d990dcb6761ac2ef571bf619b352df21beb3bb279f4ea5ee84f4a07b2 So please verify your record and confirm your opposition to D.C. statehood by responding here. Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter. Sincerely, D.C. name: JanePAC.com
subject: 🎉 It’s Jane’s BIG night! Sign her congratulations card!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
Let’s show her some love.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/102640483/529803687/1328794144?refcode=ea.137f5e27-0ef2-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ms=ea.137f5e27-0ef2-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjEzN2Y1ZTI3LTBlZjItZWYxMS05MGNiLTAwMjI0ODJhOTRmNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=QXH8nmIn7Cg96o23QwNbzOBCP1ZoXvMuThAqkJz8JEo=&emci=0f7f5e27-0ef2-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=137f5e27-0ef2-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=4823105)
---
It’s happening! Tonight, Jane Fonda will receive the **SAG Life Achievement Award** — the highest honor in Hollywood for an actor. And let’s be real: _she deserves it._ Jane’s impact goes far beyond the screen. She’s spent **_six decades_** breaking barriers, telling women’s stories, and using her platform to fight for justice — from anti-war protests to women’s rights to climate action. She’s faced backlash and even arrests, but she’s never backed down. So tonight, let’s give her a standing ovation that she can feel. **[We’re putting together a heartfelt congratulations card for Jane, and we’d love for you to sign it. If you want, you can also add a personal message to share what her work has meant to you.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/102640484/529803688/435851449?refcode=ea.137f5e27-0ef2-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ms=ea.137f5e27-0ef2-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjEzN2Y1ZTI3LTBlZjItZWYxMS05MGNiLTAwMjI0ODJhOTRmNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=QXH8nmIn7Cg96o23QwNbzOBCP1ZoXvMuThAqkJz8JEo=&emci=0f7f5e27-0ef2-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=137f5e27-0ef2-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=4823105)** [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/102640485/529803689/435851449?refcode=ea.137f5e27-0ef2-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ms=ea.137f5e27-0ef2-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjEzN2Y1ZTI3LTBlZjItZWYxMS05MGNiLTAwMjI0ODJhOTRmNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=QXH8nmIn7Cg96o23QwNbzOBCP1ZoXvMuThAqkJz8JEo=&emci=0f7f5e27-0ef2-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=137f5e27-0ef2-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=4823105) Then, **tune in to _Netflix_ tonight at 5 p.m. PT / 8 p.m. ET to watch her accept this incredible honor at the SAG Awards.** Jane has spent a lifetime making a difference. Tonight, let’s make this moment special for her. | [**SIGN THE CARD →**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/102640486/529803690/435851449?refcode=ea.137f5e27-0ef2-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ms=ea.137f5e27-0ef2-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjEzN2Y1ZTI3LTBlZjItZWYxMS05MGNiLTAwMjI0ODJhOTRmNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=QXH8nmIn7Cg96o23QwNbzOBCP1ZoXvMuThAqkJz8JEo=&emci=0f7f5e27-0ef2-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=137f5e27-0ef2-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=4823105)

clean_body: Let’s show her some love. | It’s happening! Tonight, Jane Fonda will receive the SAG Life Achievement Award — the highest honor in Hollywood for an actor. And let’s be real: she deserves it. Jane’s impact goes far beyond the screen. She’s spent six decades breaking barriers, telling women’s stories, and using her platform to fight for justice — from anti-war protests to women’s rights to climate action. She’s faced backlash and even arrests, but she’s never backed down. So tonight, let’s give her a standing ovation that she can feel. Then, tune in to Netflix tonight at 5 p.m. PT / 8 p.m. ET to watch her accept this incredible honor at the SAG Awards. Jane has spent a lifetime making a difference. Tonight, let’s make this moment special for her. | With gratitude, Jane Fonda Climate PAC | = | = = Follow along: | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|--- Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Jane Fonda Climate PAC 600 Pennsylvania Ave SE #15180 Washington, DC 20003 United States

body:
I’m launching my campaign for Governor of the great state of New Mexico.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102640779/529804351/-1189406429?amount=6&refcode=RS_EM_FR_2025.02.23_Haaland1_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZWNhOGRjZC0wZWYyLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cyGvhhF7tWR9eNgAE8Kvh4lVXFey_HEJuxocCZjWnxc=) Emily Randall said I could reach out with some exciting news, Peter: I’m launching my campaign for Governor of the great state of New Mexico — my home — to bring our state together and build a bright future for all who live here. I’m humbly asking: [_**Will you join us as a grassroots donor by donating just $3 or more to my campaign and Emily now?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102640780/529804352/-1189406429?amount=6&refcode=RS_EM_FR_2025.02.23_Haaland1_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZWNhOGRjZC0wZWYyLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cyGvhhF7tWR9eNgAE8Kvh4lVXFey_HEJuxocCZjWnxc=) [CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102640781/529804353/-1189406429?amount=6&refcode=RS_EM_FR_2025.02.23_Haaland1_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZWNhOGRjZC0wZWYyLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cyGvhhF7tWR9eNgAE8Kvh4lVXFey_HEJuxocCZjWnxc=) The amount you give doesn’t matter. What matters is building a campaign with the support of real people. That’s who I am and who I came from. That’s who I am running to serve. My roots in New Mexico run 35 generations deep. The Pueblo people were the first farmers in the high deserts of New Mexico, an agriculture tradition that still continues today. I am here because of my grandfather, who worked for decades as a diesel mechanic on the railroad. Somehow he also kept a field — picking worms off the corn as it grew, like the generations before him. I am here because of my grandmother, a survivor and a caretaker who woke up every day before the sun. She was the one who gave me my true love of cooking New Mexican cuisine. (She wouldn’t let us in the kitchen while she cooked, but I’d perch myself outside and watch her through the window for hours.) I am here because of my parents and their sacrifice. My mother, a Pueblo woman, served in the Navy. My father, a Marine, received a Silver Star for his service in Vietnam. He now lies in honor at Arlington. I am here because of my beloved child, who I raised on my own. I started a small business to pay the bills, but it still wasn’t always enough. We relied on food stamps to get on our feet. I sometimes had to decide between paying rent and buying groceries to feed our family. I will never forget how that felt or the kindness of those who helped us – strangers who became community. When I look at my Somah, I see perseverance, strength, and hope. These are my stories. These are stories of New Mexico. These days, our differences are blown so far out of proportion. We lose sight of a simple fact: we all live in the same state, together. All of us in New Mexico come from love, survival, and sacrifice. We all want to live good lives — and we want even more for our children. The current president and his billionaire friends look at the lands and the people of this country and think: what can I exploit? I am running to ask: if we come together in New Mexico, what good can we do for each other and for the next generation? We have our work cut out for us. The cost of living is crushing our families. Our economy is growing, but we need to make sure everyone shares in our progress. Our families need more. Our farmers and ranchers need more. New Mexico’s children need so much more. And we must be good stewards of the Earth, and preserve the rivers, mesas, farmlands, and forests whose beauty sustains our communities. I am running to do all this and more. I am running to serve all New Mexicans and make sure we’re leaving a better future for our children. [_**Will you join us with a grassroots donation split between my campaign and Emily Randall?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102640782/529804381/-1189406429?amount=6&refcode=RS_EM_FR_2025.02.23_Haaland1_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZWNhOGRjZC0wZWYyLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cyGvhhF7tWR9eNgAE8Kvh4lVXFey_HEJuxocCZjWnxc=) I would be honored to have your support. [CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102640784/529804382/-1189406429?amount=6&refcode=RS_EM_FR_2025.02.23_Haaland1_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZWNhOGRjZC0wZWYyLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cyGvhhF7tWR9eNgAE8Kvh4lVXFey_HEJuxocCZjWnxc=) Many thanks to Emily for helping spread the word. I hope you’ll join us, Peter! Be fierce, Deb [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102640785/529804383/-1324188244?refcode=RS_EM_FR_2025.02.23_Haaland1_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZWNhOGRjZC0wZWYyLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cyGvhhF7tWR9eNgAE8Kvh4lVXFey_HEJuxocCZjWnxc=) [VOLUNTEER](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102640786/529804384/1475719955?contactdata=Le6jlCgVq1TQldyIoWIjatrxUBkSjttOMAd31240e6hp33eqv2Ge1VcpMAnPe78f9rGj0VWCYwvG1TRHvASuEQ==&refcode=RS_EM_FR_2025.02.23_Haaland1_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZWNhOGRjZC0wZWYyLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cyGvhhF7tWR9eNgAE8Kvh4lVXFey_HEJuxocCZjWnxc=&emci=ae9124e1-02f2-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=4eca8dcd-0ef2-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=23483442) [MEET EMILY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102640787/529804385/1277404761?refcode=RS_EM_FR_2025.02.23_Haaland1_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZWNhOGRjZC0wZWYyLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cyGvhhF7tWR9eNgAE8Kvh4lVXFey_HEJuxocCZjWnxc=&emci=ae9124e1-02f2-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=4eca8dcd-0ef2-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=23483442) I am running to ask: if we come together in New Mexico, what good can we do for each other and for the next generation? We have our work cut out for us. The cost of living is crushing our families. Our economy is growing, but we need to make sure everyone shares in our progress. Our families need more. Our farmers and ranchers need more. New Mexico’s children need so much more. And we must be good stewards of the Earth, and preserve the rivers, mesas, farmlands, and forests whose beauty sustains our communities. I am running to do all this and more. I am running to serve all New Mexicans and make sure we’re leaving a better future for our children. = I would be honored to have your support. = Many thanks to Emily for helping spread the word. I hope you’ll join us, Peter! Be fierce, Deb = | | Paid for by Emily Randall for Congress Emily Randall for Congress P.O. Box 1883 Port Orchard, WA 98366 United States | | If you would like to receive only our most important messages, . If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

_Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District. _

Trump is the loudest among them. Instead of presenting _literally any_ real plan for the country, he’s blaming diversity, equity, and inclusion for, well... everything. And it’s not just Trump. When California was battling wildfires, Elon Musk jumped in to say, “DEI means people die,” attacking the Los Angeles Fire Department’s response. This isn’t just absurd — it’s dangerous. When the most powerful people in the country talk down to marginalized communities, their most extreme followers take that as permission to do the same — or worse. This is all a distraction from the fact that Trump and his MAGA enablers have no plans to actually help working Americans. name: Elect State Dems (via DLCC.org)
subject: If you are a local Democrat, please continue reading
disclaimer_text: paid for by DLCC Victory Fund, 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005
body:
If every supporter reading this donated to support state Dems, we’d have the resources to defend and expand Democratic power from right-wing extremists in state legislatures across the map. | | |
---
| |
---|---

| 🫏 If you are a local Democrat, please continue reading.

State Democrats are facing competitive special elections – one of the most important being a tie-breaking race in the Pennsylvania House. If Democrats lose this seat, Republicans _will_ flip control of the House, giving the GOP full control of the PA legislature.

**We’re counting on grassroots supporters to help elect Democrats who will fight the extreme MAGA agenda.** [ A $7 donation is all it takes to fuel our work → ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqu05XtZnrBMT5R_mtAuAjxDUDA1SkpaNlXE6dSUgLwEEu36vXVx0tLXZUtv3bHpCSXnDmjN7xlJ4hlhjbBfp19itp8IJwqbHLms2FakrynUokT8oKsg3Ll2DSPivWCtzCOtJYYhnhTD8m_v6Fefafq-ZsUdG4mc0kmwVu9pVYQ0as7or463lFrZakax8hu8QFOj2CdEHMFjt1e3sqEKDugzpZLI6OXlTzng24LsKDY6Tzn9l5nvTu8_NgnJHFLsaAgBtkZR-whwdAaXFOmqYeSXbqIsN0okcQUUFpIuZ3qDbG_mu3VWsziiadrXkBua1deT7PUd-vekWvw8h-Rtb8VCcd5S_uSkWLQtaYixJz7zjQVU-VuODtUBa88AQMVxUR1mRTm6fY068TxusvKSVfmjXmFLUJ_avnMuMLg1VlIJsdPG81N-JwBFPJMxSLYGOEQ/4e9/iMd3OCEvRo-6zjqo7VzYLw/h0/h001.7FIpIqyWz5D8-nIPeBE3jxciuSzvJZicTvWrkEjlioM)

name: Team Truth to Power
subject: [INVITE] Zoom with Katie Porter and Robert Garcia!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Truth to Power PAC
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/9?t=1&akid=39453%2E3422442%2Er3gD8h)
Derek, did you see Katie Porter’s email on Friday? You’re invited to join Katie and Robert Garcia for a Zoom call about government oversight!
The call begins at 6:00 pm PT on Thursday, February 27th. We hope to see you there. **[Make a donation of any amount to secure your spot.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ttp-em-202502-zoom?refcode=em20250223-39453&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=39453_3422442_r3gD8h&akid=39453%2E3422442%2Er3gD8h)**
_\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Katie Porter
To: [dpwillis67@gmail.com]
Date: Fri, Feb 21, 2025
Subject: Join Robert Garcia and me to chat oversight
_
Derek,
When I got to Congress during the first Trump administration, I got to work conducting oversight. I demanded answers on behalf of the American people, and I called out Trump’s cronies who failed to deliver what families need.
Now, while I’m not in Congress anymore, I’m grateful to have representatives like my friend Robert Garcia who have picked up the torch. He sits on the Oversight Committee and has spoken truth to power about how MAGA extremists are destroying our government.
**Robert and I are hosting a Zoom discussion next week to talk with patriotic Americans like you about how we wield oversight as a tool to hold the Trump administration accountable.[ If you split a donation of any amount to my organization Truth to Power and Robert’s campaign using this link, you’ll receive the link to join.*](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ttp-em-202502-zoom?refcode=em20250223-39453&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=39453_3422442_r3gD8h&akid=39453%2E3422442%2Er3gD8h)**
**[Doubling Down on Oversight w/ Katie Porter and Robert Garcia](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ttp-em-202502-zoom?refcode=em20250223-39453&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=39453_3422442_r3gD8h&akid=39453%2E3422442%2Er3gD8h)**
Thursday, February 27, 6pm PT / 9pm ET
Zoom link provided upon donation of any amount
We can’t wait to see you next Thursday! If you have questions you’d like us to talk about, please share them on the ActBlue form when you make your donation.
—Katie Porter
*After you donate, the Zoom link will be sent in your ActBlue receipt. Look for an email from ActBlue with the subject line: “Thank you for your contribution!”

**Katie Porter started Truth to Power to support Democrats who reject corporate PAC money** and are running to protect the environment, restore the nationwide right to an abortion, and create an economy that works for working people.
---
Paid for by Truth to Power PAC
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you. But, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [**you can do so here**](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-ttp-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/ttp-unsubscribe/?t=2&akid=39453%2E3422442%2Er3gD8h).

To contribute via check, please address to: Truth to Power PAC, PO Box 5176, Irvine, CA 92616
clean_body: Derek, did you see Katie Porter’s email on Friday? You’re invited to join Katie and Robert Garcia for a Zoom call about government oversight! The call begins at 6:00 pm PT on Thursday, February 27th. We hope to see you there. \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Katie Porter To: [dpwillis67@gmail.com] Date: Fri, Feb 21, 2025 Subject: Join Robert Garcia and me to chat oversight Derek, When I got to Congress during the first Trump administration, I got to work conducting oversight. I demanded answers on behalf of the American people, and I called out Trump’s cronies who failed to deliver what families need. Now, while I’m not in Congress anymore, I’m grateful to have representatives like my friend Robert Garcia who have picked up the torch. He sits on the Oversight Committee and has spoken truth to power about how MAGA extremists are destroying our government. Robert and I are hosting a Zoom discussion next week to talk with patriotic Americans like you about how we wield oversight as a tool to hold the Trump administration accountable. Thursday, February 27, 6pm PT / 9pm ET Zoom link provided upon donation of any amount We can’t wait to see you next Thursday! If you have questions you’d like us to talk about, please share them on the ActBlue form when you make your donation. —Katie Porter After you donate, the Zoom link will be sent in your ActBlue receipt. Look for an email from ActBlue with the subject line: “Thank you for your contribution!” Katie Porter started Truth to Power to support Democrats who reject corporate PAC money** and are running to protect the environment, restore the nationwide right to an abortion, and create an economy that works for working people. name: Jimmy Patronis [FL-01 Special Election GOP Nominee]
subject: As of 8:07 PM Tuesday, Jan 28th…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
House Republicans are BARELY clinging to their Majority and control of the House.
I’m officially the GOP nominee for the FL-01 Special Election to replace Matt Gaetz in Congress.
| |
---
| | | Hi - my name is Jimmy Patronis.

**As of 8:07 PM Tuesday, January 28th, I 'm officially the GOP nominee for the FL-01 Special Election to replace Matt Gaetz in Congress.** I'm honored to have the trust of voters AND of President Trump whose endorsement helped put me over the top.

While I'm over the moon to be here today, I'm also reminded of the stakes of this Special Election...

House Republicans are BARELY clinging to their Majority and control of the House. I'll say this in a different way: If Democrats manage to win this Special Election and the two others for Mike Waltz and Elise Stefanik, they'll sweep back into power THIS YEAR.

That's why I'm working with Majority Leader Steve Scalise to sweep all three Special Elections - and save our Majority - so we can deliver on President Trump's agenda.

**_[If you want to support these critical efforts, I humbly ask every Conservative in America to kick in a few bucks before my Special Election.](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=8f96d341b0554beeb36f5c0ab8e831a5&_e=MMmaXO80yNz1HHYTbXOZDe4Gr7gjNjGWwKlhZfyCAUCJu3tGkdsbctnEZ-KUbyfWbIcploqRWo1tl1MS4MrhLhON2BUOTELhtnZZnE5bmW6-1qcHTLxbkKc-62G908hyg29oH5TL-WGKhjA4TDmbzGIiBd7wxTLkzUirRoLzhLIlH9RW3s7noYoAwIs6wdPTuX_Iv_au9A3ima0ewE06ZLtqzPt8HFKaZ1pVxTfgPSs82s88fvHpIVpcS9ddkFiSM3KR6O1lRQFrgOcwzzLXbbvL9DIUnsmM8yKDVsBeq3I9DJIFN4jUSFu0dlTwszqV9XKD3hk8qLDcH6idHTFvxjyAzWrLQA6Z021ctTtD6UJdivwg-s26LVI2b3mOe4KpGQ9JHcEb6854s69OjDPC6djYdmcOvAZWQwM00FtVh-U%3D "If you want to support these critical efforts, I humbly ask every Conservative in America to kick in a few bucks before my Special Election. _Would you be willing to step up when we need you most? _

Serving the State of Florida has been an honor of a lifetime. I went from refilling ketchup bottles at my family's seafood restaurant to being the CFO and Fire Marshal for the Sunshine State, and now being the Trump-endorsed GOP nominee to replace MAGA Warrior Matt Gaetz.

But I can only take this experience to Congress if I defeat the Democrats in this race.

Special Elections are notoriously expensive and Democrats are desperate to win back the House. **_[That's why I'm teaming up with Leader Scalise to help raise $50,000 from this email alone in the next 24 hours.](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=8f96d341b0554beeb36f5c0ab8e831a5&_e=MMmaXO80yNz1HHYTbXOZDe4Gr7gjNjGWwKlhZfyCAUCJu3tGkdsbctnEZ-KUbyfWbIcploqRWo1tl1MS4MrhLhON2BUOTELhtnZZnE5bmW6-1qcHTLxbkKc-62G908hyg29oH5TL-WGKhjA4TDmbzGIiBd7wxTLkzUirRoLzhLIlH9RW3s7noYoAwIs6wdPTuX_Iv_au9A3ima0ewE06ZLtqzPt8HFKaZ1pVxTfgPSs82s88fvHpIVpcS9ddkFiSxlo1f6WxWc7FXJAeHZbfWrEslA69BElEpGHut89pNkLaM8OHPlG6U1aSZw6FwB7C3hu8vSyOjJPA73uuOazBIv-5aF-A4FjEXl9Q9QSmovviwmuEfa86dhrk5yN-1r1FYd9Og9xln8GvnBh8BcqCW5ZKe2LFsQ3wpTxEUZpCuHc%3D "That’s why I’m teaming up with Leader Scalise to help raise $50,000 from this email alone in the next 24 hours.")_**

**I know we can get there as long as everyone reading this agrees to send in just ten or twenty bucks. [Will you join me and Blue Amp Action today as a Founding Donor to my campaign? ](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0250a770-0803-4f49-9929-0cbf1df4032b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | [CONTRIBUTE](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta6ccf1d5-d3e5-4431-9e10-5329ae6fd513/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
