| I’m running for Congress because I love the Hudson Valley—it’s home. It’s where my husband and I set down roots and are raising our two children. But the truth is, the Hudson Valley has changed in ways that deeply concern me. I’ve seen firsthand how the price of housing has skyrocketed, making it harder and harder for families to afford to live here and how the cost of living has become unsustainable. And I know many local businesses—mom and pop shops that have been here for generations—are closing their doors. But the truth is, neither Albany nor Washington has been delivering the results our community deserves. Too many families are struggling, and it’s time for new leadership that actually understands the issues we face. As a former member of the School Board and now as a County Legislator in Rockland County, I’ve fought for people across every age group—from our youngest students to our most senior residents. I’ve always put our community first, and now, I’m ready to take that fight to Washington. I know how to get things done. In Rockland, I’ve worked across party lines to secure real progress. And I’m ready to bring that same determination and results-driven approach to Congress. We need a leader who understands our community, who knows how to build consensus, and who will always put the needs of the Hudson Valley first. But I can’t do it alone. This race is set to be one of the most competitive in the country in 2026, so we need to prepare now to flip this seat and defeat Republican Mike Lawler. [Will you contribute whatever you can today between my campaign and Blue Amp Action to help us kickstart this campaign and flip this district for the future of the Hudson Valley—and our country?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T553f75f4-d4e6-4958-aca8-32b659bb4917/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| Thank you, Beth Davidson

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T34641269-435e-4134-8d88-2ae0bc163b89/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

Hi Peter, We’ve been in session for almost a month now, and as a valued member of our organization, I want to make sure you’re up-to-date on all that we’ve been working on and all the heavy weight we’ve been lifting for our climate. [**Will you help us lift the weight of climate action this session?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/102643938/529813372/-733982340?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjMwYTE3YzcxLTE4ZjItZWYxMS05MGNiLTAwMjI0ODJhOTRmNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=5ORM7UGd88i4baGGfyYE7GjMXQX8GI4lXJoa5fcOKh8=&emci=b94ef37e-d3ef-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=30a17c71-18f2-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=2107230) Going into this session we anticipated having to do a great deal of defense on the climate progress we’ve already made. There have already been 2 Major Threats to our climate and environment: HB 3119 that would delay our clean truck rules and threaten our clean air, and SB 777, a reappeared Major Threat from previous sessions that would multiply up to 7 times the amount already paid for livestock confirmed killed or injured by wolves. Regardless of this defense, we set ambitious legislative goals, because that’s exactly what this moment requires. We’re already working hard to pass a transportation package that centers climate and equity, advance solutions for more affordable clean energy, protect Oregonians from sky-high rate hikes by holding utility companies accountable, andto safeguard our streamflows by protecting Oregon’s water. For more information on our [Priorities for a Healthy Oregon](https://click.everyaction.com/k/102643945/529813380/-932142823?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjMwYTE3YzcxLTE4ZjItZWYxMS05MGNiLTAwMjI0ODJhOTRmNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=5ORM7UGd88i4baGGfyYE7GjMXQX8GI4lXJoa5fcOKh8=&emci=b94ef37e-d3ef-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=30a17c71-18f2-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=2107230), please visit [this webpage](https://click.everyaction.com/k/102643948/529813386/-932142823?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjMwYTE3YzcxLTE4ZjItZWYxMS05MGNiLTAwMjI0ODJhOTRmNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=5ORM7UGd88i4baGGfyYE7GjMXQX8GI4lXJoa5fcOKh8=&emci=b94ef37e-d3ef-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=30a17c71-18f2-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=2107230). This isn’t the moment for us to back down on our commitments. Now is the time to stand up and show what Oregonians value and what we won’t stand for, while we continue to lead on climate action across the country. [**The more power we have united, the stronger we are, and therefore the more we can lift and accomplish. Will you help us lift the weight of climate action this session?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/102643952/529813390/-733982340?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjMwYTE3YzcxLTE4ZjItZWYxMS05MGNiLTAwMjI0ODJhOTRmNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=5ORM7UGd88i4baGGfyYE7GjMXQX8GI4lXJoa5fcOKh8=&emci=b94ef37e-d3ef-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=30a17c71-18f2-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=2107230)

| Together, I know we can do this. During Trump’s last presidential term, we didn’t back down. Instead, we made sure that Oregon’s clean air and water standards remained at the level they were before Trump took office. Here at OLCV, we understand the importance of state work. But what helped us make that difference? Our members like _you_. * A gift of $50 is all it takes to recruit a volunteer to write a letter to the editor (LTE);

clean_body: | | | Hi Peter, Happy Sunday! We're near the end of our winter membership drive, and we still need your help to secure the resources we need to get our Priorities for a Healthy Oregon across the finish line. Climate action starts with you. Sincerely, April Christenson (she/her) OLCV Development Director | Hi Peter, We’ve been in session for almost a month now, and as a valued member of our organization, I want to make sure you’re up-to-date on all that we’ve been working on and all the heavy weight we’ve been lifting for our climate. Going into this session we anticipated having to do a great deal of defense on the climate progress we’ve already made. There have already been 2 Major Threats to our climate and environment: HB 3119 that would delay our clean truck rules and threaten our clean air, and SB 777, a reappeared Major Threat from previous sessions that would multiply up to 7 times the amount already paid for livestock confirmed killed or injured by wolves. Regardless of this defense, we set ambitious legislative goals, because that’s exactly what this moment requires. We’re already working hard to pass a transportation package that centers climate and equity, advance solutions for more affordable clean energy, protect Oregonians from sky-high rate hikes by holding utility companies accountable, andto safeguard our streamflows by protecting Oregon’s water. For more information on our , please visit . This isn’t the moment for us to back down on our commitments. Now is the time to stand up and show what Oregonians value and what we won’t stand for, while we continue to lead on climate action across the country. | | | Together, I know we can do this. During Trump’s last presidential term, we didn’t back down. Instead, we made sure that Oregon’s clean air and water standards remained at the level they were before Trump took office. Here at OLCV, we understand the importance of state work. But what helped us make that difference? Our members like you. Our members are the driving force behind all of our work to protect our state’s natural legacy, and to fight for a climate safe future for all of us.** | | | | Here’s how your gift helps us stop these Major Threats and get our Priorities for a Healthy Oregon across the finish line: A gift of $50 is all it takes to recruit a volunteer to write a letter to the editor (LTE); A gift of $60 helps us recruit 5 people to talk to their legislators in person at a lobby day in Salem; And, $120 helps a volunteer testify for one of our priorities. With all of us lifting up these Priorities for a Healthy Oregon, and putting our foot down on these Major Threats, think of what we can accomplish. The fight begins with you. Thank you for your support. Much gratitude, Lindsey Scholten (she/her) OLCV Executive Director | | | | | ---|---|--- Oregon League of Conservation Voters 1110 SE Alder Suite 220 Portland, OR 97214 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: American Briefing
subject: Corporate Media Desperately Trying To Drive Wedge Between Trump, Musk. It Won’t Work.
body:
And Judge Won’t Immediately Dismiss Eric Adams Case

http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z3u9k85ge8759b94do0c52qukl6876glsa549mj8_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf8jmemj72sjkm1qj791lmkp79dhk6ep34t5l6cqb7dpjkorrbdt6e5p79c3l6uh7ac9km9qjccbnsor7fl9lmgqb3df161rn9cdhmir76pr02sqr8d5hmej3fddj4or7fljhe9qb0t9km4qu8oj5cpjm2op66prtfcpj6pqj2tf0ccj3ctul6po7bpdk6ioredbjm8gq48bi4bh28pr1c1j6apb2cpj649fg

Learn more about Jeeng http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zr6oplsbadmci00lmegl716hvkqtc4e2ig5h7gv0_rp22sh2s8i6eob0cpimaoj6cph238h5e8he485he5o75pt7k9r7b9jhe9qb0t9jkgqracjkmoq37chieiqj6d5jmspqcdtlmuh34t1jm4qb7dpnkvin2tdnqprrasjm6kqucdtjm5qj7cbme5p79c3l6cin2tdnqoq3bc3k6irj7df2eprt8oj5cpjm2op5e5qrfldl64qbatdlskqr8d5hmcin2tdnqorr7cbl6eonbodnmsrr49fg

name: Elise Stefanik
subject: We can’t afford to lose this fight
body:
I need you to see this

| | | | [](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/a3ga/?__vbtrk=Mjc2NzA5OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjc2NzA5OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
Friend, let me be blunt.
**The Far Left Democrats in DC hate me**.
They hate me because **I was one of the youngest Republican women ever elected to Congress**.
They hate me because **I shattered their narrative** by fighting unapologetically for conservative values.
And they hate me because **I helped lead the House GOP to victory** , taking the gavel away from Nancy Pelosi.
**_But most of all, they hate me because I won’t be silenced._**
That's why they’ve attacked me with every smear you can imagine...
They’ve called me every name in the book; traitor, extremist, insurrectionist, you name it. They won't stop coming after me because I’m on the frontlines defending **you** and **your values**.
[DEFEND CONSERVATIVE VALUES](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/a3ga/?__vbtrk=Mjc2NzA5OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjc2NzA5OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
Friend, the attacks aren’t just on me. The Democrats are coming after all of us. People in the public eye like me, and like President Trump are just in the way.
They want to destroy the Republican Majority and take back total control in Washington. Their radical machine is already flooding millions into critical races, desperate to seize power again.
And let me tell you something: if they regain control, they will crush every freedom-loving American who dares to resist their agenda.
**We cannot let that happen.**
**__[The only way to stop them is to keep fighting and that’s exactly what I’m going to do. But I can’t do it without you](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/a3ga/?__vbtrk=Mjc2NzA5OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjc2NzA5OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_._**
[DEFEND THE MAJORITY](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/a3ga/?__vbtrk=Mjc2NzA5OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjc2NzA5OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
This battle is expensive. **Lawsuits** , **investigations** , **campaign operations**... they all cost money.
But while the Democrats have woke billionaires and Leftist Hollywood elites bankrolling their schemes** __ we rely on grassroots patriots like you**.
**__[That’s why I’m asking you directly: Can I count on you to help us defend the House GOP and protect our majority](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/a3ga/?__vbtrk=Mjc2NzA5OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjc2NzA5OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_?_**
[DEFEND AMERICA](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/a3ga/?__vbtrk=Mjc2NzA5OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjc2NzA5OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
This fight is personal for me and for every Republican who refuses to back down.
We’re not just defending a majority, we’re defending America itself.
We’re defending YOU.
**_Time is short, and the stakes couldn’t be higher._**
Don’t let the Radical Left steamroll us.
**__[Please make a contribution today to help us keep fighting](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/a3ga/?__vbtrk=Mjc2NzA5OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjc2NzA5OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_._**
_Thank you for standing with me,_
**Elise Stefanik** Proud Conservative Fighter for America
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/a3ga/?__vbtrk=Mjc2NzA5OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjc2NzA5OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
P.S. The Democrats are mobilizing to take back the House. Every dollar you give today helps stop them in their tracks. Chip in here to help us defend the majority and protect the future of America.
| | [DEFEND THE HOUSE](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/a3ga/?__vbtrk=Mjc2NzA5OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjc2NzA5OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)

name: Team Tina Newsletter
subject: Our February newsletter has arrived! 🗞️
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Tina Kotek
body:
|
#
---
| | Hi Peter, Welcome to my team’s monthly newsletter — here’s what I’ve been up to this month! I know life can be busy, and your inbox can fill up with political emails, so I appreciate any time you can dedicate to reading these monthly newsletters. Thanks! — TK
---
* * *
**Governor Kotek doubles down on Oregon’s climate action**
Oregon has been leading the way for years on courageous state policies to fight climate change so we can build a clean energy future for our kids and grandkids. Climate action will continue in Oregon – regardless of what’s happening in Washington, DC.
[WATCH MORE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102644876/529816514/-803653937?v=2DLgvJ8t9c4&refcode=AU_TK_CL_GEN_NOA_AC_20250223_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMjZjMWY4YS0xYWYyLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AEmMHyYey_f7swOw5cDo9El70volDQcYxvO6EXMnlzo=&emci=6c5e3a67-16ef-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=c26c1f8a-1af2-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=15353729)
---
* * *
**We’re adding more shelter beds**
Communities across Oregon are stepping up to meet the challenge of addressing the homelessness crisis — including the Church at the Park and the community of Dallas, which recently opened new shelter beds and household spaces.
* * *
**We’re investing in women’s sports**
Hillsboro will be the new home of the Portland Thorns FC and Portland’s future WNBA team training facility!
* * *
**Governor Kotek releases AI Action Plan**
With Artificial Intelligence playing an increasingly important role in our lives, our state is working to use this new technology responsibly. Governor Kotek announced the finalization of the State Government AI Advisory Council’s Final Recommended Action Plan to align our state’s values with this new technology.

body:
The 2025 General Assembly Session
| | | | 2025 THE HONEY BADGER REPORT
---
| |
---
| |
---
| |
---
---
| 2025 SESSION THE GENERAL ASSEMBLY HAS OFFICIALLY ADJOURNED
---
|
# AMANDA CHASE
---
|
# VIRGINIA'S HONEY BADGER
---
| Dear Hello The 2025 Legislative Session is finally over.
The General Assembly adjourned Sine Die on Saturday, and is set to reconvene on Wednesday, April 2. For those not familiar with Latin, this means without any future date being designated (as for resumption) : indefinitely.
Meanwhile, over the next 30 days, the Governor will now review and take action on bills that passed and the budget.
The bills that have passed both the House, the Senate and have been signed by both the Democrat House Speaker Don Scott and Republican Lieutenant Governor Winsome Sears are [here](https://byh4wqwab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001KjZIycHdaGeNsV2utFbo0D-1gMxJ5fdJRu8Sk3i2LRx7VuWF664VJYZXT3VnJfmg5pbD_RGfs4WsZahfa0UHfRx87Ar_GKwtbhv8pSlqZJFgygR5inCLZh4lzutr6VuR4T79MNEoTbhl0jy8ETnnQRKb0KP1GIJWc56aU4vBMnoHhKbSjQNhl6sW5vfrNKO9SbQhRngrzcw6IysoondynpgZ5H3D8YHpJJnl3lzukQSXiPLEEykG1bIjhU9hycQeErTHiKmRp4Nzr25jUwL1hAp7PGJxxDfMceGysYHH74_aF2zlxndWfV1vvYIbm8tN8p9xt80HhkptGpsBNDkvPzf2bc2mRdSveesN-YYef0Fvs4IpTATgR8ObqK6eRoggzuCvPP1ZAZNFO9jwaJGoStHmA_XOzBaGGl1F_Nu_fr_4GIdu38jfTetGMFngd-ddL8fUPJawKy0=&c=a1ZICFQwbGDx3rEE2Z93bq3BlR2cHscP2i29oT-7pb_p5SgrurWS2w==&ch=C1IshPV3K3Vq--40lI6Xij_7I_uZ0-eN8sJT8hJvotdW9B3w-rX1rg==) .
Of the bills they both signed, I'm most concerned about these bills, and I think you will be too:

* [HB1607](https://byh4wqwab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001KjZIycHdaGeNsV2utFbo0D-1gMxJ5fdJRu8Sk3i2LRx7VuWF664VJYbroZXBBmP7hjjmd72Goqn-6E2wTKFaHPRuVYNZiqiJ_HFzq_MGvpQQ_dyvbEZLDrmiz5ifxDaBlhiWN-uIS37VZoVGN9sdlfZBCwmYukRTh6xb-qEaqqY4spmC_98iqfripB7NP78A&c=a1ZICFQwbGDx3rEE2Z93bq3BlR2cHscP2i29oT-7pb_p5SgrurWS2w==&ch=C1IshPV3K3Vq--40lI6Xij_7I_uZ0-eN8sJT8hJvotdW9B3w-rX1rg==) Purchase, sale, transfer, etc., of assault firearms and certain ammunition feeding devices prohibited; penalties.

* [HB1649](https://byh4wqwab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001KjZIycHdaGeNsV2utFbo0D-1gMxJ5fdJRu8Sk3i2LRx7VuWF664VJYbroZXBBmP7Gpi0LIFlPjGjM3HZ7QT3-dGnT1eLo6sdezo1e5RG-Qpm3GeTdSIpC9AYE8I8QPZgVdcq0S-HmQBMXJZjWt705BERnBYX9XZSwgYIdxM0uiAB48xn_73VL66_uqk0GhBy&c=a1ZICFQwbGDx3rEE2Z93bq3BlR2cHscP2i29oT-7pb_p5SgrurWS2w==&ch=C1IshPV3K3Vq--40lI6Xij_7I_uZ0-eN8sJT8hJvotdW9B3w-rX1rg==) Board of Medicine; continuing education; unconscious bias and cultural competency.

* [HB1678](https://byh4wqwab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001KjZIycHdaGeNsV2utFbo0D-1gMxJ5fdJRu8Sk3i2LRx7VuWF664VJYbroZXBBmP7xzx75Rk85aNlKtfeqOGQkZo6A8bn4YSD6OfzxSPWyxPkVwBV4NEHDTprDibtge_DeKm-4PfePpKtktjHTjfi1ZIB8QXpSJaqKPR2xcUP7kUjoARMOReO32M0xxzTX9dr&c=a1ZICFQwbGDx3rEE2Z93bq3BlR2cHscP2i29oT-7pb_p5SgrurWS2w==&ch=C1IshPV3K3Vq--40lI6Xij_7I_uZ0-eN8sJT8hJvotdW9B3w-rX1rg==) School board policies; parental notification; safe storage of prescription drugs and firearms in the household.

* [HB1977](https://byh4wqwab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001KjZIycHdaGeNsV2utFbo0D-1gMxJ5fdJRu8Sk3i2LRx7VuWF664VJYbroZXBBmP78XsyAk_dqhhSU6pCwPcCUCdLbJsQf-0nTIDJOJP0RE2BJSBu3Tzm55dkD74n-oojZrJPOYYZucD3AJ_M-IS99VrmUAAmdCetHKsOlIo1olVSMEegWcFH_MikZQCLmBgr&c=a1ZICFQwbGDx3rEE2Z93bq3BlR2cHscP2i29oT-7pb_p5SgrurWS2w==&ch=C1IshPV3K3Vq--40lI6Xij_7I_uZ0-eN8sJT8hJvotdW9B3w-rX1rg==) Weapons; possession prohibited in a hospital that provides mental health or developmental services.

* [HB2631](https://byh4wqwab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001KjZIycHdaGeNsV2utFbo0D-1gMxJ5fdJRu8Sk3i2LRx7VuWF664VJYbroZXBBmP7mfX2tByfAvGT9WsBjteLLeXDqi21zsRzywOSm7ekB-vH2Ubm8ywgV8WRolXqgVtmiV0NvQzABC4Reb3K3FzTPiMsWE87E4MnKjB5eG9xLtZVEFhQnhWRnyznMVxqXAXA&c=a1ZICFQwbGDx3rEE2Z93bq3BlR2cHscP2i29oT-7pb_p5SgrurWS2w==&ch=C1IshPV3K3Vq--40lI6Xij_7I_uZ0-eN8sJT8hJvotdW9B3w-rX1rg==) Firearms; purchase, at least five day waiting period, penalty.

* [SB744](https://byh4wqwab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001KjZIycHdaGeNsV2utFbo0D-1gMxJ5fdJRu8Sk3i2LRx7VuWF664VJXvuFpOYu1dlUQg6TheLfNYZE9sBC4NeSDDMNwMo73xyh_byNjnskrHyrJ4Pno5oE7dRo911UdUNGtv8X5FtvQ66amrexrw6ahQ8SL5XjMNSNJQg2wpJcE-0mkmJSfShdBspJ7w-kUKi&c=a1ZICFQwbGDx3rEE2Z93bq3BlR2cHscP2i29oT-7pb_p5SgrurWS2w==&ch=C1IshPV3K3Vq--40lI6Xij_7I_uZ0-eN8sJT8hJvotdW9B3w-rX1rg==) Firearm transfers to another person from a person.

* [SB880](https://byh4wqwab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001KjZIycHdaGeNsV2utFbo0D-1gMxJ5fdJRu8Sk3i2LRx7VuWF664VJaJGqrPHZSOCorsJLIhKzUukwbidg0GcdsJ0pHUtMNehH4HFxeLxOBdWKFYru5XbP_vnsYMEs0TZduwqzDMirtw6JZ2X4grs8ez-pK2IEKZLuqpYToNplDac4N0vY3x_5aeFhk_UjKUO&c=a1ZICFQwbGDx3rEE2Z93bq3BlR2cHscP2i29oT-7pb_p5SgrurWS2w==&ch=C1IshPV3K3Vq--40lI6Xij_7I_uZ0-eN8sJT8hJvotdW9B3w-rX1rg==) Assault firearms; carrying in public areas prohibited, penalty.

* [SB881](https://byh4wqwab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001KjZIycHdaGeNsV2utFbo0D-1gMxJ5fdJRu8Sk3i2LRx7VuWF664VJaJGqrPHZSOCZwMLUmIe-Ku-ijQCjxkoQl_I_KPd8CGTje-rLO2qFWtg9roQKpHnSdrwCdtL_5Efdaqq1EEd4KGaS7NoOqPXzzNYaXZvKpHGWLGtoQecyebIV5q1qyzYxL-OozIjIBf1&c=a1ZICFQwbGDx3rEE2Z93bq3BlR2cHscP2i29oT-7pb_p5SgrurWS2w==&ch=C1IshPV3K3Vq--40lI6Xij_7I_uZ0-eN8sJT8hJvotdW9B3w-rX1rg==) Plastic firearms or receivers, unserialized firearms, etc.; transfer, etc., prohibited, penalties.

* [SB891](https://byh4wqwab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001KjZIycHdaGeNsV2utFbo0D-1gMxJ5fdJRu8Sk3i2LRx7VuWF664VJaJGqrPHZSOC2H3XM4apeSTYCIo5-zeZ--LqEd_QAIn7NYhwUpIlu4W9tcQ4QZTjYNNt2wEVhCViHgwXzZcCJBdzkiMLvY-GSB0JL6WN8gBhsei1OLs7KvEvJDYU8aaFigMDk1FRJ1W8&c=a1ZICFQwbGDx3rEE2Z93bq3BlR2cHscP2i29oT-7pb_p5SgrurWS2w==&ch=C1IshPV3K3Vq--40lI6Xij_7I_uZ0-eN8sJT8hJvotdW9B3w-rX1rg==) Firearms; five day waiting period, penalty.

* [SB1134](https://byh4wqwab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001KjZIycHdaGeNsV2utFbo0D-1gMxJ5fdJRu8Sk3i2LRx7VuWF664VJaJGqrPHZSOCYD27ckUrIzSsiexZwW0ijxpzL9Vr9c33Y8jGSVKVEGeUOE3OcDMG4z_GX3EFckzmkOJTfjO60wdpl2xgzhvbTZE8zfGddPEYrq1Z-0HZTs6Y4TKjfdq2H0Doy7amhYue&c=a1ZICFQwbGDx3rEE2Z93bq3BlR2cHscP2i29oT-7pb_p5SgrurWS2w==&ch=C1IshPV3K3Vq--40lI6Xij_7I_uZ0-eN8sJT8hJvotdW9B3w-rX1rg==) Firearms; storage in residence where minor or person prohibited from is present, penalty.

* [SB1182](https://byh4wqwab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001KjZIycHdaGeNsV2utFbo0D-1gMxJ5fdJRu8Sk3i2LRx7VuWF664VJUUS5UOJ1UXCn0thaldcZcVEZnXoyaMi-DKw0mzhf9D_u2EF_erWnXgX1hZTVh0BkxCpDn03v6Jvju1q26XvN21C-o298mAYZwZAtsk_Cc5T7KKyCEbSyOYbgLvKBEmzAM7tT7wIFL6-&c=a1ZICFQwbGDx3rEE2Z93bq3BlR2cHscP2i29oT-7pb_p5SgrurWS2w==&ch=C1IshPV3K3Vq--40lI6Xij_7I_uZ0-eN8sJT8hJvotdW9B3w-rX1rg==) Capitol Sq. or building owned/leased by the Commonwealth, carrying firearm/explosive material, etc.

Please call Governor Youngkin's office today and ask him to veto these bills for starters.
---
| |
---
There are also a number of bills coming out of the conference committees that I'm concerned about. I will let you know what these bills are once they are signed by both the House Speaker and the Lieutenant Governor.

### One such bill is: [HB1583 ](https://byh4wqwab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001KjZIycHdaGeNsV2utFbo0D-1gMxJ5fdJRu8Sk3i2LRx7VuWF664VJYZXT3VnJfmgO37YvOGLohV7pvi079D0PWrKmlTFRAEfEdOtJq6x_u1P30EgSB2vyV1sMcI5ovtKQQPpC3ckStUbulvYqtOupWiPPAk3LhZ01x1M6aovlnPNiRc8l6ON3Heg4TYuc11Y&c=a1ZICFQwbGDx3rEE2Z93bq3BlR2cHscP2i29oT-7pb_p5SgrurWS2w==&ch=C1IshPV3K3Vq--40lI6Xij_7I_uZ0-eN8sJT8hJvotdW9B3w-rX1rg==)Threats to discharge a firearm within or at buildings or means of transportation; penalties.

The Virginia General Assembly has adjourned for the 2025 Legislative Session, but our work is not over. Now we start lobbying the Governor.
Going forward, I will give you weekly updates along with suggested action items.
Session is over, but we must stay vigilant until we have killed these bad bills. For God and Country, Amanda Chase Virginia's Honey Badger Virginia Senator 2016-2023

---

clean_body: The 2025 General Assembly Session | | | | 2025 THE HONEY BADGER REPORT | | | | | | | 2025 SESSION THE GENERAL ASSEMBLY HAS OFFICIALLY ADJOURNED | AMANDA CHASE | VIRGINIA'S HONEY BADGER | Dear Hello The 2025 Legislative Session is finally over. The General Assembly adjourned Sine Die on Saturday, and is set to reconvene on Wednesday, April 2. For those not familiar with Latin, this means without any future date being designated (as for resumption) : indefinitely. Meanwhile, over the next 30 days, the Governor will now review and take action on bills that passed and the budget. The bills that have passed both the House, the Senate and have been signed by both the Democrat House Speaker Don Scott and Republican Lieutenant Governor Winsome Sears are == . Of the bills they both signed, I'm most concerned about these bills, and I think you will be too: == Purchase, sale, transfer, etc., of assault firearms and certain ammunition feeding devices prohibited; penalties. == Board of Medicine; continuing education; unconscious bias and cultural competency. == School board policies; parental notification; safe storage of prescription drugs and firearms in the household. == Weapons; possession prohibited in a hospital that provides mental health or developmental services. == Firearms; purchase, at least five day waiting period, penalty. == Firearm transfers to another person from a person. == Assault firearms; carrying in public areas prohibited, penalty. == Plastic firearms or receivers, unserialized firearms, etc.; transfer, etc., prohibited, penalties. == Firearms; five day waiting period, penalty. == Firearms; storage in residence where minor or person prohibited from is present, penalty. * == Capitol Sq. or building owned/leased by the Commonwealth, carrying firearm/explosive material, etc. Please call Governor Youngkin's office today and ask him to veto these bills for starters. | | There are also a number of bills coming out of the conference committees that I'm concerned about. I will let you know what these bills are once they are signed by both the House Speaker and the Lieutenant Governor. One such bill is: to discharge a firearm within or at buildings or means of transportation; penalties. The Virginia General Assembly has adjourned for the 2025 Legislative Session, but our work is not over. Now we start lobbying the Governor. Going forward, I will give you weekly updates along with suggested action items. Session is over, but we must stay vigilant until we have killed these bad bills. For God and Country, Amanda Chase Virginia's Honey Badger Virginia Senator 2016-2023 | | == | "The price of liberty is eternal vigilance." - Thomas Jefferson | | | | | | | | | IMPORTANT DATES | 2025 LEGISLATIVE SESSION IMPORTANT DATES Begins: Wednesday, January 8 at noon Crossover: Tuesday, February 4 Ends: Saturday, February 22 Last Day for Governor's Actions: Monday, March 24 Reconvene: Wednesday, April 2 | IMPORTANT LINKS | | == | | == | == | | == | | == | SUPPORT AMANDA HERE | Donations to the Honey Badger Report help offset the cost of bulk email services. Thanks to those who have already donated. | | == | Authorized and Paid for by Friends of Amanda Chase | | | | Friends of Amanda Chase | P.O. Box 250 | Appomattox, VA 24522 US | | | | | | |

body:
I wanted to reach out about a message from the White House that needs to be universally condemned.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20250223-4791-footer&t=1&akid=4791%2E420207%2EhkplPm)
Peter, I wanted to reach out about a message from the White House that needs to be universally condemned:
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250223?refcode=em20250223-4791&amount=3&refcode2=4791_420207_hkplPm&akid=4791%2E420207%2EhkplPm)
**The United States is a democracy. Not a monarchy, not an oligarchy. And Donald Trump is not — and never will be — king.**
That will never change, no matter how much Trump, Elon Musk, and their corrupt billionaire allies try.
I’m working to hold all of them accountable in Congress, but since I don’t take money from corporations or their PACS (and since I don’t seek out billionaires to use as ATMs), I’m counting on your grassroots support to keep standing strong.
[**So Peter, if you can, will you pitch in $3 to help me keep fighting back against this creeping authoritarianism coming out of the Trump administration?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250223?refcode=em20250223-4791&amount=3&refcode2=4791_420207_hkplPm&akid=4791%2E420207%2EhkplPm)

In solidarity,
Pramila Jayapal
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20250223-4791-footer&t=2&refcode2=4791_420207_hkplPm&akid=4791%2E420207%2EhkplPm)**

name: Mark Pukita, GFI
subject: 🚨 Feb 22, 2025: Must-Watch Videos Alert
body:
Don't miss out on our newest video releases! | | | [ ](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=3ba7c30dd7&e=5c740fa3e2)
---
|
**PLEASE READ THIS AND CONSIDER ACTING! IT WILL ONLY TAKE MINUTES BUT IS EXTREMELY IMPORTANT!**

Thank you for subscribing & staying subscribed!

**BE SURE TO HAVE YOUR FAMILY & FRIENDS "JOIN US":**

---
| [Join Us!](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=8f632bf279&e=5c740fa3e2 "Join Us!")
---
| | | ** **
**WATCH OUR VIDEOS AND ...
THEN LET US KNOW WHAT YOU THINK!**

---
|
[**One of the biggest issues we face in Ohio is the low-engagement (aka "low information" & "disengaged") voter.**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=f3f30d8ad6&e=5c740fa3e2) They often vote by name recognition or who their party tells them to vote for on party-mailed slate cards.

Getting the attention of this sector of the voting population is challenging because they are often disinterested in the nasty side of politics and have busy lives. They want the **facts** , they want **self-service** , **they don't want** to join **groups** or participate in **Zoom meetings** , they want **efficiency**.

With this in mind, we decided that using informational, short, videos could be a way to meet this challenge. We started doing short videos a little over a month ago, and we are now ready to start promoting them with zeal. **We need your help!** We would like you to do us a few favors. They are:

1) **Watch** a few of our videos.
2) **Give us your feedback** by commenting on the videos.
3) **Share** the videos with as many people as you can.
4) Be sure to **subscribe** & hit the notification bell to be alerted when we release new content.

We post our full videos everywhere we can, which includes Rumble, YouTube, X, Telegram, and Facebook. We are posting video excerpts, known as "shorts" and "reels", on Instagram and TikTok. The best way to find and follow (or subscribe) to GFI's various communication channels is to go to our "[**Linktree**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=fbda284902&e=5c740fa3e2)", which you can find by [**CLICKING HERE**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=e688ac7510&e=5c740fa3e2).

Thank you!

PS: Here are some samples of our videos:

**Episode: "Ohio Corruption: Appointment Patronage, Nepotism & Payback"**

[](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=650f39514e&e=5c740fa3e2)

# **Episode: " Hiding in Plain Sight: Ohio Government Waste"**

[](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=2c3dbc9f1f&e=5c740fa3e2)

# **Episode: " Ohio Public School Facts: Spending vs. Performance"**

**[](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=2958260d49&e=5c740fa3e2)**

**Episode: "5 Lies About Paper Ballots & Hand Counting"**

[](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=d54cf73fe5&e=5c740fa3e2)

---
| |
**Prior Issues of This Email
You May Find Valuable**

---
|
[**CLICK HERE for access to all past issues!**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=aa1d877a63&e=5c740fa3e2)

---
|
---
|
---
| Thank you for being a GFI **person** as part of the GFI **network**. We're always interested in how we can do a better job of connecting patriots across Ohio. If you want to communicate, we're here!

Best regards,

**Mark Pukita
A GFI Person
mark@gfiohio.com
614-499-0599 (c)
[GFIOhio.com](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=7f69587f77&e=5c740fa3e2)**
---
| | _Copyright © 2025 The Grassroots Freedom Initiative, All rights reserved._
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
The Grassroots Freedom Initiative4240 Hobbs Landing Dr WDublin, OH 43017-6025
[Add us to your address book](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/vcard?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=9877b1cc31)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/profile?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=9877b1cc31&e=5c740fa3e2&c=578f62ba9d) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=9877b1cc31&t=b&e=5c740fa3e2&c=578f62ba9d).

name: Jocelyn Benson for Governor
subject: Let us explain
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOCELYN BENSON FOR GOVERNOR
body:
Fundraising deadlines like the one we’re facing in a few days help us prepare for the tough road ahead.
# [](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/203?t=1&akid=119%2E181023%2Ex-L4gE)
Hi team,
[**In just a moment, we’re going to ask you to make a contribution to Jocelyn’s campaign for Governor of Michigan before our end-of-month fundraising deadline.**](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/239?c0=jmb-em-q12025.B7hgkZ&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20250223_PM1_V1_S1&t=2&akid=119%2E181023%2Ex-L4gE) But first, you deserve an explanation.
Here’s the truth: Winning in Michigan isn’t easy — far from it. Some recent statewide elections have been decided by just tens of thousands of votes, which _sounds_ like a lot but often represents a margin of just one or two percent.
Those are votes that knocking on a few more doors or running a few more ads could clinch.
**We’re not expecting Jocelyn’s race to be any different.** Republicans have a massive bullseye on flipping Michigan’s gubernatorial seat after Donald Trump won in 2024, meaning we’ll have to work even harder to win those handful of voters. That’s where you come in.
Deadlines like this one help us prepare for the tough road ahead. Our fundraising goals represent important benchmarks that we need to hit to spread our message across Michigan, train volunteers, hire staff, run ads, and more — all to ensure we’re running the best campaign possible to elect Jocelyn as the next Governor of Michigan.
And with how close the last elections have been here in Michigan, we can’t take any chances.
[**That’s why we’re asking: Will you pitch in a donation today to help us reach our fundraising goal and give us the resources we need to fuel Jocelyn’s fight for Michigan?**](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/239?c0=jmb-em-q12025.B7hgkZ&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20250223_PM1_V1_S1&t=3&akid=119%2E181023%2Ex-L4gE)
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
| [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/263?c0=jmb-em-q12025.faQQoW&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20250223_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=119%2E181023%2Ex-L4gE)
---
[CHIP IN $25 NOW](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/264?c0=jmb-em-q12025.M00eo_&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20250223_PM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=119%2E181023%2Ex-L4gE)
---
| [CHIP IN $50 NOW](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/265?c0=jmb-em-q12025.MaH6TA&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20250223_PM1_V1_S1&t=6&akid=119%2E181023%2Ex-L4gE)
---
[CHIP IN $100 NOW](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/266?c0=jmb-em-q12025.slPEnH&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20250223_PM1_V1_S1&t=7&akid=119%2E181023%2Ex-L4gE)
---
| [CHIP IN $250 NOW](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/605?c0=jmb-em-q12025.UvwKrI&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20250223_PM1_V1_S1&t=8&akid=119%2E181023%2Ex-L4gE)

Team Benson

name: NO! NO! NO! [DOTL]
subject: Musk plans $200 million in cuts at the Social Security Administration…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democracy on the Line PAC
body:
Will you let Musk destroy Social Security, Peter?

|

He fought tirelessly for the working families of The Bronx, and now, he's fighting for those families and for progressive values in Congress. He is the first openly gay Afro Latino ever elected to Congress. Ritchie is a champion for progressive policies to fight poverty and to improve the lives of families just like the one he was raised in. Peter, please, consider making a =. To make the most powerful lasting impact and to join Ritchie in the fight for progressive values in Congress, make a=. Click here to . Click here to . | | = =

name: Emma, Heartland Patriots
subject: Reintroduction
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce
body:
And a note about the critical mission + work of Heartland Patriots
#
Hey Peter, it’s Emma from Heartland Patriots.
You might remember reading some emails from me during Lucas’ campaign last cycle — and today, I’m excited to be back in your inbox to share more about the critical mission of Heartland Patriots. **Will you please give me a moment to explain?**
It would be an understatement to say that the last few weeks have been chaotic.
We’ve got a dangerous, unelected billionaire pillaging vital public services for everyday Americans. Tens of thousands of workers have unjustly lost their jobs. And every day there seems to be another blatant attack on the fundamental rights + freedoms enshrined in our Constitution.
All the while, we’ve got too many elected leaders — at all levels of government — willing to sit back and watch it happen. Or worse, willing to add fuel to the fire.
We’re seeing that on full display where I live in Missouri, as many state legislators continue trying to divide us while wages stagnate and housing + grocery prices skyrocket. They’re even attempting to overturn the will of Missouri voters, for amendments voted on as recently as November of last year, simply because they like ruling over us.
It’s absolutely out of control — and I bet it might feel that way where you live too.
Now more than ever, we need to unite behind candidates up and down the ballot who are dedicated to holding the line and fighting back. And that’s why I’m reaching out to tell you more about Heartland Patriots today.
**Heartland Patriots is committed to supporting candidates who will boldly stand up to the corrupt politicians + oligarchs wreaking havoc in and robbing our country.** These are candidates who are working tirelessly to secure our constitutional rights, restore our hard-won + hard-fought freedoms, and actually make lives better for real working people in communities like mine and yours.
It’s our goal to have the resources to help these candidates right from the jump — and that’s where _you_ come in. With your help, we can leverage our record-setting grassroots movement to help candidates compete in and win tough races across the country.
**That’s why I’m asking:[Will you chip in $10, $25, or just whatever you can to Heartland Patriots today? We’re just getting started, so anything you can give really will make a big impact over the weeks, months, and years ahead.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/85992?refcode=em20250223-8784&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=8784%2E614464%2E8yKB3I)**

| Peter,

Here at Emerge, we believe in the power of bold, community-driven leaders who understand the challenges their neighbors face and will prioritize the needs of their community.

That’s why our team is investing in the next generation of women leaders who represent the New American Majority of _Black, Brown, and Indigenous women, women of color, as well as young, LGBTQ+, and unmarried women._

name: Leslie Hinkson, LCV
subject: Honoring and Celebrating Black History Month
body:
To view this mail in a browser, copy https://links.messages.lcv.org/servlet/MailView?ms=MTIxNjAyMDkS1&r=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&j=MjE2MDMyNTc2NQS2&mt=1&rt=0 into your browser.
Hello Peter, My name is Leslie Hinkson, and I am the Chief Officer for Racial Justice &
Equity here at League of Conservation Voters. Typically, Black History Month is
an annual celebration of the role Black people have played in shaping U.S.
history. This year, however, the very idea of celebrating this history has come
under attack, and the legacy of leaders in the fight for civil rights in this
country has been co-opted to serve the interests of Trump’s and Musk’s extreme
agendas to roll back much of the progress made by Black Americans since Black
History Month was officially recognized in 1976. If you asked people in this country to name one significant Black figure in U.S.
history, Martin Luther King, Jr. would probably be the person named most often.
But even with that level of name recognition, most people in the U.S. only know
a fraction of his contributions to making this a more just and inclusive
society. They might know about Dr. King’s “I Have a Dream” speech, and that he
was assassinated for his tireless activism, but the majority are unaware of his
role in creating the Poor People’s Campaign. In his work to ensure that Black people were able to exercise their civil rights
and enjoy full citizenship, Dr. King realized that economic inequality and
poverty were impediments that were as or more significant to achieving that
dream than Jim Crow. And poverty made it difficult for Americans of all racial
and ethnic backgrounds to access the rights of full citizenship. These first few weeks of the Trump administration have revealed a president who
is willing to double down on wealth inequality and who cares more about finding
money to pay for tax breaks for billionaires than for food and housing for the
vast majority of people in the U.S., especially the poor and income insecure.
This is not the future Dr. King died for. For King, justice and inclusion were frames through which to make this nation
stronger. Trump’s vision couldn’t be more different. LCV will continue to honor the legacy of Dr. King and other Black activists as
we work toward a more just and equitable future for all. Onward, Leslie Hinkson
Chief Officer for Racial Justice and Equity
League of Conservation Voters This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you,update your contact information https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/ContactInformation?spMailingID=12160209&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MjE2MDMyNTc2NQS2&spReportId=MjE2MDMyNTc2NQS2.Click here to unsubscribe https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/Unsubscribe?spMailingID=12160209&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MjE2MDMyNTc2NQS2&spReportId=MjE2MDMyNTc2NQS2 from our supporter list.Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback here mailto:feedback@lcv.org?subject=, or just reply to this email! Thanks for your support.

740 15th St NW, Suite 700
Washington, DC 20005
202-785-8683

Typically, Black History Month is an annual celebration of the role Black people have played in shaping U.S. history. This year, however, the very idea of celebrating this history has come under attack, and the legacy of leaders in the fight for civil rights in this country has been co-opted to serve the interests of Trump’s and Musk’s extreme agendas to roll back much of the progress made by Black Americans since Black History Month was officially recognized in 1976. If you asked people in this country to name one significant Black figure in U.S. history, Martin Luther King, Jr. would probably be the person named most often. But even with that level of name recognition, most people in the U.S. only know a fraction of his contributions to making this a more just and inclusive society. They might know about Dr. King’s “I Have a Dream” speech, and that he was assassinated for his tireless activism, but the majority are unaware of his role in creating the Poor People’s Campaign. In his work to ensure that Black people were able to exercise their civil rights and enjoy full citizenship, Dr. King realized that economic inequality and poverty were impediments that were as or more significant to achieving that dream than Jim Crow. And poverty made it difficult for Americans of all racial and ethnic backgrounds to access the rights of full citizenship. These first few weeks of the Trump administration have revealed a president who is willing to double down on wealth inequality and who cares more about finding money to pay for tax breaks for billionaires than for food and housing for the vast majority of people in the U.S., especially the poor and income insecure. This is not the future Dr. King died for. For King, justice and inclusion were frames through which to make this nation stronger. Trump’s vision couldn’t be more different. LCV will continue to honor the legacy of Dr. King and other Black activists as we work toward a more just and equitable future for all. body:
I went from refilling ketchup bottles at my family’s seafood restaurant to being the CFO and Fire Marshal for the Sunshine State, and now being the Trump-endorsed GOP nominee to replace MAGA Warrior Matt Gaetz.
I’m officially the GOP nominee for the FL-01 Special Election to replace Matt Gaetz in Congress.
| |
---
| | | Hi - my name is Jimmy Patronis.

**As of 8:07 PM Tuesday, January 28th, I 'm officially the GOP nominee for the FL-01 Special Election to replace Matt Gaetz in Congress.** I'm honored to have the trust of voters AND of President Trump whose endorsement helped put me over the top.

While I'm over the moon to be here today, I'm also reminded of the stakes of this Special Election...

House Republicans are BARELY clinging to their Majority and control of the House. I'll say this in a different way: If Democrats manage to win this Special Election and the two others for Mike Waltz and Elise Stefanik, they'll sweep back into power THIS YEAR.

That's why I'm working with Majority Leader Steve Scalise to sweep all three Special Elections - and save our Majority - so we can deliver on President Trump's agenda.

**_[If you want to support these critical efforts, I humbly ask every Conservative in America to kick in a few bucks before my Special Election.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=bd29b3c0ec9d4db5b5aecb649cff6079&_e=qDEPbDMOqAc5Ha_xm_XQsUKxZMGDD38oWtz2Z6kTQxUipCVzqvnEuQVCjPufgbD4-VLjsFJ4VoYazmWQOAw2xDelri10aiTIXyuvy21-ztpBOWXuM8E8n_2fEyKdNIrtllU_QmJXKkQxyqCES7UvSINQrcWBMXwkEOZc7ptYHRMcqXdu2ENKlahpHUu2DhNfBg4CuFGTEU-gU_V_1fj0JHns-63J_ncHcukRrENpNUi41nHHVwsyCdUgThuyr8zoHeEinn5o5QUU0YBYs58dZ1Y7fgQk3DLk7JgUOP-YU1SZERigZ0cctfG1PjplHQUDyjcVcA78E8PLBBp6VsgY2xCYsZH6jMadGbuEUD0l7vI4vlF68RzqXxyLfqYmHIVU-j6LdCXKCUOYjCKUqAeDCf3K0Kn_wwPkhBKRGnNxorg%3D "If you want to support these critical efforts, I humbly ask every Conservative in America to kick in a few bucks before my Special Election. Serving the State of Florida has been an honor of a lifetime. I went from refilling ketchup bottles at my family's seafood restaurant to being the CFO and Fire Marshal for the Sunshine State, and now being the Trump-endorsed GOP nominee to replace MAGA Warrior Matt Gaetz.

But I can only take this experience to Congress if I defeat the Democrats in this race.

Special Elections are notoriously expensive and Democrats are desperate to win back the House. **_[That's why I'm teaming up with Leader Scalise to help raise $50,000 from this email alone in the next 24 hours.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=bd29b3c0ec9d4db5b5aecb649cff6079&_e=qDEPbDMOqAc5Ha_xm_XQsUKxZMGDD38oWtz2Z6kTQxUipCVzqvnEuQVCjPufgbD4-VLjsFJ4VoYazmWQOAw2xDelri10aiTIXyuvy21-ztpBOWXuM8E8n_2fEyKdNIrtllU_QmJXKkQxyqCES7UvSINQrcWBMXwkEOZc7ptYHRMcqXdu2ENKlahpHUu2DhNfBg4CuFGTEU-gU_V_1fj0JHns-63J_ncHcukRrENpNUi41nHHVwsyCdUgThuyr8zoHeEinn5o5QUU0YBYs58dZ4hKi33-ERNIWxd6i1eq_37Sbgrn5XLthsMgy7KI2HzhSEo4WSwuhTED__l6eIU1y6rZ4PkHLyu5HmuYbHM2xFGnPGLkg4KLusrGWGFKu9iBlVFUe2DZN-DnfaasZTQCQjhWq3dgKrfm35J4cc9xc7o%3D "That’s why I’m teaming up with Leader Scalise to help raise $50,000 from this email alone in the next 24 hours.")_**

I JUST won my primary so hitting this goal so quickly would be a major show of force in this race.

**I know we can get there as long as everyone reading this agrees to send in just ten or twenty bucks. Can you do that for me?** ****[**YES >>**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=bd29b3c0ec9d4db5b5aecb649cff6079&_e=qDEPbDMOqAc5Ha_xm_XQsUKxZMGDD38oWtz2Z6kTQxUipCVzqvnEuQVCjPufgbD4-VLjsFJ4VoYazmWQOAw2xDelri10aiTIXyuvy21-ztpBOWXuM8E8n_2fEyKdNIrtllU_QmJXKkQxyqCES7UvSINQrcWBMXwkEOZc7ptYHRMcqXdu2ENKlahpHUu2DhNfBg4CuFGTEU-gU_V_1fj0JHns-63J_ncHcukRrENpNUi41nHHVwsyCdUgThuyr8zoHeEinn5o5QUU0YBYs58dZ64_z_A3KYZmH7aqox3GgwRhaRdX5R6-6mJrLXNzWK-MmtV3FJlu0_KW7-vh6MxDI69DtitNTXIzYF1tLddl48HHeYPvBNgW8cbwO9GNUe7oT3uEOR969-vWPZnT5piLWz3If31zldFMlg-CgVgEXBA%3D)_[**NO >>**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=bd29b3c0ec9d4db5b5aecb649cff6079&_e=qDEPbDMOqAc5Ha_xm_XQsUKxZMGDD38oWtz2Z6kTQxUipCVzqvnEuQVCjPufgbD4-VLjsFJ4VoYazmWQOAw2xDelri10aiTIXyuvy21-ztpBOWXuM8E8n_2fEyKdNIrtllU_QmJXKkQxyqCES7UvSINQrcWBMXwkEOZc7ptYHRMcqXdu2ENKlahpHUu2DhNfBg4CuFGTEU-gU_V_1fj0JHns-63J_ncHcukRrENpNUi41nHHVwsyCdUgThuyr8zoHeEinn5o5QUU0YBYs58dZyUq7F4PsRYxfPoybZwfcxJ_IhS5EtY9T4ok37Gwpw-oK3qqE-bPkOTNGKPNAm9dMCg9_FAQsWOFuIaqdKl6cjbmsZrR2XzakOi2p_luOQtL6yyYM4nr_rkbXtkEgjYMH1zFcZ3spjSXJ5959bjOf7k%3D)****Thank you for hearing me out.

clean_body: I went from refilling ketchup bottles at my family’s seafood restaurant to being the CFO and Fire Marshal for the Sunshine State, and now being the Trump-endorsed GOP nominee to replace MAGA Warrior Matt Gaetz. I’m officially the GOP nominee for the FL-01 Special Election to replace Matt Gaetz in Congress. | | | | | Hi - my name is Jimmy Patronis. As of 8:07 PM Tuesday, January 28th, I 'm officially the GOP nominee for the FL-01 Special Election to replace Matt Gaetz in Congress. I'm honored to have the trust of voters AND of President Trump whose endorsement helped put me over the top. While I'm over the moon to be here today, I'm also reminded of the stakes of this Special Election... House Republicans are BARELY clinging to their Majority and control of the House. I'll say this in a different way: If Democrats manage to win this Special Election and the two others for Mike Waltz and Elise Stefanik, they'll sweep back into power THIS YEAR. That's why I'm working with Majority Leader Steve Scalise to sweep all three Special Elections - and save our Majority - so we can deliver on President Trump's agenda. "If you want to support these critical efforts, I humbly ask every Conservative in America to kick in a few bucks before my Special Election. " Would you be willing to step up when we need you most? | "Jimmy Patronis and Donald Trump" Serving the State of Florida has been an honor of a lifetime. I went from refilling ketchup bottles at my family's seafood restaurant to being the CFO and Fire Marshal for the Sunshine State, and now being the Trump-endorsed GOP nominee to replace MAGA Warrior Matt Gaetz. But I can only take this experience to Congress if I defeat the Democrats in this race. Special Elections are notoriously expensive and Democrats are desperate to win back the House. "That’s why I’m teaming up with Leader Scalise to help raise $50,000 from this email alone in the next 24 hours." I JUST won my primary so hitting this goal so quickly would be a major show of force in this race. I know we can get there as long as everyone reading this agrees to send in just ten or twenty bucks. Can you do that for me? ** you for hearing me out. I look forward to fighting for the America First values that you, me, President Trump, Leader Scalise, and Matt Gaetz believe in. God bless you, - Jimmy JIMMY PATRONIS GOP Nominee for the FL-01 Special Election | | | "First 100 Day Survey" It 's Majority Leader Scalise. We will make the first sprint of the new Congress the most efficient political operation this country has ever seen. But let’s be clear: Virginians will remember this when it’s time to vote in November, and they’ll remember who stood up for them. While Abigail Spanberger is actively speaking out on Trump’s attacks on Virginia’s workers, Youngkin and his ally, Lt. Governor Winsome Earle-Sears, are backing Trump’s destructive agenda. = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you, Team Spanberger * | | Paid for by Spanberger for Governor Spanberger for Governor P.O. Box 3121 Glen Allen, VA 23058 United States | = =

For over 30 years, Sanford Bishop has been listening to his constituents in Middle and Southwest Georgia and delivering concrete action through critical legislation.

He’s committed to supporting local businesses and investing in the next generation of Georgians through our public education system — especially in the face of attacks on Georgia’s students, families, and workers from the Trump Administration.

We couldn’t be prouder to have Rep. Bishop representing the Peach State — not just during Black History Month, but 24 hours a day, 7 days a week, 365 days a year.

name: Gabby Giffords
subject: Respectfully asking you
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
We knew that when Donald Trump was elected in November, there would be challenges ahead.
#

Dear friends,
I am reaching out to you today to respectfully ask if you can [**make a $3 contribution to GIFFORDS PAC.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-feb25.m4Qwdn&refcode=em250223-1-b&t=1&akid=10022%2E3935704%2EWBZ6YF)
We knew that when Donald Trump was elected in November, there would be challenges ahead. And now, we are seeing firsthand that Donald Trump and the MAGA-right wasted no time in trying to reverse our hard-earned gun safety progress.
Some of the most extreme members of Congress have introduced bills pushing for the abolishment of the Bureau of Alcohol, Tobacco, Firearms and Explosives, as well as advocating for national concealed carry reciprocity. The other week, President Trump signed an executive order that serves as the first step in undoing the gun safety progress we made under President Biden and Vice President Harris’ tenure.
The challenges we’re up against won’t be easy. But I know a thing or two about getting through tough times.
I was shot in 2011, and I have been on a recovery journey every day since. Some days are harder than others, but even on the most difficult days, I refuse to give up hope.
It’s the same way I refuse to give up hope for our gun violence prevention movement, even in these moments of uncertainty.
I will be fighting each and every day for a future free from gun violence, just as I have since GIFFORDS’ founding twelve years ago. Can I count on you to stand by me in this fight?
[**If so, I’m hoping you will use this link or the buttons below to make a $3 contribution to GIFFORDS PAC today.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-feb25.m4Qwdn&refcode=em250223-1-b&t=2&akid=10022%2E3935704%2EWBZ6YF)

name: Janelle Bynum
subject: Lessons from a sports mom
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JANELLE BYNUM FOR CONGRESS
body:
As a sports mom (and fellow sports lover), I’ve learned it’s not about the effort you bring to game day that ultimately matters. It’s the work you put in long before the big game that makes a world of difference. All of the early morning team meetings or the late night practices — these are the things that fuel a team’s success.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102648925/529828681/476240477?amount=3&refcode=em_fr_2025.02.23_b1_jb_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNmY2ZTAwMzktMmVmMi1lZjExLTkwY2ItMDAyMjQ4MmE5NGY0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=2B1wE6gjvIskH54Rs3NIqocoy9p4NuVz9xQQptGKlgE=)
I wear many hats these days: Congresswoman, mom, wife, daughter, small business owner, proud Oregonian... etc.

But one of my favorite ‘hats’ that I wear is **sports mom.**
**[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102648926/529828682/476240477?amount=3&refcode=em_fr_2025.02.23_b1_jb_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNmY2ZTAwMzktMmVmMi1lZjExLTkwY2ItMDAyMjQ4MmE5NGY0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=2B1wE6gjvIskH54Rs3NIqocoy9p4NuVz9xQQptGKlgE=)**_Took a break from the campaign trail to watch my son, Ellis, at a Ducks game last year._
As a sports mom (and fellow sports lover), I’ve learned it’s not about the effort you bring to game day that ultimately matters. **It’s the work you put in long before the big game that makes a world of difference.**

All of the early morning team meetings or the late night practices — these are the things that fuel a team’s success.

Well, I’ve learned that campaigns are the exact same way. It’s the work you put in long before the exciting campaign rallies or the TV interviews or the ballots arrive that fuels a campaign to victory.

That’s why I’m writing. **Even though Team Bynum is a ways away from the next “game day,” it’s going to take a full team effort to bring home the win once again.**

[**Early grassroots support is the best thing we can do to prepare, so I need to ask: Is there any amount you can pitch in to my re-election campaign today? Even $1, $3, or $5 will make an impact.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102648927/529828683/476240477?amount=3&refcode=em_fr_2025.02.23_b1_jb_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNmY2ZTAwMzktMmVmMi1lZjExLTkwY2ItMDAyMjQ4MmE5NGY0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=2B1wE6gjvIskH54Rs3NIqocoy9p4NuVz9xQQptGKlgE=)

Thanks for being a member of this team,

_Janelle_

name: AMAC Action
subject: A ticking time-bomb set by Joe Biden and Kamala Harris
body:
Because, here’s the scary part...| |
---
| | It isn’t rocket-science. It’s basic math.
---
| |
---
[](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=867d5cd7440b4b658e02e1e3441f2df5&_e=vgygCpMDfNJ0xjuYbXrPWPP1RcaDpD-K-jrKmm3Y5bEDBLgZ15VLNWqPY5WkSTSw0sT8idWZ6lZxTM_9XDRD2WJtbavpfYMuUqAweXEyj46ZkwZ_4Vl4pLzbSTcPxAXImQuqq0OzoV-j4fO1QESC-wXRKhWRfvzTL4EWwHxk9WahlzntGTCyFz1pl1fXQwG_825BJpWA6aToORbHU3bZ234DZWjdENi66K8B4jKoRgwRDuWFlGLWa3Dzy-aoyrucBv6zK4qwx1GCVNiU_xaMHvf8WdIEnhFR20DSWnwq_VwBtwnjw3dHc2ZignVzVP9JDlxwRpq37Ef3-NTZbvwpoTARD70XI_mAAnWokBn1sGM%3D)
---
| | **“****A disproportionate number of illegal immigrants go to blue states, they amplify the effect of a blue state vote. My understanding is that Democrats would lose approximately 20 seats in the house if illegals were not counted in census. And that’s also 20 less electoral votes for president.**** ** **So, illegals absolutely do impact who controls the House and the presidency.”****~** Elon Musk
---
| | Fellow Conservative,Elon Musk is right. It isn’t rocket-science. It’s basic math. It’s also a ticking time-bomb set by Joe Biden and Kamala Harris – in the form of 11.5 million illegals entering our country on their watch – one which will explode shortly after President Trump leaves office in 2029.While you and I have no doubt President Trump will deliver on his promise to secure the border, this threat will not go away. The truth is, without immediate action, these illegal aliens will be counted in the U.S. Census, which determines both the apportionment of seats in the House of Representatives _and_ the number of electoral votes given to each state. Whether they came because, four years ago, Kamala Harris and Joe Biden prompted them to “surge to the border” for asylum or because of blue-states offering sanctuary status, “free” health care, “free” cell phones, “free” housing, and “free” college...it doesn’t matter. The result is the same.Your vote is _already_ being **watered down** in Congress. Your vote is _already_ being **watered down** in the Electoral College.And every day reports are popping up of non-citizens, illegal aliens, and convicted felons being registered to vote in cities and entire swing-states across the country, which means your vote may be fully **canceled out in future elections**. **_American elections should be decided by American citizens._****[If you agree then please sign your “BAN NON-CITIZEN VOTING” Petition to Amend the U.S. Constitution so the chaos we’re seeing now _never_ happens again in America.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=867d5cd7440b4b658e02e1e3441f2df5&_e=vgygCpMDfNJ0xjuYbXrPWPP1RcaDpD-K-jrKmm3Y5bEDBLgZ15VLNWqPY5WkSTSw0sT8idWZ6lZxTM_9XDRD2WJtbavpfYMuUqAweXEyj46ZkwZ_4Vl4pLzbSTcPxAXImQuqq0OzoV-j4fO1QESC-wXRKhWRfvzTL4EWwHxk9WahlzntGTCyFz1pl1fXQwG_825BJpWA6aToORbHU3bZ2zlH4L3c0lTVVKg5G2fw7MwR4L7O-YN_T7Y4TI2msi_TuR9JdozBhiHW9GPwMMdddON1hFUVRBdQIpFtqSBKiSrMkNsMcrFMqp5iGsAwi5IEjkC3_mGYCxdMYa0zAKwLWD_RhID9UFtgmOKHL_yw0o4%3D)**Because, here’s the scary part:The last census took place in 2020. That was _before_ the 11.5 million illegal aliens who invaded our country under Joe Biden and Kamala Harris. To put it in context, there are only 8 states in America with a population over 11 million. So, it’s as if the radical Left just imported the 9th largest state in America. That’s more than North Carolina (10.8 million), Michigan (10 million), New Jersey (9.2 million), or Virginia (8.7 million).You get the picture. That’s why urgent action is needed to pass a Constitutional Amendment to ban illegal aliens from voting and from being counted for purposes of congressional and electoral vote apportionment. The next census in less than 6 years away. If those 11.5 million illegal aliens are counted in the census or are allowed to vote in the intervening years, you and I simply won’t have a country. **[It’s vitally important that your representatives in Washington and in your state legislature hear this demand directly from you.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=867d5cd7440b4b658e02e1e3441f2df5&_e=vgygCpMDfNJ0xjuYbXrPWPP1RcaDpD-K-jrKmm3Y5bEDBLgZ15VLNWqPY5WkSTSw0sT8idWZ6lZxTM_9XDRD2WJtbavpfYMuUqAweXEyj46ZkwZ_4Vl4pLzbSTcPxAXImQuqq0OzoV-j4fO1QESC-wXRKhWRfvzTL4EWwHxk9WahlzntGTCyFz1pl1fXQwG_825BJpWA6aToORbHU3bZ2_z3-9_gS5w1JgbekasyvIrNcWV4fjJTT10k7qbAGELSX0l9QRPLTbpFDAxEwQS8oOu6O_BuDB2rWbHrdWIK0g1MVOUq4iFOIzOAn66msv5fG2rXez2DO8jjBH3slosYf2fLcGi5IdkrvZQD30QhLk0%3D)** Because, quite honestly, they think they can pull a fast one on you. They think you and I will be so relieved to see the border secure again and criminal illegal aliens deported, that you and I will be oblivious to this threat lying dormant under our very eyes.No way.My name is Rebecca Weber. I’m the chairwoman of AMAC Action. **AMAC Action is the most influential advocacy group in the country when it comes to standing for the values of conservative Seniors.****We’ve got 72 chapters and 300 volunteer delegates, who are the “feet on the street” advocates who contact Members of Congress and state legislators in their district offices.** **Moreover, our chapters and delegates help organize Town Hall meetings with elected officials and candidates to enable those locally of our 2,000,000 AMAC members to meet, hear, and question them.****And you should also know that we now have more than 337,000 AMAC members who respond to our “calls-to-action” and weigh in with members of the** **U.S. House and Senate, as well as their state legislators on the issues.** Quite simply, when we speak, Washington listens. [](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=867d5cd7440b4b658e02e1e3441f2df5&_e=vgygCpMDfNJ0xjuYbXrPWPP1RcaDpD-K-jrKmm3Y5bGyJwPUqHjH35WD9IbYlWEOXXfby0G5MBKnBjKu1bq_0kb5569CqgEaNORiJIPWN4N5C1SauYURbhafAX2AB5skH-GmQLRmnRfJ24RuYd6Fn7S4ON6GG_P3Khm8IOCRbKF2nYz1clgpYBzY-3vCSGKI3vS7IjTD4TpYjjGrjmY8FsvFYj6QkXmLlDe7isrDu1M%3D)**[And AMAC Action needs your help today in this do-or-die battle to pass a Constitutional Amendment to protect your vote from being canceled out by an illegal alien or a convicted felon.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=867d5cd7440b4b658e02e1e3441f2df5&_e=vgygCpMDfNJ0xjuYbXrPWPP1RcaDpD-K-jrKmm3Y5bEDBLgZ15VLNWqPY5WkSTSw0sT8idWZ6lZxTM_9XDRD2WJtbavpfYMuUqAweXEyj46ZkwZ_4Vl4pLzbSTcPxAXImQuqq0OzoV-j4fO1QESC-wXRKhWRfvzTL4EWwHxk9WahlzntGTCyFz1pl1fXQwG_825BJpWA6aToORbHU3bZ27wzyb69QoLuMF8oA-1HojvMJbCMiMncWxz0JETD2AdqHe-UUieWDwVs3wkWn_BqaWftbddD5RjjjFeH46yYkGFNBns55ZKGyyURKyRLCJwShod0JIBke39WSMhq65eoiWuAheRwpnIVE3e3YaMNy0E%3D)** But I can’t do it without you. **No matter what issue you care about the most, if you and I don’t have a secure,_honest_ elections... none of it matters.**Inflation. Illegal immigration. Violent Crime. Drug use. Homelessness. The 2nd Amendment. Out of control spending. Social Security and Medicare insolvency. Right to Life. Indoctrination in our schools. Endless foreign wars. You name it. **[So please follow this link to sign your “BAN NON-CITIZEN VOTING” Petition to Amend the U.S. Constitution](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=867d5cd7440b4b658e02e1e3441f2df5&_e=vgygCpMDfNJ0xjuYbXrPWPP1RcaDpD-K-jrKmm3Y5bEDBLgZ15VLNWqPY5WkSTSw0sT8idWZ6lZxTM_9XDRD2WJtbavpfYMuUqAweXEyj46ZkwZ_4Vl4pLzbSTcPxAXImQuqq0OzoV-j4fO1QESC-wXRKhWRfvzTL4EWwHxk9WahlzntGTCyFz1pl1fXQwG_825BJpWA6aToORbHU3bZ2zABIf4OliJ_I5FBGpn9MMM_6NDgupHbc0y21qPX7lWvbfX4c2bl-uV1Ucxq0hKGRbY1pgNRd3vNREwUkggyyeOJKtnbg_ulvvrU_1ibw6hgLFhHDIkoDORupQv2NUeICk1Qhz0lxD7dkfEKYzhkCkE%3D)** so that AMAC Action can put your representatives in Washington and in the state legislature on notice with a simple demand: Namely, that you will not tolerate this erosion of your vote.Now, here’s the bad news:Most state constitutions grant voting rights to “every” citizen, open-ended language that liberal activists argue permits localities to authorize non-citizen and even illegal alien voting. States should amend their constitutions to instead permit “only” citizens to vote. But there’s good news, too:Seven states have _expressly_ banned non-citizen voting already: Alabama, Arizona, Colorado, Florida, Louisiana, North Dakota, and Ohio.**What’s more, voters approve of constitutional amendments to ban non-citizen voting by overwhelming margins. Nearly 77% of Ohio voters approved a measure in 2022, while nearly 63% of Colorado voters approved one in 2020.** This is a solution whose time has come. You and I can do this. **[That’s why, when you’ve signed your “BAN NON-CITIZEN VOTING” Petition to Amend the U.S. Constitution](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=867d5cd7440b4b658e02e1e3441f2df5&_e=vgygCpMDfNJ0xjuYbXrPWPP1RcaDpD-K-jrKmm3Y5bEDBLgZ15VLNWqPY5WkSTSw0sT8idWZ6lZxTM_9XDRD2WJtbavpfYMuUqAweXEyj46ZkwZ_4Vl4pLzbSTcPxAXImQuqq0OzoV-j4fO1QESC-wXRKhWRfvzTL4EWwHxk9WahlzntGTCyFz1pl1fXQwG_825BJpWA6aToORbHU3bZ29xzn_yUrechD6Yk-kY3ZbpeQXCRdZYDjBgL5mXEa_WwkCRrArR-9VSqwo2-4fvbej299VNvl-7oBstjLsooQzjaf6yiG04NEraaF4WT-243E6hbQiBf_CFnT4pIansTClJpW1RWQZwabNd7eQfqPY4%3D), I'm also asking you to make a one-time contribution of $35 to give AMAC Action the resources to send out, collect, process, and tabulate millions of petitions.** The reality is, we don’t get a dime of taxpayer funding. Our funding comes from grassroots conservatives like you who care deeply about the future of America. This is important. _It means we can’t be bought._ On the other hand, the leftwing election fraud machine is funded by leftwing billionaires like Mark Zuckerberg and George Soros who are actively funneling _billions_ to dark money “non-profit” groups to “**reshape** ” our elections and our electorate.With that said, if you’re able to make a larger contribution – say $50, $75, $125, $250, $500, or even $1,000 – it would really be a life saver. Please hurry. In order to secure your vote in all future elections – and with 11.5 million illegals chomping to be included in the next census – **[your “BAN NON-CITIZEN VOTING” Petition to Amend the U.S. Constitution is vitally important.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=867d5cd7440b4b658e02e1e3441f2df5&_e=vgygCpMDfNJ0xjuYbXrPWPP1RcaDpD-K-jrKmm3Y5bEDBLgZ15VLNWqPY5WkSTSw0sT8idWZ6lZxTM_9XDRD2WJtbavpfYMuUqAweXEyj46ZkwZ_4Vl4pLzbSTcPxAXImQuqq0OzoV-j4fO1QESC-wXRKhWRfvzTL4EWwHxk9WahlzntGTCyFz1pl1fXQwG_825BJpWA6aToORbHU3bZ29RnglsPl9jQvHMzPgdajm5vVfu-nK-VOG-0yD7e_1BJckWLpBLpOSpDjpp6D6ab00JoJpOC6b_t-s_kdxHeFLJLdEn9Zkkw5PmoEIKYj1-D4MS4MfQgjnQUCLjikMnWr7_akhhCFFo1lpv3yd7wJyk%3D)** Yes, this is about saving your vote from being canceled. It’s also about saving America.And it all starts with the straightforward premise that non-citizens and illegal aliens – no matter how many Kamala Harris and Joe Biden imported on their watch – should be banned from voting _and_ banned from being counted for apportioning congressional seats and electoral votes. Thank you in advance for joining the fight to secure your vote
---

[](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=867d5cd7440b4b658e02e1e3441f2df5&_e=vgygCpMDfNJ0xjuYbXrPWPP1RcaDpD-K-jrKmm3Y5bEDBLgZ15VLNWqPY5WkSTSw0sT8idWZ6lZxTM_9XDRD2WJtbavpfYMuUqAweXEyj46ZkwZ_4Vl4pLzbSTcPxAXImQuqq0OzoV-j4fO1QESC-wXRKhWRfvzTL4EWwHxk9WahlzntGTCyFz1pl1fXQwG_825BJpWA6aToORbHU3bZ25whEiZZ0red9jhXRtqJKrVbf4X6M_vGrIkUK6jsS0Yj7jrScRLxv-ZHgCptOd5AJHMCwNpv4QQCn4O_2NE5zR8VWYegV2P_bm7hqBR6bvRm4iXv3t1mJ1ESpj06PSvcJl5hFitYGd_e8WkUteFUGmc%3D)

clean_body: Because, here’s the scary part...| | | | It isn’t rocket-science. It’s basic math. | | | | “A disproportionate number of illegal immigrants go to blue states, they amplify the effect of a blue state vote. My understanding is that Democrats would lose approximately 20 seats in the house if illegals were not counted in census. And that’s also 20 less electoral votes for president. So, illegals absolutely do impact who controls the House and the presidency.”~ Elon Musk | | Fellow Conservative,Elon Musk is right. It isn’t rocket-science. It’s basic math. It’s also a ticking time-bomb set by Joe Biden and Kamala Harris – in the form of 11.5 million illegals entering our country on their watch – one which will explode shortly after President Trump leaves office in 2029.While you and I have no doubt President Trump will deliver on his promise to secure the border, this threat will not go away. The truth is, without immediate action, these illegal aliens will be counted in the U.S. Census, which determines both the apportionment of seats in the House of Representatives and the number of electoral votes given to each state. Whether they came because, four years ago, Kamala Harris and Joe Biden prompted them to “surge to the border” for asylum or because of blue-states offering sanctuary status, “free” health care, “free” cell phones, “free” housing, and “free” college...it doesn’t matter. The result is the same.Your vote is already being watered down in Congress. Your vote is already being watered down in the Electoral College.And every day reports are popping up of non-citizens, illegal aliens, and convicted felons being registered to vote in cities and entire swing-states across the country, which means your vote may be fully canceled out in future elections. American elections should be decided by American citizens., here’s the scary part:The last census took place in 2020. That was before the 11.5 million illegal aliens who invaded our country under Joe Biden and Kamala Harris. To put it in context, there are only 8 states in America with a population over 11 million. So, it’s as if the radical Left just imported the 9th largest state in America. That’s more than North Carolina (10.8 million), Michigan (10 million), New Jersey (9.2 million), or Virginia (8.7 million).You get the picture. That’s why urgent action is needed to pass a Constitutional Amendment to ban illegal aliens from voting and from being counted for purposes of congressional and electoral vote apportionment. The next census in less than 6 years away. If those 11.5 million illegal aliens are counted in the census or are allowed to vote in the intervening years, you and I simply won’t have a country. Because, quite honestly, they think they can pull a fast one on you. They think you and I will be so relieved to see the border secure again and criminal illegal aliens deported, that you and I will be oblivious to this threat lying dormant under our very eyes.No way.My name is Rebecca Weber. I’m the chairwoman of AMAC Action. AMAC Action is the most influential advocacy group in the country when it comes to standing for the values of conservative Seniors.We’ve got 72 chapters and 300 volunteer delegates, who are the “feet on the street” advocates who contact Members of Congress and state legislators in their district offices. Moreover, our chapters and delegates help organize Town Hall meetings with elected officials and candidates to enable those locally of our 2,000,000 AMAC members to meet, hear, and question them.And you should also know that we now have more than 337,000 AMAC members who respond to our “calls-to-action” and weigh in with members of the U.S. House and Senate, as well as their state legislators on the issues. Quite simply, when we speak, Washington listens. But I can’t do it without you. No matter what issue you care about the most, if you and I don’t have a secure,honest elections... none of it matters.Inflation. Illegal immigration. Violent Crime. Drug use. Homelessness. The 2nd Amendment. Out of control spending. Social Security and Medicare insolvency. Right to Life. Indoctrination in our schools. Endless foreign wars. You name it. so that AMAC Action can put your representatives in Washington and in the state legislature on notice with a simple demand: Namely, that you will not tolerate this erosion of your vote.Now, here’s the bad news:Most state constitutions grant voting rights to “every” citizen, open-ended language that liberal activists argue permits localities to authorize non-citizen and even illegal alien voting. States should amend their constitutions to instead permit “only” citizens to vote. But there’s good news, too:Seven states have expressly banned non-citizen voting already: Alabama, Arizona, Colorado, Florida, Louisiana, North Dakota, and Ohio.What’s more, voters approve of constitutional amendments to ban non-citizen voting by overwhelming margins. Nearly 77% of Ohio voters approved a measure in 2022, while nearly 63% of Colorado voters approved one in 2020. This is a solution whose time has come. You and I can do this. , I'm also asking you to make a one-time contribution of $35 to give AMAC Action the resources to send out, collect, process, and tabulate millions of petitions. The reality is, we don’t get a dime of taxpayer funding. Our funding comes from grassroots conservatives like you who care deeply about the future of America. This is important. It means we can’t be bought. On the other hand, the leftwing election fraud machine is funded by leftwing billionaires like Mark Zuckerberg and George Soros who are actively funneling billions to dark money “non-profit” groups to “reshape ” our elections and our electorate.With that said, if you’re able to make a larger contribution – say $50, $75, $125, $250, $500, or even $1,000 – it would really be a life saver. Please hurry. In order to secure your vote in all future elections – and with 11.5 million illegals chomping to be included in the next census – Yes, this is about saving your vote from being canceled. It’s also about saving America.And it all starts with the straightforward premise that non-citizens and illegal aliens – no matter how many Kamala Harris and Joe Biden imported on their watch – should be banned from voting and banned from being counted for apportioning congressional seats and electoral votes. When my patients come to me with blood pressure higher than 120/80... I tell them to start drinking this hydrating juice every morning:

Yet one 74-year-old patient who started drinking it daily...

**Dropped his BP numbers from 150/80 ... down to 116/76**.

He didn't start exercising, adjust his diet, or change his meds.

All he did was start drinking this juice every morning at 6am.

(And it probably saved his life.)

As a medical doctor for over 22 years, I tell all my high BP patients:

**[>> This is the #1 best juice to lower your blood pressure by up to 34 points.](https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/cf921b35a52548ed8db78c340265093d-903d65a50d4c468484cadd18e9e0cd54/63) **

_To your good health,_

Dr. Rick Cohen
