name: Steve Scalise
subject: You are not an ATM
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
I want to treat you with respect and be transparent about where your money is going.

| |
---
| | | Some folks write you emails pretending to be President Trump.

**I won 't do that to you. **

Some folks pretend donations will somehow fund DOGE or Elon Musk's work.

**I prefer to be honest with you.**

This is Steve Scalise. As your House Majority Leader, I work hand and glove with President Trump, and I love what Elon Musk and DOGE are doing for our country.

And when I ask you for support, I want to treat you with respect and be transparent about where your money is going.

You are not an ATM. You are a valued member of our MAGA movement. You deserve to be treated that way.

**_[So why I'm dropping into your inbox right now:](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/bAKWbUViClE_HCbLzDmtLbAiiAXtVK-z_-dWtCSr7A9Qm_EB25autAEQ7siFWDrR9VI3tTj_PQzH6RmoiRkNPXvaimrmvERBwln7BHYKHrcitbpSO7JUTKe96en6nYAgnhWgGi_tDl6citsuqFZjAw-335vqEiYsslR6cCcNFO5pGCVie_hIl2NQEIjmuPfk_P6kHA-AXyaqMGJmPuAxSzyxV0vkMcMxP7N2v_iSHlfPhFDBUiu4c37WV6MUNm92KB-12bNXmV7MYydUeGXfKWRBXR7kBXVEyPVA3iIg2V5Yzp2KVIlv7FO1xC6ynV0k_Zfevk0vb01S7bLyEBYs-d5r-kKtuKTXjh_ElL_a_FcBqbFzNQ-_jLieFbhvzgrEsTq7lw9s66_jr14S8XyCvVMKYBXDPFn0IveAeyTzWHN-tLti-zPBryCIUYBoKOctfdRVgkjMQN7rDYTiCrZASR-gfi7Sm5hjXIYX0mPXhFJ6V15zGHGt81aT_fzNS-63lf8yDvgC0SI9f1znt6o7Er0z93Bbcc_eWJfO3_T36ip5PA/BDqUGEkUQi3X7Wv7OXXHsTQXdH2xQy2J/6 "So why I’m dropping into your inbox right now: ")_**

I just read a troubling headline that you need to see for yourself...
_**" A tidal wave of resistance is coming for
Elon Musk" - The Hill**_
The Democrat Machine is firing on all cylinders to undermine, stonewall, and sabotage everything Elon Musk, President Trump, and DOGE are doing to make our government more efficient and cut waste.

Of course, the DC Swamp can't have that.

That's why they're mobilizing the courts, Deep State operatives, and Congressional Democrats to unleash a coordinated political hatchet job against Elon Musk.

_Democrats are suing him. They 're pushing for partisan investigations. They're firing off hit piece after hit piece in the press. They're introducing legislation to block his access. And a top Democrat even floated impeachment against Elon Musk. _

Their plan is simple:
**1.** Attack Trump and Musk
**2.** Drag them into court battles
**3.** Slow them down at every turn
**4.** Use the press to attack their work
**5.** Unload millions to win the Midterms
**6.** Block Trump's ENTIRE legislative agenda
**That 's where House Republicans - and most importantly, YOU - can make a major difference. **

Democrats have already pledged 50 million dollars to win the Midterm elections, take control of Congress, and exploit that power to sabotage EVERYTHING President Trump is doing to save the country. That includes the critical work of DOGE.

Cook Political Report just highlighted EIGHT toss-up districts that will determine who wins the House. If Democrats win even a few seats, it's over. They win the House.

That's why I'm tapping our entire grassroots movement for help.

_**[If you can afford to do so, I'm imploring you to pitch in a few bucks to save our House Majority - and President Trump's entire legislative agenda along with it.](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/OMynfauzOiaqrvDwFOOM8JC0JFCjHndb-yXfFEf2vS8rwtqh8H7x6Sat3GYOGqPT6AKWEWiBkqmLuYZ0zEbEuMDlXAfUz8XzXWLYDZzcB8wn46kvCEHdd1NAjvTkZUE1vHuzN5pnp620fk90R-AfFTJn--5004fIvORgBQHWkc5xUrmwRuSCU4BdHVQLQ3eH2Uxfr3rRQb7hsQcM14YTvJlGz7BAb9axYN96wYT32jUtEHI0C0hjO5y7GDb6gq3iygp--QiKQeMYx8alL3_7WLvZUWxRwPZoQGAu7q9Epf1uj5b3E8mR9GHx525kY-9dyGkyWX5B9X9_zeABh_7xPxKGnOp_obDZ7YIx_ZAs7P_G6pPERO5OiPq8OguWEW8BonYMXjBHwdtwMBG1zYR5MFYW9w9fGW3cnqrkN2d19ndfbCPuIJkQ-3IdO7qQFcwFW1a75G76M6XrF_yggj6T1ujgx4Q2cxArs39sPJM4SrM-ydeLVMpG3xsffogbs2MuUj5dKF2jJEyYqeObJN8nubvO1MrlFDI-1hOaVVQERxWtBQ/yWfNErkXdCzIbTDxNiFnAI6BjTYbU0m0/6 "If you can afford to do so, I’m imploring you to pitch in a few bucks to save our House Majority – and President Trump’s entire legislative agenda along with it. ")**_
| | [PLEASE CONTRIBUTE NOW](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/1RsUIGvascDkyn2svKo3jNkmGHmXrNVXfEHo9fjZBO_rr6xhxO2zwQoRLYS-TOgvLQrF9XCut44U4OoVn9PbtqE7cmV-LJxpGCZBWbTtSzCj_afM6tE5sFksul4wdTliZAGbGgwtNyxN7sVZnSqd82pLIonl6Giq1mcpJlTwP5w6SuF7xukMAnPEhBk_Y3WH1XKQnJNDmhhHtOvcFblGMY21FM7Yir2EhCqJXvJCf0JBbB9kzXxwpqsbZLGp63kDUW31UpL8-O1RaoQtVPObqlZbwaKjW0Gyb3Nfq1newg_Jl-CtOpaQoOG-lgGlevNuq18kWL9IWHmaGCOMzR5WU86_e9OLoniLJTuVjH7wSzzvkB-aZwRTnoCqilw4J1sx4Z59UjozrDZ63inJ08ZJwku2xJorPSe742_HCDv8UFMsrHN3QOB3hOQIn8b1LicTboYPURlnaom35u198jm0-YXM6KL6wWK5uAtpkX6Nv-yvy2yKY_B_OigJSg5iGTdqLlNCgj1TE5cv0ZVAb0CVChFMARN8eAp1IqFbDTjuVZvZLA/d8v4qZapQN9u5J4kq6s0BH6i2JFX_CQ1/6 " PLEASE CONTRIBUTE NOW")

Again, I'm NOT pretending this money is going to fund DOGE or anything these other groups are alluding to.

This money will go directly to the most important battleground districts in the country so we can win the Midterms and keep delivering on President Trump's MAGA agenda.

If you agree this is a noble cause to support, please consider pitching in right now.

God bless you,
_- Steve _

**STEVE SCALISE**
House Majority Leader

clean_body: I need you to join us ASAP! | SPLIT YOUR DONATION ACROSS FIVE AMERICA-FIRST NORTH CAROLINIANS! On November 5th, the American people gave us a mandate to lower gas and grocery prices, secure our southern border, and protect our conservative values. But now, our next battle is approaching, and we need your help. To help these folks, I 'm opening the SAVE NORTH CAROLINA FUND to help these NEW PATRIOTS fend off the left-wing extremists who will stop at nothing to derail our agenda. | We delivered North Carolina, and we're ready to deliver the America First Agenda. But that all starts with ensuring these NEW PATRIOTS can hit the ground running. For North Carolina and America, Senator Ted Budd Paid for by The Pat Harrigan Committee PO Box 97275, Raleigh, NC 27624 Copyright (C) 2024 Pat Harrigan for Congress, All rights reserved.

name: THREE INCOMING SPECIAL ELECTIONS [From House GOP]
subject: Don’t forget about these 3 critical things
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
It will take EVERY SINGLE CONSERVATIVE to step up and help make sure we win in all 3 Special Elections and save our House Majority.
REMEMBER: There are 218 Republicans in the House, 215 Democrats in the House, and 3 imminent Special Elections
| |
---
| | | _This is it, Friend!_

REMEMBER: There are _218 Republicans_ in the House

REMEMBER: There are _215 Democrats_ in the House

REMEMBER: There are _3 imminent Special Elections_

Do the math - if we lose them, the Democrats could take back the House.

If we learned anything about the Democrats in 2024, it's that they have: **1)** an army of rich celebrities and billionaires at their beck and call, **2)** the resources to unload millions and millions to win in battleground districts, and **3)** the willingness to do anything under the sun to destroy the Republican Party.

It will take EVERY SINGLE CONSERVATIVE to step up and help make sure we win in all 3 Special Elections and save our House Majority.

Over 76,000,000 Americans voted for our America First vision for the future of our country. We have it on good authority that you're included in that number. **_[And if every single Conservative does their part and pitches in a few bucks, we 'll have the resources to help our Special Election candidates and SAVE our fragile House Majority.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=5050aea1b34d4cb3950e253678dd3a77&_e=dbmZAowDkICWpWBVtBdQdyS0u_RlxYXOHe7dGZfUF7RSp1PyPLmy23uWG7uS10BxceQea3OcJEdxrduBolfyAGlCeyu8tA9-XsuQM-t4cEENcwjcaM38K8VUMRQgNWFomPw1posD_Gl-OFLnUVk13Jc-kqAoGOhaH2bUJGA43g4IxLhe9WlUtT87ornfMWnOe9N6JaM9SZgMFAfts-_5dX2qhT9rp0BUJuq8xTdKYReUhknUUGWi1nlStPJMu9WP8FtuwVSwCl6iCT5BnDD_mb66j6RPnFYyqfMZMCeRctFkMfWvTNlRNEMVvkR10EsGZ0q35ByCpr8Ongqt0OeQOkEkSyd7R1KYJqBtGBDCXNFKkTXT1BXgabJGDuJgiwr75j8lR_0fWjNOdbP3zVpg4Q%3D%3D "And if every single one of you does your part and pitches in a few bucks, we’ll have the resources to help our Special Election candidates and SAVE our fragile House Majority.")_**

This is our most important test yet.

_IF WE WIN:_ We'll keep our Republican Trifecta intact and be able to fast-track President Trump's agenda.

_BUT IF WE LOSE:_ The Democrats will take over and stonewall, derail, and completely sabotage President Trump's second term.

**Every dollar we raise between now and the first Special Election in a few weeks will be a MASSIVE help to save our House Majority.**

** _[Please don 't underestimate the power of your decision to donate today.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=5050aea1b34d4cb3950e253678dd3a77&_e=dbmZAowDkICWpWBVtBdQdyS0u_RlxYXOHe7dGZfUF7RSp1PyPLmy23uWG7uS10BxceQea3OcJEdxrduBolfyAGlCeyu8tA9-XsuQM-t4cEENcwjcaM38K8VUMRQgNWFomPw1posD_Gl-OFLnUVk13Jc-kqAoGOhaH2bUJGA43g4IxLhe9WlUtT87ornfMWnOe9N6JaM9SZgMFAfts-_5dX2qhT9rp0BUJuq8xTdKYReUhknUUGWi1nlStPJMu9WPdOBl30q9H8joCwaXWMtXyD9-euENKy3NtjFlCrLk6uwvc1hIF_iDSv-q0ZqAXEAXbcu1Oc70wX8yloFubLmRHJpo3zd_tCUwbLFdh6TqciqnxKIRBdY5I2UpwYYST5SlRq2HEkSn2-KhhI19apYrOw%3D%3D "Please don’t underestimate the power of your decision to donate today.")_**

GOP Rep. Andy Biggs **[SILENCED Democrat clown Eric Swalwell](https://substack.com/redirect/ca5c891c-4c10-4775-8a11-eaee20c7befe?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** with an absolutely daming video showing just how anti-police the Democrat party is.
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/ca5c891c-4c10-4775-8a11-eaee20c7befe?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/ca5c891c-4c10-4775-8a11-eaee20c7befe?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Swalwell chastised Republicans during a melodramatic monologue for bringing a witness into a hearing who previously tweeted a message reading "F*** Cops," also naming Rep. Marjorie Taylor Greene for saying "defund the FBI."
"Will you disavow your colleague who tweets out and makes money off of this 'defund the FBI' movement?!!" Swalwell asked Republicans. "You call yourself a pro police party, and you bring a witness before us who says "'f*** cops.'"
Biggs eagerly responded to Swalwell's grandstanding. "Watch out, you might fall over backwards from all the backpedaling," he said sarcastically.
**["We have a video to play..."](https://substack.com/redirect/ca5c891c-4c10-4775-8a11-eaee20c7befe?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** he continued, prompting a video compilation of dozens of Democrats verbally attacking the police and calling for the police to be defunded. Ilhan Omar, Jamaal Bowman and even Kamala Harris were featured prominently in the video.
Watch Biggs' brutal slam dunk on Swalwell right here:

President Donald Trump's new Director of National Security, Tulsi Gabbard, **[came out swinging against establishment Democrats and the Deep State](https://substack.com/redirect/0f1a797d-0cad-46fd-906c-77338e9b1b07?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** during her opening statement at her confirmation hearing.

subject: Sign on to defend the separation of power
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bera for Congress
body:
| Peter – did you know about Donald Trump’s latest executive order that claims to give him unchecked authority, and undermines our Constitution? [**Please read on below and consider signing our petition to defend the separation of power, protect the integrity of our democracy, and prevent this harmful precedent from taking root:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102649932/529831791/618790023?source=EM_NBI_AB_20250223_PT_AntiEO_0_3MO_Bera_1_3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS85MDU3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMmY5NTE1MS0zN2YyLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=e5CpVgOV_QlvkTNQVbDxaacE6sP6O0uMqhGdt9m8stE=&emci=6c35e2fd-baef-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=c2f95151-37f2-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=32394541)
****[SIGN ON>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102649933/529831792/1733963114?source=EM_NBI_AB_20250223_PT_AntiEO_0_3MO_Bera_1_3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS85MDU3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMmY5NTE1MS0zN2YyLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=e5CpVgOV_QlvkTNQVbDxaacE6sP6O0uMqhGdt9m8stE=&emci=6c35e2fd-baef-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=c2f95151-37f2-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=32394541)****
* * *
_**Begin Forwarded Message:**_ Peter,

President Trump recently signed an executive order stating that only the president and the attorney general have the authority to interpret the law for the executive branch—including agencies that have long been considered independent.

Historically, independent agencies exist beyond direct presidential control for a reason: to prevent any administration from wielding unchecked authority. **[Peter, will you sign our petition to demand a halt to President Trump’s overreach?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102649934/529831793/1733963114?source=EM_NBI_AB_20250223_PT_AntiEO_0_3MO_Bera_1_3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS85MDU3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMmY5NTE1MS0zN2YyLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=e5CpVgOV_QlvkTNQVbDxaacE6sP6O0uMqhGdt9m8stE=&emci=6c35e2fd-baef-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=c2f95151-37f2-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=32394541)**
****[SIGN ON>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102649935/529831794/1733963114?source=EM_NBI_AB_20250223_PT_AntiEO_0_3MO_Bera_1_3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS85MDU3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMmY5NTE1MS0zN2YyLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=e5CpVgOV_QlvkTNQVbDxaacE6sP6O0uMqhGdt9m8stE=&emci=6c35e2fd-baef-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=c2f95151-37f2-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=32394541)**** Our Constitution specifically divides powers among the branches of government, and makes them separate but equal. Article II may grant the president the power to ensure that laws are “faithfully executed,” but it does not give the president authority to interpret those laws.

_That role belongs to the judicial branch under Article III, which is meant to serve as a check on the executive and legislative branches._

This executive order risks upending decades of precedent by concentrating too much power in the hands of one individual. [**If you believe in the separation of powers in our government, please consider signing our petition to hold Donald Trump accountable and defend the separation of powers:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102649936/529831795/618790023?source=EM_NBI_AB_20250223_PT_AntiEO_0_3MO_Bera_1_3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS85MDU3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMmY5NTE1MS0zN2YyLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=e5CpVgOV_QlvkTNQVbDxaacE6sP6O0uMqhGdt9m8stE=&emci=6c35e2fd-baef-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=c2f95151-37f2-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=32394541)

clean_body: | Peter – did you know about Donald Trump’s latest executive order that claims to give him unchecked authority, and undermines our Constitution? ** Begin Forwarded Message: Peter, President Trump recently signed an executive order stating that only the president and the attorney general have the authority to interpret the law for the executive branch—including agencies that have long been considered independent. Historically, independent agencies exist beyond direct presidential control for a reason: to prevent any administration from wielding unchecked authority. ** Our Constitution specifically divides powers among the branches of government, and makes them separate but equal. Article II may grant the president the power to ensure that laws are “faithfully executed,” but it does not give the president authority to interpret those laws. That role belongs to the judicial branch under Article III, which is meant to serve as a check on the executive and legislative branches. This executive order risks upending decades of precedent by concentrating too much power in the hands of one individual. Thank you for your support, now and always. – Team Bera If you’d like to receive less email from our team If you'd like to stop receiving our emails, Paid for by Bera for Congress Bera for Congress PO Box 582496 Elk Grove, CA 95758 United States ** **

name: Pat Herrity
subject: Herrity Headlines - 02/23/2025
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Friends of Pat Herrity
body:
|
---
| |
---
|
---
| | Peter,

Welcome back to another edition of Herrity Headlines, where I take a few minutes to give you an overview of what our campaign has been up to this week, what issues we're hearing, and where I stand on them.
---
| |
---
We kicked off this week in Chesterfield County with the Huguenot Republican Women's Club, where we talked about a broad range of issues, and especially focused on the work I've done in Fairfax to combat human trafficking - and what can be done for the Commonwealth.
---
| |
---
We made our way to meet with the Republican Committee in Louisa County, a county I'm particularly fond of having grown up vacationing on Lake Anna since high school. It was great to catch up with Louisa's Board of Supervisors Chairman Duane Adams, whose endorsement I was honored to receive at the end of January.
---
| |
---
We hopped the county line to visit the Orange County Republican Committee that same evening, where it was a pleasure to spend time with active and passionate Republicans who are committed to keeping our state-wide elected offices in Republican hands in 2025.
---
| |
---

On Friday I attended one of the many Black History Month events in Fairfax County to celebrate the history, culture and achievements of black communities in Fairfax County.
---
| |
---

I had the opportunity to join the Lynchburg Republican Party for their Faith & Freedom Brunch, where they honored Mayor Larry Tyler. Mayor Tyler gave an incredible testimony on the power of faith!
---
| |
---
I wrapped up this week by joining the Craig County Republican Committee. Republicans in Craig were fired up to help turn out the Republican voters we need in Virginia's rural areas to carry the Commonwealth for Republicans!
---
|
---
| As we traveled this week, I was honored by the continued momentum and support for the campaign. This week we earned the endorsements of **Jean Gannon** and **Chris Yakabouski**.
---
| |
---

Chris Yakabouski is the chairman of the Spotsylvania County Board of Supervisors, and a strong leader for our conservative values in both the Fredericksburg suburbs and rural Spotsylvania. I'm grateful to have his support in such a crucial area of the Commonwealth.
---
| |
---

Jean Gannon is the former Chairwoman of the Powhatan County Republican Committee, and has been a long-time leader and activist for the Republican Party and Republican women. I'm honored by her confidence in my candidacy to serve as Lieutenant Governor.
---
|
---
| One of the issues I heard frequently on the campaign trail this week was lack of adequate school infrastructure - particularly in some of the more rural communities I visited.

As a father and a grandfather, I know how important it is to ensure our children receive the highest quality education possible. As a local elected official, I know just how big of an impact school infrastructure can impact quality of education.

While we are well aware of the infrastructure issues in cities like Richmond, rural counties struggle with unique challenges. Poor internet accessibility and difficult bus routes that make operations and educational excellence difficult for some school districts. As Lieutenant Governor, I am committed to being an advocate for excellence in education and ensuring that our children in every part of the Commonwealth have access to an education that will prepare them to succeed.

While we're talking about quality in education, the other question I hear frequently is _"Where do you stand on school choice?"_

I believe firmly that competition breeds excellence. School choice measures expand parent's options and ultimately push all education options to improve the quality they offer to Virginia families. I am strongly in favor of school choice for the Commonwealth, and I think we should be investing in programs that expand the options available to parents - our children will benefit from it.

Very truly yours,
---
| |
---
---
|
---
**Pat Herrity**
Springfield District Supervisor, Fairfax County
Candidate for Lieutenant Governor

---
| [Make a Contribution](https://patherrity.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=deffacbf7c4eb8be8b9889258&id=dab9783324&e=a1ea0f9c99 "Make a Contribution")
---
|
---

clean_body: | | | | | | Peter, Welcome back to another edition of Herrity Headlines, where I take a few minutes to give you an overview of what our campaign has been up to this week, what issues we're hearing, and where I stand on them. | | We kicked off this week in Chesterfield County with the Huguenot Republican Women's Club, where we talked about a broad range of issues, and especially focused on the work I've done in Fairfax to combat human trafficking - and what can be done for the Commonwealth. | | We made our way to meet with the Republican Committee in Louisa County, a county I'm particularly fond of having grown up vacationing on Lake Anna since high school. It was great to catch up with Louisa's Board of Supervisors Chairman Duane Adams, whose endorsement I was honored to receive at the end of January. | | We hopped the county line to visit the Orange County Republican Committee that same evening, where it was a pleasure to spend time with active and passionate Republicans who are committed to keeping our state-wide elected offices in Republican hands in 2025. | | On Friday I attended one of the many Black History Month events in Fairfax County to celebrate the history, culture and achievements of black communities in Fairfax County. | | I had the opportunity to join the Lynchburg Republican Party for their Faith & Freedom Brunch, where they honored Mayor Larry Tyler. Mayor Tyler gave an incredible testimony on the power of faith! | | I wrapped up this week by joining the Craig County Republican Committee. Republicans in Craig were fired up to help turn out the Republican voters we need in Virginia's rural areas to carry the Commonwealth for Republicans! | | As we traveled this week, I was honored by the continued momentum and support for the campaign. This week we earned the endorsements of Jean Gannon and Chris Yakabouski. | | Chris Yakabouski is the chairman of the Spotsylvania County Board of Supervisors, and a strong leader for our conservative values in both the Fredericksburg suburbs and rural Spotsylvania. I'm grateful to have his support in such a crucial area of the Commonwealth. | | Jean Gannon is the former Chairwoman of the Powhatan County Republican Committee, and has been a long-time leader and activist for the Republican Party and Republican women. I'm honored by her confidence in my candidacy to serve as Lieutenant Governor. | | One of the issues I heard frequently on the campaign trail this week was lack of adequate school infrastructure - particularly in some of the more rural communities I visited. As a father and a grandfather, I know how important it is to ensure our children receive the highest quality education possible. As a local elected official, I know just how big of an impact school infrastructure can impact quality of education. While we are well aware of the infrastructure issues in cities like Richmond, rural counties struggle with unique challenges. Poor internet accessibility and difficult bus routes that make operations and educational excellence difficult for some school districts. As Lieutenant Governor, I am committed to being an advocate for excellence in education and ensuring that our children in every part of the Commonwealth have access to an education that will prepare them to succeed. While we're talking about quality in education, the other question I hear frequently is "Where do you stand on school choice?" I believe firmly that competition breeds excellence. School choice measures expand parent's options and ultimately push all education options to improve the quality they offer to Virginia families. I am strongly in favor of school choice for the Commonwealth, and I think we should be investing in programs that expand the options available to parents - our children will benefit from it. Very truly yours, | | | Pat Herrity Springfield District Supervisor, Fairfax County Candidate for Lieutenant Governor | "Make a Contribution" | | If you received this email as a forward, I'd love for you sign up for Herrity Headlines to receive these updates every week, directly from my campaign: | "Sign Up for Herrity's Headline" | | Please save the date of March 16th for my annual Saint Patrick's Day Celebration in Fairfax County! We'll feature an exciting special guest, and the opportunity to learn more and get involved with my campaign for Lieutenant Governor this year! | "RSVP for the St Patrick's Day Party!" | | | | | | | | | | | www.patforva.com | | Paid for and authorized by Friends of Pat Herrity | | | Copyright © 2025 Friends of Pat Herrity, all rights reserved. | | | As a naturopathic physician, for the better part of the last 20 years my main job has been to keep my patients' joints moving freely...
Or to free them up when they’re stuck.
Today, I’m going to share with you what I’ve learned over all these years...
And let you in on a **[“trade secret”](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8zrvO4jAQhuGrcbpEzvgQUriAjbInwRZbIMrBdsArG4ydg7j7VfgR7cwjfS-G6N3wVKTZEYCrM5kAELYlAI_TEtL0L_z-Xv7a_6HlQx6CWL_w7U1n-OCbxhB3f4_7lI8Zm_bHaT7s5_rDx2e0H_werWxA59dr0xVGscFQXlhVN5wywSjw4qosaiGk1VQau-HtYEDj0J7rQYhhY4AVTgEFQQEYMKg5VGhalNgKaVt95nJDOH3tVBhschrrPC6Y0v0eKn0PhVfXcYz5FdYT6CNebK6muFjvbzbnFRHoJ11eUvRTLnOkcqWs3_b9z46wDoTgXBCQeTo7Q1iXx4Q381WFw1IkZeLivHdZNoTTyytnHZ8V_A8AAP__GhVzeQ)** that will help your joints feel like they just got an oil change.
**Read Now:** [6 Anti-Inflammatory Foods for Your Knees, Hips, & Back](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8zrvO4jAQhuGrcbpEzvgQUriAjbInwRZbIMrBdsArG4ydg7j7VfgR7cwjfS-G6N3wVKTZEYCrM5kAELYlAI_TEtL0L_z-Xv7a_6HlQx6CWL_w7U1n-OCbxhB3f4_7lI8Zm_bHaT7s5_rDx2e0H_werWxA59dr0xVGscFQXlhVN5wywSjw4qosaiGk1VQau-HtYEDj0J7rQYhhY4AVTgEFQQEYMKg5VGhalNgKaVt95nJDOH3tVBhschrrPC6Y0v0eKn0PhVfXcYz5FdYT6CNebK6muFjvbzbnFRHoJ11eUvRTLnOkcqWs3_b9z46wDoTgXBCQeTo7Q1iXx4Q381WFw1IkZeLivHdZNoTTyytnHZ8V_A8AAP__GhVzeQ)

This is genius, Friend.

**The Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE)** will cut down on wasteful government spending and make it MUCH more efficient.

Elon Musk has been selected to lead this effort, and he's already off to the races.

**House GOP has authorized the release of our new DOGE Survey, and you are 1 of 10 patriots from your area given clearance to complete this important survey.**

name: Shawnna Bolick
subject: February's Bolick Brief
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTE BOLICK
body:
| | | [ ](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=270052df58&e=a7ab36849c)
---
| | Good afternoon Freedom Fighters,

This is my first update I have sent since the current legislative session has begun. The month of January was crazy busy for our household. My husband was diagnosed with valley fever after being very sick for over a month. Fortunately, as soon as the medical professionals finally figured out what was making him ill, he started a treatment protocol to get better. I couldn’t cancel everything, but we did put attending non-mandatory events on hold for the time being with the understanding that once my husband started to recover, we would slowly get back to adding events to my legislative and social calendars.

In mid-January, our son got married in a beautiful yet intimate ceremony in the East Valley. A day later, we convened the 2025 57th Legislature- First Regular Session. I was able to introduce my mom and her plus one, my son’s new in-laws and an amazing hard-working couple from Legislative District 2 from the Senate floor in my very brief opening remarks.

Later in the week, I attended a 2-day public safety conference along with state legislators from across the country.

At the end of January, I read a [school choice proclamation](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=f45ea148eb&e=a7ab36849c) from the Senate floor commemorating the 15th anniversary of National School Choice Week. I even attended one of the annual school fairs held in downtown Phoenix with quite a bit of participation from schools across the Valley.

This legislative session I have focused most of my attention on victim’s rights, public safety, election integrity, deregulation, and [affordable housing](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=d0820c85be&e=a7ab36849c) solutions. It has been quite an interesting start to another legislative session. I am [sponsoring](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=4b397046e1&e=a7ab36849c) 31 different bills. Of those 31 bills, 27 bills are still moving through the legislative process.

Last week was our last week for most of the Senate’s committees to hear Senate bills. The Senate has been passing out quite a bit of legislation over the past several weeks. This coming week we will pause most of our committee hearings to complete our floor work to vote out most of the remaining Senate bills to send over to the House for a hearing. We are almost halfway there as crossover week is one of our busiest times at the Capitol.

_Legislative Highlights_

One public safety bill that I sponsored in the House a few sessions ago, I am sponsoring once again this session to ensure the [Motorcycle Safety Fund](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=2ffa1354dd&e=a7ab36849c) doesn’t lapse or its funds are swept. It overwhelmingly [passed out of the Senate](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=382a43d1e8&e=a7ab36849c) and heads over to the House.

Last year, one of the two bills of mine Governor Hobbs vetoed was a [bill](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=0c13bb0ece&e=a7ab36849c) to deal with public entity liability. The bill has returned this session in a slightly different form. I am hopeful we can get it across the line. If our children are our most valuable resource, then, school districts should be doing their due diligence ensuring they are not hiring pedophiles or teachers who have a storied past. Sadly, not every school conducts a background check on its employees before they are hired.

An animal cruelty bill that stalled in the House last session was reintroduced this year. I am sponsoring [Senate Bill 1234](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=a98b27258c&e=a7ab36849c) this session and it was unanimously voted out of the Senate Committee on Regulatory Affairs and Government Efficiency (RAGE).

_In Other News _

Last week a win came down for Second Amendment supporters in Pima County. You can read about the victory [here](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=e3ca31ff99&e=a7ab36849c) striking down an illegal firearms mandate.

_In the Know_

If you’d like to stay in the loop on the ongoings at the Capitol, the Republican Senate caucus sends out a weekly newsletter. If you’re interested in subscribing, please visit the Senate Republicans’ [website](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=01b8ab0575&e=a7ab36849c) to subscribe.

_Campaign Update_

Finally, I have filed to run for another two-year term in 2026 representing Legislative District 2. If you live in District 2, [please sign my online nomination petition](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=40e3132978&e=a7ab36849c) that helps ensure my name appears on the Republican primary ballot. If you're so inclined, please [donate](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=cc300e0c40&e=a7ab36849c) to our campaign. As you may know we had to raise close to $400,000 dollars last election to save this seat. If you'd like to volunteer on our campaign, please [email me](mailto:info@bolickforarizona.com?subject=Volunteer) and let me know how you'd like to help us secure this seat.

Thank you for your continued support!

Take care,
Shawnna

name: Ken Martin (via Democrats.org)
subject: My story:
body:
---
Derek, This is a longer email, but I hope you’ll take a few minutes to read it. I want to take a moment to share a bit more of my story with you, why I ran for DNC Chair, and why I’m hoping to earn your investment in our Party as we rebuild after a tough election cycle. I am the first son of a single mom who had me when she was 15 years old, and who was raising four kids by the time she was 20. We were in and out of shelters, and we knew what poverty felt like. We saw what my mom sacrificed to make sure we could have a warm dinner most nights. Because my mom gave a damn about us, and because my community gave a damn about our family, it meant we had a chance. I ended up being the first kid in my family to go to college and get a degree. **I got involved in politics because I believe our government should give a damn, too.** Too many people view politics as a sport – something that’s just about winning or losing. But to me, and to millions of families, this is personal. Whether we win or lose has a real impact on people’s lives. Just look at what we’re seeing right now: Donald Trump is openly coming after public schools and child care. He’s going after nursing homes and community health clinics and farmers. His policies are raising prices for millions of people, on necessities like food and gas, and doing nothing to help working families. If Donald Trump were president when I was a kid, I wouldn’t be here today. All of what he is doing has a real impact on people — and it’s why it’s more important than ever that we elect as many Democrats as possible, all over the country, who are willing to stand up and check Trump’s power in any way they can. **That’s my vision for our Party: organizing against Trump and his allies’ harmful agenda, competing in every ZIP code, and building the long-term party infrastructure we’ll need to elect Democrats _everywhere._** [**To do that, I’m asking for your help. Can you make an investment now in the future of the Democratic Party?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-february-2025?amount=3&refcode=em_20250223_2817_fr&refcode2=2817_22930333_DoRsYC&akid=2817%2E22930333%2EDoRsYC) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_ | | | **[CONTRIBUTE $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-february-2025?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em_20250223_2817_fr&refcode2=2817_22930333_DoRsYC&akid=2817%2E22930333%2EDoRsYC)**
---
****
| **[CONTRIBUTE OTHER](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-february-2025?refcode=em_20250223_2817_fr&refcode2=2817_22930333_DoRsYC&akid=2817%2E22930333%2EDoRsYC)**
---
****
Thank you for taking the time to read this message, and for the chance to earn your support.
Ken
Ken Martin
Chair
Democratic National Committee
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-february-2025?amount=3&refcode=em_20250223_2817_fr&refcode2=2817_22930333_DoRsYC&akid=2817%2E22930333%2EDoRsYC)
---

_If you gave recently via check or mail, our system may not have yet processed your gift. We are appreciative and thank you greatly for your support._
